`istsoil` (ISTSOIL)
`istcrop` (ISTCROP)
`isturb_hd` (ISTURB_HD)
`isturb_md` (ISTURB_MD)
`isturb_tbd` (ISTURB_TBD)
`istice` (ISTICE)
`istdlak` (ISTDLAK)
`istwet` (ISTWET)

### Equations:
$\sum_{L=1}^{max\_lunit} landunit\_weights(L) = \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} 0 & t < bounds \% begt \\ lun\_pp \% wttopounit(l) & l == ispval \\ sum(landunit\_weights) & otherwise \end{array}\right.$
$landunit\_sum = \sum_{L=1}^{max\_lunit} landunit\_weights(L)$
$landunit\_sum = 1$
$\left\{ \begin{array}{ll} do nothing & abs(landunit\_sum - 1\_r8) <= tol \\ landunit\_weights(istsoil) + (1\_r8 - landunit\_sum) & landunit\_sum < 1\_r8 \\ loop over decrease\_order & otherwise \end{array}\right.$
$landunit\_weights(cur\_landunit) = landunit\_weights(cur\_landunit) - excess$
$landunit\_sum = sum(landunit\_weights)$

### Equations:
$Ccv = \frac{n_c}{n}\quad\text{if } Ccv \neq 0$ (1)
$\rho_{LS}(j,l') > 0\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (2a)
$\rho_{LS}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{lc}'(j,c',l'+1) = 1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (2b)
$\rho_{LS}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{lc}'(j,c') = 1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (2c)
$\rho_{LS}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{lc}'(j,c',l')=1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (2d)
$\rho_{LS}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=1$ (2e)
$F_L = 1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (3a)
$F_L = 0 \wedge F_C = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{lc}'(j,c',l'+1) = 1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (3b)
$F_L = 0 \wedge F_C = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{lc}'(j,c') = 1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (3c)
$F_L = 0 \wedge F_C = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{lc}'(j,c',l')=1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=1$ (3d)
$F_L = 0 \wedge F_C = 0 \wedge l' < L \Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=1$ (3e)
$\rho_{CV}(j,l') > 0\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=2$ (4a)
$\rho_{CV}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{cc}'(j,c',l'+1) = 1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=2$ (4b)
$\rho_{CV}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{cc}'(j,c') = 1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=2$ (4c)
$\rho_{CV}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \wedge f_{cc}'(j,c',l')=1\Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=p_l'c'_l(j,c',l'-1)=2$ (4d)
$\rho_{CV}(j,l') = 0 \wedge l' < L \Rightarrow p_l'c'_l(j,c',l')=2$ (4e)

VariableName (Short Notation)

### Equations:
1. Weighting function calculation by depth:
`w_limit` (WL)
`rresis` (RR)
`rootfr` (RF)

### Equations:
WL(p) = Σ RR(p,j)*RF(p,j) from j=3 to nlevgrnd
where WL is the soil water weighting factor, RR is root soil water stress, and RF is the fraction of roots in each soil layer.
f (Short Notation: `f`)
c (Short Notation: `c`)
p (Short Notation: `p`)
j (Short Notation: `j`)
lev (Short Notation: `lev`)

### Equations:
$w\_limit(p) = w\_limit(p) + \max(rresis(p,j)*rootfr(p,j),0._r8)$
$p$ (PFT index)
$j$ (soil layer index)
$w_limit$ (soil water weighting factor)
$rswa$ (soil water availability in each soil layer)
$sumrswa$ (scaling soil water availability in each soil layer)

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial w_{limit}}{\partial p} = \max(rresis(p,j)rootfr(p,j),0._r8)$ (1)
$\frac{\partial rswa(p,j)}{dt} = \max(0._r8,rresis(p,j))*dz(c,j)$ (2)
$\frac{d}{dt}\sum rswa(p) =  \sum \max(0._r8, rresis(p,j))*dz(c,j)$
$p$ (Plant index)
$c$ (Column index)
$j$ (Layer number)
$f$ (Filter index)

### Equations:
$\text{w\_limit}(p) = 0$
$\text{sumrswa}(p) = 0$
$\text{sumrsmn}(p) = 0$
$\text{sumfrootc}(p) = 0$
$\text{rswa}(p,j) = 0$
$\text{rsmn}(p,j) = 0$
$\text{frootc_dz}(p,lev) = 0$
$w\_limit (Short Notation: w)$
$dt (Short Notation: t)$
$rswa(p,j)$
$rsmn(p,j)$
$sumrswa$
$sumrsmn$
$frootc_dz(p,lev)$
$sumfrootc$

===== File: TestResult.F90 =====

### Variables:
numFailed (NF)
numErrors (NE)
numRun (NR)
numSuccesses (NS)
runTime (RT)
MAX_LENGTH_NAME (MLN)

### Equations:
NF = failureCount(this) = NR (numFailed equals to the number of runs)
NE = errorCount(this) = NR (numErrors equals to the number of runs)
NS = numSuccesses = NR (number of successes equals to the number of runs)
RT = 0 + time (runTime equals to the sum of all runTimes)
NF = NF + 1 (numFailed plus one)
NE = NE + 1 (numErrors plus one)
NS = NS + 1 (number of successes plus one)
duration = RT (getRunTime returns runTime)

$o3mrg(:ncol,k) = (1._r8 - wt_o3_mrg(k)) * o3cam(:ncol,k) + wt_o3_mrg(k) * o3mlt(:ncol,k), \quad \text{for }  nbot_mlt+1 \leq k < ntop_cam$

### Variables:
Variable Name (Short Notation)
ntasks (NTASKS)

### Equations:
Equation in standard mathematical format (use subscript and superscript)
NTASKS = number of tasks
MYRANK = rank of the current task
PIOFILE = file identifier for Parallel I/O operations
IOTYPE = type of operation (read or write) for the given file
FILENAME = name of the file to be opened
RETVAL = return value from a function call, indicating success or failure
DATATO_WRITE = data to be written to the file
DIMS(1) = number of dimensions in the dataset (set to 2*NTASKS)
COMPDOF = decomposition information for the given task
IODESC_NCELLS = internal description of the decomposed array
PIODIM = dimension identifier for the new dimension 'M'
PIOVAR = variable descriptor for the new variable 'foo2'

### Equations:
WINTV = WC - 0.5 * WINTV
WINVI = 1 / WINTV

PINDEX = 0.5 * (F107 + F107A) - 80
`PINDEX` is a temporary variable defined as `factor` = 80 and used in the calculation of `ETF`
`MAX` function is not explicitly written in Fortran, but it can be considered as an equation where the maximum value between two numbers is selected

===== File: gw_front.F90 =====

### Variables:
frontgfc (Fgc)
kfront (Kft)
fav (Fav)
taubgnd (Tbg)
l (L)
n (N)
cmn (Cmn)
cmx (Cmx)
dc (Dc)
c0 (Cc)
cref (Cr)
pgwv (Pgwv)
dca (Dca)
kbot (Kbt)
u (U)
v (V)
frontgf (Fgf)
src_level (Sl)
tend_level (Tl)
tau (Tau)
ubm (Ub)
ubi (Ui)
xv (Xv)
yv (Yv)
c (Cp)

### Equations:
dca  = 0.1_r8
fav(l) = 0.5_r8 * dca * (exp(-(cmn/c0)**2) + exp(-(cmx/c0)**2))
fav(l) = fav(l) + dca * exp(-((cmn+n*dca)/c0)**2)
fav(l) = 0.5_r8 * dca * (exp(-(cref(l)-0.5_r8*dc/c0)**2) + exp(-(cref(l)+0.5_r8*dc/c0)**2))
fav(l) = fav(l) + dca * exp(-((cref(l)-0.5_r8*dc+(n*dca)/c0)**2))
fav(l) = 0.5_r8 * dca * (exp(-(cref(l)/c0)**2) + exp(-(cref(l)+0.5_r8*dc/c0)**2))
fav(l) = fav(l) + dca * exp(-((cref(l)+(n*dca)/c0)**2))
fav(l) = 0._r8
fav = fav/dc
fav = taubgnd * fav
ubi(:,kbot) = ubm(:,1)
ubi(:,1:kbot-1) = midpoint_interp(ubm(:,1:kbot))
tau(:,l,kbot) = fav(l)
tau(:,-l,kbot) = fav(l)
c = spread(cref, 1, ncol) + spread(abs(ubi(:,kbot)),2,2*ngwv+1)

===== File: rrtmg_sw_vrtqdr.f90 =====

### Variables:
klev (n_klevels)
kw (gpoint_index)
pref (direct_reflectance)
prefd (diffuse_reflectance)
ptra (direct_transmittance)
ptrad (diffuse_transmittance)
pdbt (layer_mean_direct_beam_transmittance)
ptdbt (total_direct_beam_transmittance_at_levels)
prup (radiative_flux_upwards)
prupd (radiative_flux_upwards)
prdnd (radiative_flux_downwards)
zreflect (reflection_factor)
ikp (index_kplusone)
ikx (index_k_minus_one)
jk (layer_index)

### Equations:
1 / (1 - prefd(klev+1) * prefd(klev)) = zreflect
pref(klev) + ((ptra(klev) - pdbt(klev)) * prefd(klev+1) + &
prefd(klev) + ptrad(klev) * ptrad(klev) * prefd(klev+1) * zreflect = prupd(klev)
1 / (1 - prupd(ikp) * prefd(ikx)) = zreflect
pref(ikx) + ((ptra(ikx) - pdbt(ikx)) * prupd(ikp) + &
prefd(ikx) + ptrad(ikx) * ptrad(ikx) * prupd(ikp) * zreflect = prupd(ikx)
ztdn(1) = 1
prdnd(1) = 0
ztdn(2) = ptra(1)
prdnd(2) = prefd(1)
ztdn(klev+1) = ptdbt(klev) * ptra(klev)
1 / (1 - prefd(jk) * prdnd(jk)) = zreflect
ptdbt(jk) * ptra(jk) + &
prefd(jk) + ptrad(jk) * ptrad(jk) * prdnd(jk) * zreflect = prdnd(jk+1)
1 / (1 - prdnd(jk) * prupd(jk)) = zreflect
(ptdbt(jk) * prup(jk) + (ztdn(jk) - ptdbt(jk)) * prupd(jk)) * zreflect = pfu(jk,kw)
ptdbt(jk) + (ztdn(jk) - ptdbt(jk)+ ptdbt(jk) * prup(jk) * prdnd(jk)) * zreflect = pfd(jk,kw)

===== File: sphere_op_interface.F90 =====

### Variables:
`np` (n)
`real_kind` (r)
`s` (S)
`dvv` (∂v∂x, ∂v∂y)
`D` (∂²x, ∂²y)
`Dinv` ((∂²x)^-1, (∂²y)^-1)
`metdet` (Δx)
`metinv` ((Δx)^-1)
`rmetdet` (Δx/r)
`mp` (m)
`spheremp` (M)
`tensorVisc` (τ)
`hypervis_scaling` (α)
`vec_sph2cart` (∇S)
`laplacian_rigid_factor` (λ)
`nu_ratio` (ν/α)
`vort` (∂θ∂x, ∂θ∂y)
`div` (∇·v)
`grad` (∇S)

### Equations:
**Gradient Sphere Equation**
∂S∂i = ∑_j ∂²S/∂x_j^2 (\* ∆x)^(-1) \* (∂²x_j/∂x_i)^-1
**Divergence Sphere Equation**
∇·v = ∑_i ∂v_i/∂x_i = ∑_i ∂²S/∂x_i^2 \* (∆x)^(-1) (\* ∆x)^(-1)
**Laplacian Simple Equation**
∆S = ∇·(∇S) = ∑_i ∂²S/∂x_i^2
**Vorticity Sphere Equation**
∂θ/∂x_j = ε_{ijk} ∂v_k/∂x_i
**Laplacian Rigid Factor Equation**
λ = (r^(-1))
**Vorticity Laplacian Contra Cartesian Equation**
(∇S)^i ∗ α \* ε_{ijk} ∂v_k/∂x_i

===== File: grdxy.F90 =====

### Variables:
dlam (Δλ)
lam (λ)
phi (φ)
w (ω)
sinlam (sin λ)
coslam (cos λ)
i (index)
j (index)
ig (index)
istart (start index for longitude grid)
jstart (start index for latitude grid)
jstop (end index for latitude grid)
nlond (extended longitude dimension)
lam0 (λ = 0)
pi (π)
wrk (work space array)
nxpt (number of points in x-direction)
jintmx (integer matrix size)
nlonex (number of extended longitudes)
platd (total number of latitudes)

### Equations:
Δλ = 2π / (nlonex(j) × 2)
λ(i,j) = (i - istart) × Δλ + λ0
φ(j) = arcsin(φ(platd+1-j)) for jstart ≤ j ≤ jstop
φ(j) = -π/2 or π/2 for j = jstart-1 or j = jstop+1
φ(j) = -π - φ(2jstart-2-j) for j = 1 to jstart-2
φ(j) = π - φ(2jstop+2-j) for j = jstop+2 to platd
sinlam(ig,j) = sin(λ(i,j))
coslam(ig,j) = cos(λ(i,j))

===== File: test_shr_scam.F90 =====

### Variables:

### Equations:
$\boxed{clat = \text{round}(tlat)}$
where tlat is target latitude.
The round function implies rounding to the nearest integer value.
$\boxed{clom = \text{mod}(\text{floor}(\text{tlom}),360)}$
where tlom is target longitude and mod denotes modulo operation.
$\boxed{closeLatIdx = \text{index}(latarray, clat)}$
where latarray is an array of latitude values.
The index function returns the position of the first occurrence of clat in latarray.
$\boxed{closeLonIdx = \text{index}(\text{lonarray}, \text{mod}(\text{floor}(tlom),360))}$
where lonarray is an array of longitude values.
The index function returns the position of the first occurrence of clom in lonarray.
$\boxed{\text{found} = .true.}$
This statement appears to be setting a logical flag (found) to true, which might be used later for some conditional logic within the code snippet.

===== File: tridiagonal.F90 =====

### Variables:
N (N)
i (i)
rc (rc)
au (a), bu (b), cu (c), du (d), ru (r), qu (q) (variables in subscripts, e.g., a_0, b_i)

### Equations:
\(\frac{au(lt)}{bu(lt)} = r_l\)
\(\frac{du(lt)}{bu(lt)} = q_l\)
\(ru(i) = \frac{a_i}{b_i - c_i \cdot ru(i+1)}\)
\(qu(i) = \frac{d_i - c_i \cdot q_{i+1}}{b_i - c_i \cdot r_{i+1}}\)
\(q_f = \frac{du(f) - cu(f) \cdot q_{f+1}}{bu(f) - cu(f) \cdot ru(f+1)}\)
\(v_i = q_i - r_i \cdot v_{i-1}\)
\(v_f = q_f\)

===== File: geopotential.F90 =====

### Variables:
ncol (Nc)
piln (PILN)
pmln (PMLN)
pint (PINL)
pmid (PMID)

gravit (G)

zvir (Z2RHOA)

zi     (ZI)
zm     (ZM)
fvdyn  (FVDYN)
hkk    (HKK)
hkl    (HKL)
rog    (ROG)
tvfac  (TVFC)
tv     (TV)

### Equations:
PILN = rair / G
HLL(i,k) = PILN(i, k+1) - PILN(i, k)
HKK(i,k) = 1._r8 - PINL(i, k) * HLL(i, k) * RPDEN(i, k), where FVDYN is true
HLL(i,k) = PDEN(i,k) / PMID(i, k)
HKK(i,k) = 0.5_r8 * HLL(i, k)
Z2RHOA(i,k) = TV(i,k) * QV(i,k) + 1._r8
T = (DSE - PHIS - G*ZI(k+1) ) / ((CPAIR / (1._r8 + Z2RHOA)) + RAIR*HKK)
TVFC = 1._r8 + Z2RHOA * QV
TV = T * TVFC
ZM(i,k) = ZI(k+1) + ROG * TV * HKK
ZI(i,k) = ZI(k+1) + ROG * TV * HLL

================================================================================

### Equations:
$y_{my3} = y_{dp}(i,k) - wdy(3,1,jdpval)$
$y_{my4} = y_{dp}(i,k) - wdy(4,1,jdpval)$
$coef12 = y_{my3} \cdot y_{my4}$
$y_{my2} = y_{dp}(i,k) - wdy(2,1,jdpval)$
$term1(i,k) = coef12 \cdot y_{my2} \cdot wdy(1,2,jdpval)$
$y_{my1} = y_{dp}(i,k) - wdy(1,1,jdpval)$
$term2(i,k) = coef12 \cdot y_{my1} \cdot wdy(2,2,jdpval)$
$coef34 = y_{my1} \cdot y_{my2}$
$term3(i,k) = coef34 \cdot y_{my4} \cdot wdy(3,2,jdpval)$
$term4(i,k) = coef34 \cdot y_{my3} \cdot wdy(4,2,jdpval)$
$fdp(i,k,m) = fint(i,k,1,m) \cdot term1(i,k) + fint(i,k,2,m) \cdot term2(i,k) + fint(i,k,3,m) \cdot term3(i,k) + fint(i,k,4,m) \cdot term4(i,k)$

===== File: qqflx_fixer.F90 =====

### Variables:
`qflx` (Q)
`q` (Q̄)
`shflx` (SHFLX)
`lhflx` (LHFLX)
`ztodt` (∆t)
`gravit` (g)
`rpdel` (Δp / Δz)
`factor` (F)
`excess` (EXCESS)
`qori` (Q̄i)
`qbot` (Qbi)
`dqbot` (∆Qbi)
`ratio` (RATIO)
`wsp` (WSP)
`wpnet` (WPNET)
`dwpbot` (∆WD)
`latvap` (L)
`pver` (P̄)
`pcols` (N)
`ncol` (Nc)
`i_wv` (w)
`k` (K)
`lchnk` (C)
`subnam` (SUBNAM)
`shflx` (SHFLX)

### Equations:
∆t \* g \* Δp / Δz \* Q̄ = EXCESS
∆t \* g \* rpdel(i,pver) \* q(i,pver,i_wv) = excess(i)
Qbi = Qmin(w) - ΔQflx \* Δt \* g \* Δp / Δz
qbot = qmin(i_wv) - qflx(i,i_wv) * ztodt*gravit*rpdel(i,pver)
∆WD = (Q̄i - Qbi) / Δp / Δz
dwpbot = dqbot / (gravit*rpdel(i,pver))
WSP = ∑[Q̄(K,w) / g \* Δp / Δz] from K=1 to P̄-1
wsp    = wsp + wst(k)
WPNET = WSP - ∆WD
wpnet = wsp - dwpbot
RATIO = WPNET / WSP
ratio = wpnet / wsp
Q̄(K,w) = Q̄(K,w) \* RATIO for K=1 to P̄-1
q(i,1:pver-1,i_wv) = q(i,1:pver-1,i_wv) * ratio
Q̄(P̄,w) = Qbi
q(i,pver,i_wv) = qbot

===== File: dcmip2016-tropical-cyclone.F90 =====

### Variables:
a (Earth's Radius)
Rd (Ideal gas const dry air)
g (Gravity)
cp (Specific heat capacity)
Lvap (Latent heat of vaporization of water)
Rvap (Ideal gas constnat for water vapor)
Mvap (Ratio of molar mass of dry air/water)
pi (pi)
p0 (Surface pressure)
kappa (Ratio of Rd to cp)
omega (Reference rotation rate of the Earth)
deg2rad (Conversion factor of degrees to radians)
rp (Radius for calculation of PS)
dp (Delta P for calculation of PS)
zp (Height for calculation of P)
q0 (q at surface from Jordan)
gamma (Lapse rate)
Ts0 (Surface temperature (SST))
p00 (Global mean surface pressure)
cen_lat (Center latitude of initial vortex)
cen_lon (Center longitufe of initial vortex)
ztrop (Tropopause Height)
qtrop (Tropopause specific humidity)
rfpi (Radius within which to use fixed-point iter.)
deltaz (Small number to ensure convergence in FPI)
epsilon (Small number to aviod dividing by zero in wind calc)
exponent (Exponent of temperature and pressure relation)
T0 (Surface temp)
Ttrop (Tropopause temp)

### Equations:
p = ptrop*exp(-(g*(z-ztrop))/(Rd*Ttrop))  - Equation for geopotential height
p = (p00-dp*exp(-(gr/rp)**exppr)*exp(-(height/zp)**exppz)) * ((T0-gamma*height)/T0)**(1/exponent)  - Equation for pressure given height
(T0-gamma*z)/T0 = (p/p00)**exponent  - Equation of state
height = (T0/gamma)*(1.d0-(p/ps)**exponent)  - Equation for geopotential height
u = -f*gr/2.d0+sqrt((f*gr/2.d0)**(2.d0) - exppr*(gr/rp)**exppr*Rd*(T0-gamma*z)/(exppz*z*Rd*(T0-gamma*z)/(g*zp**exppz) + (1.d0-p00/dp*exp((gr/rp)**exppr)*exp((z/zp)**exppz))))  - Equation for zonal wind
v = vfac*(-f*gr/2.d0+sqrt((f*gr/2.d0)**(2.d0) - exppr*(gr/rp)**exppr*Rd*(T0-gamma*z)/(exppz*z*Rd*(T0-gamma*z)/(g*zp**exppz) + (1.d0-p00/dp*exp((gr/rp)**exppr)*exp((z/zp)**exppz)))))  - Equation for meridional wind
q = q0*exp(-height/zq1)*exp(-(height/zq2)**exppz)  - Equation for specific humidity given geopotential height
t = (T0-gamma*z)/(1.d0+constTv*q)/(1.d0+exppz*Rd*(T0-gamma*z)*z/(g*zp**exppz*(1.d0-p00/dp*exp((gr/rp)**exppr)*exp((z/zp)**exppz))))  - Equation for temperature given geopotential height
thetav = t * (1.d0+constTv*q) * (p0/p)**(Rd/cp)  - Equation for virtual potential temperature given temperature and pressure
phis = 0.d0  - Equation for surface geopotential
rho = p/(Rd*t*(1.d0+constTv*q))  - Equation of state

### Equations:
ε = 1 × 10^(-5)
ε = 1.0E-05
Δ = (η_N - η_1)/M
Δ = \frac{\eta_N - \eta_1}{M}
i = argmin_k (∂η_k)
i = \argmin_k (\partial\eta_k)
if (Δ + ε >= ∂η_i) then
\text{if}~\Delta + \varepsilon \geqslant \partial\eta_i~
μ_new = (η_N - η_1)/∂η_i + 1
\mu_\text{new} = \frac{\eta_N - \eta_1}{\partial\eta_i} + 1
δ_kk = η_1 + (kk - 1)Δ
\delta_{kk} = \eta_1 + (kk - 1)\Delta
if (δ_kk > η_i + ε) then
\text{if}~\delta_{kk} > \eta_i + \varepsilon~
μ_kk = i
\mu_{kk} = i

### Equations:
$\boxed{\text{airt} < 100.: \quad ta = airt, \quad ta_k = airt + kelvin}$
airt (Temperature of the air in Kelvin)
ta (Air temperature in Celsius)
sst (Sea surface temperature in Celsius or Kelvin)
$\boxed{\text{airt} \geq 100.: \quad ta = airt - kelvin, \quad ta_k = airt}$
airt (Temperature of the air in Kelvin)
ta (Air temperature in Celsius)
sst (Sea surface temperature in Celsius or Kelvin)
$\boxed{\text{sst} < 100.: \quad tw  = sst,\quad tw_k= sst+kelvin}$
sst (Sea surface temperature in Celsius or Kelvin)
tw (Temperature of the sea surface in Celsius)
kelvin (Constant representing conversion between Celsius and Kelvin)
$\boxed{\text{sst} \geq 100.: \quad tw  = sst-kelvin,\quad tw_k= sst}$
sst (Sea surface temperature in Celsius or Kelvin)
tw (Temperature of the sea surface in Celsius)
kelvin (Constant representing conversion between Celsius and Kelvin)
$\boxed{\text{Compute Monin-Obukhov similarity parameters for wind (Wstar), heat (Tstar), and moisture (Qstar)}}$

### Equations:
$W^* = \frac{k u_z}{\ln \left( \frac{z}{z_0} \right) - \psi_m \left( \frac{z}{L} \right)}$
$T^* = \frac{\kappa (T_s-T_a)}{\ln \left( \frac{z}{z_h} \right) - \psi_h \left( \frac{z}{L} \right)}$
$Q^* = \frac{\kappa (q_s-q_a)}{\ln \left( \frac{z}{z_q} \right) - \psi_q \left( \frac{z}{L} \right)}$

### Equations:
$\tau_x^s = C_d \rho_a W_s U_{10}$
Tau_x (N/m^2), Cd (non-dimensional), rho_a (kg/m^3), W_s (m/s), U_10 (m/s)
$\tau_y^s = C_d \rho_a W_s V_{10}$
Tau_y (N/m^2), Cd (non-dimensional), rho_a (kg/m^3), W_s (m/s), V_10 (m/s)
$Q_e = L \rho_a W_s Q_s$
Qe (W/m^2), L (J/kg), rho_a (kg/m^3), W_s (m/s), Q_s (kg/kg)
$Q_h = c_p \rho_a W_s T_s$
Qh (W/m^2), cp (J/kg K), rho_a (kg/m^3), W_s (m/s), T_s (K)
$s$: sea surface temperature (in Kelvin or Celsius) (Sst)
$a$: air temperature (in Kelvin or Celsius) (Airt)
$u$: wind speed in x-direction (U10)
$v$: wind speed in y-direction (V10)
$q_e$: latent heat flux (Qe)
$q_h$: sensible heat flux (Qh)
$t_w$: sea surface temperature (in Kelvin) (Tw_k)
$t_a$: air temperature (in Kelvin) (Ta_k)
$w$: wind speed magnitude
$delt$: difference between air and sea surface temperatures
$delq$: difference between specific humidity at the air-sea interface and in the air
$Wstar$: Monin-Obukhov similarity scale for momentum
$Tstar$: Monin-Obukhov similarity scale for heat
$Qstar$: Monin-Obukhov similarity scale for moisture
$TVstar$: scaled wind speed including the effects of temperature and moisture
$Bf$: stability parameter (related to the Monin-Obukhov length)
$Cd$: drag coefficient
$Ch$: heat transfer coefficient
$Ce$: moisture transfer coefficient
$rhoa$: air density
$L$: latent heat of vaporization
$vis_air$: kinematic viscosity of dry air

### Equations:
L = \left(2.501 - 0.00237tw\right)\times 1.e6 (Equation for latent heat of vaporization, where $L$ is the latent heat of vaporization in J/kg and $tw$ is the sea surface temperature in Kelvin)
vis_air=1.326e-5*(1.0+ta*(6.542e-3+ta*(8.301e-6-4.84e-9*ta))) (Equation for kinematic viscosity of dry air, where $vis\_air$ is the kinematic viscosity in m^2/s and $ta$ is the air temperature in Kelvin)
L = (2.501-0.00237*tw)*1.e6 (Equation for latent heat of vaporization, where $L$ is the latent heat of vaporization in J/kg and $tw$ is the sea surface temperature in Kelvin)
Cd=Wstar*Wstar/(Wspeed*Wspeed) (Equation for momentum transfer coefficient, where $Cd$ is the momentum transfer coefficient, $Wstar$ is the wind scaling parameter, and $Wspeed$ is the wind speed in m/s)
qe=cpa*rhoa*Wstar*Tstar (Equation for turbulent sensible heat flux, where $qe$ is the sensible heat flux in W/m2, $cpa$ is the specific heat capacity of air, $rhoa$ is the air density, $Wstar$ is the wind scaling parameter, and $Tstar$ is the heat scaling parameter)
qh=L*rhoa*Wstar*Qstar (Equation for turbulent latent heat flux, where $qh$ is the latent heat flux in W/m2, $L$ is the latent heat of vaporization, $rhoa$ is the air density, $Wstar$ is the wind scaling parameter, and $Qstar$ is the moisture scaling parameter)
evap=rhoa/rho_0*Wstar*Qstar (Equation for evaporation/condensation rate in m/s)

v10 (Wind direction at 10m height)

const06, cpa, cpw, g, kappa, kelvin, L, psi, Qe, qh, sst, taux, tauy, u10, v10, airt, qs, qa, rho_0, rhoa

### Equations:
$$\text{vis\_air}=1.326e{-5}\cdot(1+ta\cdot(6.542e{-3}+ta\cdot(8.301e{-6}-4.84e{-9}\cdot ta)))$$
$$L=(2.501-0.00237\cdot tw)\cdot 1.e6$$
$$\text{Wstar}=delw\cdot kappa/(log(zw/ZoW)-psi)$$
$$\text{ZWoL}=g\cdot kappa\cdot TVstar/(ta_k\cdot (1.0+0.61\cdot qa)\cdot Wstar\cdot Wstar)$$
$$rt=liu_a(k,1)*rr**liu_b(k,1)$$
$$rq=liu_a(k,2)*rr**liu_b(k,2)$$
$$Tstar=(delt)*cff/(log(zt/ZoT)-tpsi)$$
$$Qstar=(delq)*cff/(log(zq/ZoQ)-qpsi)$$
$$bf=-g/ta_k\cdot Wstar\cdot TVstar$$
$$cd_rain=1.0/(1.0+const06*(x3*L*x1)/(cpa*x2))$$
$$qe=cpa*rhoa*Wstar*Tstar$$
$$qh=L\rhoa*Wstar*Qstar$$
$$upvel=-1.61\cdot Wstar\cdot Qstar-(1.0+1.61\cdot qa)\cdot Wstar\cdot Tstar/ta_k$$

$\nu_t = \mathcal{N} \eps$

### Equations:
`ans = 0` (ANS = 0)
No explicit mathematical equations can be derived from the code. However, some relationships between variables can be inferred:
`c_mass=0._r8` and `n_mass=0._r8` imply that `C_MASS = N_MASS = 0`
`if(present(c_flx))c_flx=0._r8; if(present(n_flx))n_flx=0._r8; if(present(p_flx))p_flx=0._r8` implies that:
If `C_FLX` is present, then `C_MASS = C_FLX * DTIME`
If `N_FLX` is present, then `N_MASS = N_FLX * DTIME`
If `P_FLX` is present, then `P_MASS = P_FLX * DTIME`
`ystates0(:)=0._r8` and `ystatesf(:)=0._r8` imply that:
For all states `i`, `YSTATES0(i) = YSTATESF(i) = 0`
`ystates(:)=0._r8` implies that for any number of states `n`, the initial state values are zero: `YSTATES(1:n) = 0`
`if(nstvars>=0)continue` is not an equation, but it can be used to infer a relationship between the variables. If `nstvars >= 0`, then the code continues execution; otherwise, it returns without doing anything. This implies that there is no relationship between `NSTATES` and the other variables when `nstvars < 0`.

===== File: advect_scalar.F90 =====

### Variables:
ncrms (NCRM)
nc (NCRM)
dimx1_s (IXM1)
dimx2_s (IXM2)
dimy1_s (IYM1)
dimy2_s (IYm2)
nzm (NZM)
i (I)
j (J)
k (K)
icrm (ICRM)
fncrms,dimx1_s:dimx2_s, dimy1_s:dimy2_s, nzm (FNCRM)
flux(ncrms,nz) (FLX)
fadv(ncrms,nz) (FADV)
tmp (TMP)
u (U)
v (V)
w (W)
rho (RHO)
rhow (RHOW)

### Equations:
∑_icrm=1^ncrms F_icrm,i,j,k = f0_icrm,i,j,k
This equation is a simple assignment and does not represent any meaningful physics. It's just copying the values of `f` to `f0`.
FLX_icrm,k = FLX_icrm,k + (F_icrm,i,j,k - F0_icrm,i,j,k)
This equation represents the summation of the differences between `f` and `f0` over all spatial grid points. The result is stored in `flux`. This is likely part of a numerical advection scheme.
FADV_icrm,k = ∑_i=1^nX ∑_j=1^ny (F_icrm,i,j,k - F0_icrm,i,j,k)
This equation represents the summation of the differences between `f` and `f0` over all spatial grid points. The result is stored in `fadv`. This is likely part of a numerical advection scheme.

================================================================================

===== File: hybvcoord_mod.F90 =====

### Variables:
`ps0` (Pzero)
`hyai(k)` (HyA Interface)
`hybi(k)` (HyB Interface)
`hyam(k)` (HyA Midpoint)
`hybm(k)` (HyB Midpoint)
`etam(k)` (Eta Midpoint)
`etai(k)` (Eta Interface)
`dp0(k)` (Delta Pressure)

### Equations:
`p = a*ps0 + b*ps`
This equation defines the hybrid level, where p is pressure, ps is surface pressure, and a and b are coefficients.
`hyai(k)*ps0 + hybi(k)*ps`
This equation represents the interface hybrid coordinate definition.
`hyam(k)*ps0 + hybm(k)*ps`
This equation represents the midpoint hybrid coordinate definition.
`hvcoord%etam(k)=hvcoord%hyam(k)+hvcoord%hybm(k)`
This equation calculates the eta-level at midpoints from the A and B coefficients.
`hvcoord%etai(k)=hvcoord%hyai(k)+hvcoord%hybi(k)`
This equation calculates the eta-level at interfaces from the A and B coefficients.
`( hvcoord%hyai(k+1) - hvcoord%hyai(k) )*hvcoord%ps0 + ( hvcoord%hybi(k+1) - hvcoord%hybi(k) )*hvcoord%ps0`
This equation calculates the average layer thickness dp0(k) using the A and B coefficients.
`amean = ( hvcoord%hyai(k+1) + hvcoord%hyai(k) )*0.5D0`
This equation calculates the arithmetic mean of the A coefficient at interface levels.
`bmean = ( hvcoord%hybi(k+1) + hvcoord%hybi(k) )*0.5D0`
This equation calculates the arithmetic mean of the B coefficient at interface levels.
`abs( amean - hvcoord%hyam(k) )/ ( 0.5D0*( abs(amean + hvcoord%hyam(k)) ) )`
This equation tests if the midpoint A value is within a specified tolerance of its arithmetic mean with the adjacent values.
`abs( bmean - hvcoord%hybm(k) )/ ( 0.5D0*( abs(bmean + hvcoord%hybm(k)) ) )`
This equation tests if the midpoint B value is within a specified tolerance of its arithmetic mean with the adjacent values.

===== File: m_Filename.F90 =====

### Variables:
`l` (L)
`lb` (LB)
`le` (LE)
`myname` (MYNAME)
`myname_` (MYNAME_)
`cstr` (CSTR)
`sfx` (SFX)

### Equations:
L = INDEX(CSTR,'/',BACK=.TRUE.) (L = ∂CSTR/∂INDEX(//) | BACK = .TRUE.)
LB = L + 1 (LB = L + 1)
LE = LEN_TRIM(CSTR) (LE = |CSTR|_TRIM)
IF(PRESENT(SFX)) THEN ... (IF ∅ ≠ SFX THEN ...)
L = LE - LEN_TRIM(SFX) (L = LE - |SFX|_TRIM)
IF(SFX == CSTR(L+1:LE)) LE = L (IF SFX = CSTR(L+:|SFX|) THEN LE := L)
SELECT CASE(L) (CASE ∂L)
CASE(0); DIR_='.' (DIR = .)
CASE(1); DIR='/ ' (DIR = //)
CASEDEFAULT; DIR=CSTR(1:L-1) (DIR = CSTR(:L-1))

===== File: hyper.f90 =====

### Variables:
`length` (L)
`do_collective` (DC)
`do_chunk` (DCH)
`mpi_size` (MS)
`mpi_rank` (MR)
`nerrors` (NE)
`hdferror` (HE)
`i` (I)

### Equations:
L = length
ICOUNT = MS \* L / MS
ICOUNT ≈ L/MS
ISTART = MR \* ICOUNT
ISTART ≈ MR \* L / (MS \* MR) = L / MS
IEND = ISTART + ICOUNT
IEND ≈ L / MS + L / MS = 2L / MS
COUNTI(1) = ICOUNT
COUNTI(1) ≈ L / MS
START(1) = ISTART
START(1) ≈ L / MS
`length` (L)
`mpi_size` (S)
`icount` (I)
`istart` (I) = L / S
`iend` (I) ≈ 2L/S
`counti(1)` (I) ≈ L/S
`start(1)` (I) ≈ L/S

### Equations:
I = L / S (approximate)
IEND ≈ 2L/S (approximate)
COUNTI ≈ LI/S
STARTI ≈ L/S

================================================================================

### Equations:
$\mathrm{ptend\%s} = 0\_r8 \quad (\mathrm{OFFLINE\_DYN})$
$\mathrm{ptend\%s} = qrs + qrl \quad (\mathrm{otherwise})$
$net\_flux(i) = fsnt(i) - fsns(i) - flnt(i) + flns(i)$

===== File: engy_te.F90 =====

### Variables:
$cpair$ (Cp)
$w$ (ω)
$t$ (T)
$u$ (U)
$v$ (V)
$phis$ (Φ)
$pdel$ (ΔP)
$engy$ (E)
$nlon$ (N)

### Equations:
$E = \sum_{i=1}^{N}\sum_{k=1}^{\text{PLEV}} c_p T(i,k) + 0.5(U(i,k)^2 + V(i,k)^2)\Delta P(i,k)$
$E = E\left(c_w \omega\right)$

### Equations:
`Dims = (/4,6/)` : `D_{1} = 4`, `D_{2} = 6`

Equation in standard mathematical format: $\frac{\Delta t}{\rho \cdot M_{N}} V_{\text{trans}} (\text{NH}_3^+) - \int_0^{z} dz' \, \dot{x}_{minn\_nh4\_active\_yield\_flx\_vr\_patch}$

$\Delta t$
$\rho$
$M_{N}$
$\dot{x}_{minn\_nh4\_active\_yield\_flx\_vr\_patch}$

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial \dot{x}_{smin\_nh4}}{\partial t} = \frac{1}{\Delta t}\left(\sum_{j=0}^{N_j} \left(V_{trans}(NH_3^+)(t) - \int_0^\infty f(z) dz \right)\right)$
Where $\dot{x}_{smin\_nh4}$ is the sink flux of NH4, $V_{trans}(NH_3^+)(t)$ is the surface exchange flux of NH3 at time t, and $f(z)$ is a depth-resolved flux.
$\dot{x}_{smin\_nh4}$ (x_smin_nh4)
$V_{trans}(NH_3^+)(t)$ ($V_trans_NH3_t$)
$f(z)$ (f_z)

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial \text{NH}_4\text{-N}}{\partial t} = \dot{\phi}_{vtrans, \text{NH}_3}\cdot n_{atomw} + \int_0^z \rho_c(z') dz'$
Equation for the change in ammonium nitrogen concentration (`smin_nh4_to_plant_patch`) over time.
$\frac{\partial \text{NO}_3\text{-N}}{\partial t} = \dot{\text{NO}_3}\cdot n_{atomw} + \int_0^z \rho_c(z') dz'$
Equation for the change in nitrate nitrogen concentration (`smin_no3_to_plant_patch`) over time.
$\frac{\partial P}{\partial t} = \dot{P}\cdot p_{atomw} + \int_0^z \rho_c(z') dz'$
Equation for the change in phosphorus concentration (`sminp_to_plant_patch`) over time.
`natomw` (Na)
`patomw` (Pa)
`r8` (R8)

### Equations:
$\frac{\text{d}}{\text{dt}} \left( \text{S}_{\text{min} - \text{NH}_4}^{\text{plant}} \right) = \frac{\text{Tracer Flux Vtrans Patch}(p, id_{\text{trc}-\text{NH}_3x})}{d_t} + \sum\limits_{j=1}^{n} dz(c,j) \times \left( \text{Plant MinN}_{\text{NH}_4 - \text{Active Yield Flux}}^{\text{VR Patch}}(p, j) \right)$
$\frac{\text{d}}{\text{dt}} \left(\sum\limits_{j=1}^{n} dz(c,j) \times \left( \text{Plant MinN}_{\text{NH}_4 - \text{Active Yield Flux}}^{\text{VR Patch}}(p, j) \right)\right) = 0$
$\frac{\text{d}}{\text{dt}} (\text{Smin\_nh3x\_to\_plant\_patch}) = \frac{1}{\text{pftwtcol}} \left(\text{tracervtrans\_patch} \times \text{natomw}\right)$

c_it = i_im*100 + i_mc (Column type from icemec class)
i_mc = c_it - i_im*100 (Icemec class from column type)

### Equations:

### Equations:
`Q = F \* F`, where Q is the heating rate, F is the flux. This equation would be written in terms of `heatfac` and `fluxfac`. But since no such equation is present in this module, let's assume a hypothetical one as follows:
$Q = H F$
Another hypothetical equation based on some relation between gas constant (R) and Planck constant (h):
$R = \frac{Nh}{kT}$
$E = h\nu = hc\lambda^{-1}$

SMNv = SV
The "P pools" variables (DPP, LP, SCP, OCP, PRP) seem to represent different types of phosphorus stored in various parts of the ecosystem.
The "solution" and "labile" variables (SP, LP) might represent different forms or fractions of phosphorus that are readily available for use by organisms.
The "secondary" variable (SCP) could represent a form of phosphorus that has been converted from one type to another.
The "occluded" variable (OCP) might represent phosphorus that is bound up in organic matter and not readily available.
The "primary" variable (PRP) could represent the original or primary source of phosphorus.
`SP` = `LP` + `SCP`
`OCP` = `PRP` * (1 - `LP`)
`TCS` = `DPP` + `SP` + `LP`

===== File: terrain_filter.f90 =====

### Variables:
**M** (mlon)
**N** (mlat)
**H** (Z) (mean height)
**SD** (square root of variance)
**C** (filter coefficient)
**ITMAX_Z** (iteration count for mean height filter)
**ITMAX_SD** (iteration count for standard deviation filter)
**DG** (del2 of h)
**DL** (grid spacing in e-w direction)
**DP** (grid spacing in n-s direction)
**COS_P** (cosine of latitude)
**COS_E** (cosine of longitude)
**SINE_P** (sine of latitude)
**SINE_E** (sine of longitude)

### Equations:
M = 144
N = 91
call sm2(M, N, H, ITMAX_Z, C)
call sm2(M, N, SD, ITMAX_SD, C)
DG = DEL2(H)
FX =  grad(H) * CD
FY =  grad(H) * CD
FX(i,j) = (H(i+1,j) - H(i,j)) / DL for j=2,N-1 and i=2,M-1
FX(1,j) = (H(1,j) - H(M,j)) / DL for j=2,N-1
FY(i,j) = (H(i,j+1) - H(i,j)) / DP for i=1,M
P(i,1) = SUM1  (for i=1,M)
P(i,2) = SUM1  (for i=1,M)
P(i,N-1) = SUM2  (for i=1,M)
P(i,N) = SUM2  (for i=1,M)
S1 =  p1(im) + Σp1(i) for i=0,im-1
S2 =  p2(im) + Σp2(i) for i=0,im-1
H = H + C * DG

### Equations:
\( \text{dmt_vwr}(n) = \frac{\sum_{m=1}^{sz_nbr}\pi/6\cdot(\text{sz_ctr}(m)^3)\cdot\mathcal{L}\left(\frac{\text{sz_ctr}(m)}{\text{dmt_nma}}\right)\cdot\text{sz_dlt}(m)}{\sum_{m=1}^{sz_nbr}\pi/6\cdot(\text{sz_ctr}(m)^3)\cdot\mathcal{L}\left(\frac{\text{sz_ctr}(m)}{\text{dmt_nma}}\right)} \), where \( \mathcal{L}(x) = e^{-0.5(x/\ln_gsd)^2}/(\ln_gsd x) \)
\( \text{vlm_rsl}(n) = \sum_{m=1}^{sz_nbr}\pi/6\cdot(\text{sz_ctr}(m)^3)\cdot\mathcal{L}\left(\frac{\text{sz_ctr}(m)}{\text{dmt_nma}}\right)\cdot\text{sz_dlt}(m) \)
\( 1 + 2\cdot\text{mfp_atm}\left(1.257 + 0.4e^{-1.1(\text{dmt_vwr}/(2\cdot\text{mfp_atm}))} \right)/\text{dmt_vwr} = \text{slp_crc} \)
\( (1/18)\cdot\text{dmt_vwr}^2\cdot\text{dust_density}\cdot\text{gravit}\cdot\text{slp_crc}/\text{vsc_dyn_atm} = \text{vlc_stk} \)
\( 4\cdot\text{gravit}\cdot\text{dmt_vwr}\cdot\text{slp_crc}\cdot\text{dust_density}/(3\cdot\text{cff_drg_grv}\cdot\text{dns_mdp}) = \text{vlc_grv} \)

### Equations:
$dmt_vma = 3.5e-6$ m
$dmt_nma = dmt_vma * exp(-3.0_r8*ln_gsd*ln_gsd)$ m
$\int_{{min}}^{{max}}{\frac{1}{2}\pi sz ctr^{3} lgn dst \, sz dl t}$
$vlm rsl = \int_{{min}}^{{max}}{\pi sz ctr^{3} lgn dst \, sz dl t}$
$vlc stk_{n} = (1.0_r8/18.0_r8) * dmt vwr_{n} * dmt vwr_{n} * dust density * gravit * slp crc_{n} / vsc dyn atm $
$vlc grv = sqrt{4.0 * gravit * dmt vwr * slp crc * dust density / (3.0 * cff drg grv * dns mdp)}$
$\int_{{min}}^{{max}}{\frac{1}{2}\pi sz ctr^{3} lgn dst \, sz dl t} = 0 $
$vlc stk_{n} = vlc grv / stk crc_{n} $

### Equations:
$\boxed{dmt_vwr(n) = \frac{\sum_{i=0}^{sz_nbr}\pi/6(d_i)^3 lgn_dst sz_dlt}{\sum_{i=0}^{sz_nbr}\pi/6(d_i)^3 sz_dlt}}$
$\boxed{vlm_rsl(n) = \frac{\sum_{i=0}^{sz_nbr}\pi/6(d_i)^3 lgn_dst sz_dlt}{\sum_{i=0}^{sz_nbr}\pi/6(d_i)^3 sz_dlt}}$
$\boxed{vlc_grv(m) = \sqrt{\frac{4 g \rho_p d_m C_s}{3 \rho_a c_{drag} }}}$
$\boxed{slp_crc(m) = 1 + \frac{2 mfp_atm}{d_m}\left(1.257 + 0.4 e^{-\frac{1.1 d_m}{2 mfp_atm}}\right)}$
$\boxed{ryn_nbr_grv(m) = \frac{v_{stokes} d_m}{vsc_knm_atm}}$
$\boxed{cff_drg_grv(m) = \left\{\begin{array}{ll}24/ryn_nbr_grv(m) & \text{if } ryn_nbr_grv(m)<0.1\\(24/ryn_nbr_grv(m))(1+3(rn_nb_grv^2)/16+9(rn_nb_grv^4)\log(2*rn_nb_grv)/160) & \text{if } 0.1<ryn_nbr_grv(m)<2\\(24/ryn_nrbr_grv(m))(1+0.15(rn_nb_grv)^{0.687}) &\text{if } 2<ryn_nbr_grv(m)<500\\0.44 & \text{if } ryn_nbr_grv(m) > 2e5\end{array}\right.}$
$\boxed{vlc_grv(m) = \sqrt{\frac{4gravit dmt_vwr m slp_crc m dust_density}{3 cff_drg_grv m dns_mdp}}}$

===== File: mo_trislv.F90 =====

### Variables:

im1 (im1)
j (j)

main(syscnt,order) (m_{ij})
upper(syscnt,order) (u_{ij})

### Equations:
1._r8 / m_1i = \alpha_{11}
u_1i = u_{1i} * \alpha_{11} = u_i
\alpha_{ii} = \frac{1}{m_{ii}-l_{ii}u_{i-1}}
\alpha_{ii+1} = l_{ii} / (m_{ii} - l_{ii}u_{i-1})
x_i = (x_i - l_ix_{i-1}) * \alpha_{ii}
x_n = \frac{x_n - l_nx_{n-1}}{m_n - l_nu_{n-1}}
x_i = x_i - u_ix_{i+1}

$z_{\text{s} \text{v}} = \sum_{i=\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{a}\text{r}\text{t}}}^{\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{o}\text{p}}} v_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_n) \sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_n)$
$z_{\text{c} \text{u}} = \sum_{i=\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{a}\text{r}\text{t}}}^{\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{o}\text{p}}} u_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_n) \cos(\lambda_g)(i,j_n)$
$z_{\text{s} \text{u}} = \sum_{i=\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{a}\text{r}\text{t}}}^{\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{o}\text{p}}} u_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_n) \sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_n)$
$z_{\text{c} \text{u} \text{s}} = (z_{\text{c} \text{v}} - z_{\text{s} \text{v}})/n_l o n_x(j_n)$
$z_{\text{a} \text{u} \text{c} \text{v} \text{s}} = (z_{\text{c} \text{u}} + z_{\text{s} \text{u}})/n_l o n_x(j_n)$
$v_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_n+1) = z_{\text{c} \text{u} \text{s}}\cos(\lambda_g)(i,j_n+1) - z_{\text{a} \text{u} \text{c} \text{v} \text{s}}\sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_n+1)$
$u_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_n+1) = z_{\text{a} \text{u} \text{c} \text{v} \text{s}}\cos(\lambda_g)(i,j_n+1) + z_{\text{c} \text{u} \text{s}}\sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_n+1)$
$v_b(      i,k,j) = -v_b(n_l o n_2+i,k,2j_n+2-j)$
$v_b(n_l o n_2+i,k,j) = -v_b(      i,k,2j_n+2-j)$
$u_b(      i,k,j) = -u_b(n_l o n_2+i,k,2j_n+2-j)$
$u_b(n_l o n_2+i,k,j) = -u_b(      i,k,2j_n+2-j)$
$z_{\text{c} \text{v}} = \sum_{i=\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{a}\text{r}\text{t}}}^{\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{o}\text{p}}} v_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_s) \cos(\lambda_g)(i,j_s)$
$z_{\text{s} \text{v}} = \sum_{i=\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{a}\text{r}\text{t}}}^{\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{o}\text{p}}} v_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_s) \sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_s)$
$z_{\text{c} \text{u}} = \sum_{i=\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{a}\text{r}\text{t}}}^{\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{o}\text{p}}} u_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_s) \cos(\lambda_g)(i,j_s)$
$z_{\text{s} \text{u}} = \sum_{i=\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{a}\text{r}\text{t}}}^{\text{i}_{\text{s}\text{t}\text{o}\text{p}}} u_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_s) \sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_s)$
$z_{\text{c} \text{u} \text{s}} = (z_{\text{c} \text{v}} - z_{\text{s} \text{v}})/n_l o n_x(j_s)$
$z_{\text{a} \text{u} \text{c} \text{v} \text{s}} = (z_{\text{c} \text{u}} + z_{\text{s} \text{u}})/n_l o n_x(j_s)$
$v_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_s-1) = z_{\text{c} \text{u} \text{s}}\cos(\lambda_g)(i,j_s-1) + z_{\text{a} \text{u} \text{c} \text{v} \text{s}}\sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_s-1)$
$u_{\text{b}}(i,k,j_s-1) = z_{\text{a} \text{u} \text{c} \text{v} \text{s}}\cos(\lambda_g)(i,j_s-1) - z_{\text{c} \text{u} \text{s}}\sin(\lambda_g)(i,j_s-1)$

===== File: marsaglia.F90 =====

### Variables:
`k` (K)
`n` (N)
`sz` (S)
`i` (I)
`m` (M)
`seed1` (X1)
`seed2` (X2)
`seed3` (X3)
`seed4` (X4)
`kiss` (Y)
`ran_arr(i)` (R)

### Equations:
`seed1(i) = 69069 * seed1(i) + 1327217885` (X1(i) = 2^16 X1(i - 1) + c1)
where c1 is a constant.
`m(k, n) = ieor (k, ishft (k, n))`
where `ieor` and `ishft` are bitwise operations:
`seed2(i) = m (m (m (seed2(i), 13), - 17), 5)`
where the `m` function is applied recursively three times.
`seed3(i) = 18000 * iand (seed3(i), 65535) + ishft (seed3(i), - 16)`
where `iand` and `ishft` are bitwise operations:
`seed4(i) = 30903 * iand (seed4(i), 65535) + ishft (seed4(i), - 16)`
where `iand` and `ishft` are bitwise operations:
`kiss = seed1(i) + seed2(i) + ishft (seed3(i), 16) + seed4(i)`
$Y=X_1+X_2+2^{16}X_3+X_4$
`ran_arr(i) = kiss*2.328306e-10_r8 + 0.5_r8`
$R=Y\cdot \frac{1}{2^{53}}+\frac{1}{2}$

### Equations:
$display{dC/dt = -\sum_{i} r_i C_i + \sum_{j} s_j C_j}$
This equation represents the change in carbon concentration over time, where the rate of change is dependent on the rates of production and consumption of carbon. The summation indicates that these processes occur at various locations within the system.
$display{dN/dt = -\sum_{i} r_i N_i + \sum_{j} s_j N_j}$
This equation represents the change in nitrogen concentration over time, where the rate of change is dependent on the rates of production and consumption of nitrogen. The summation indicates that these processes occur at various locations within the system.
$display{dP/dt = -\sum_{i} r_i P_i + \sum_{j} s_j P_j}$
This equation represents the change in phosphorus concentration over time, where the rate of change is dependent on the rates of production and consumption of phosphorus. The summation indicates that these processes occur at various locations within the system.
$display{\frac{dC}{dt} = \sum_{i} r_i C_i + \sum_{j} s_j C_j - l_C}$
This equation represents the change in carbon concentration over time, where the rate of change is dependent on rates of production and consumption, and a loss term.
`C` (C)
`l_C` (L_C)

### Equations:
$\frac{dC}{dt} = \sum_{i} r_i C_i + \sum_{j} s_j C_j - l_C$

===== File: dissipationeq.F90 =====

### Variables:
$\epsilon$ (Epsilon)
$k$ (Kappa)
$P$ (Production)
$G$ (Generation)
${\cal D}_\epsilon$ (Turbulent Diffusion of Epsilon)
$c_{\epsilon 1}$ (Constant in Equation \eq{dissipation})
$c_{\epsilon 2}$ (Constant in Equation \eq{dissipation})
$c_{\epsilon 3}$ (Constant in Equation \eq{dissipation})
$\sigma_\epsilon$ (Schmidt number for epsilon)
${\cal P}$ (Production of Kappa)
${\cal G}$ (Generation of Kappa)
$B$ (Buoyancy Frequency)
${\cal D}_k$ (Turbulent Diffusion of Kappa)

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial \epsilon}{\partial t} = {\cal D}_\epsilon + \frac{\epsilon}{k}(c_{\epsilon 1}P+c_{\epsilon 3}G-c_{\epsilon 2}\epsilon)$
${\cal D}_\epsilon = -\frac{\nu_t}{\sigma_\epsilon} \frac{\partial \epsilon}{\partial z}$
${\cal P} = c_1 k \left( 2k \frac{\partial u_i}{\partial x_j} \frac{\partial u_i}{\partial x_j} - \frac{\partial u_k}{\partial x_i} \frac{\partial u_k}{\partial x_i} \right)$
${\cal G} = c_3 k B^2$
$\frac{\partial \epsilon}{\partial t} = \text{clip at } cde/sqrt(2)/galp * k * sqrt(NN)$

===== File: kissvec_mod.F90 =====

### Variables:

seed1 (s1), seed2 (s2), seed3 (s3), seed4 (s4) - integers

### Equations:
The integer length is passed to the C subroutine `kiss_rng` as an unsigned 32-bit integer (`c_int32_t`).

### Equations:
s1 = (1664525 * s1) mod 2^31
s2 = (1664525 * s2) mod 2^31

===== File: cime_driver.F90 =====

### Variables:
`beg_count` (BCNT)
`end_count` (ECNT)
`irtc_rate` (IRTR)
`cime_pre_init1_time` (CPPI1T)
`ESMF_Initialize_time` (ESMTI)
`cime_pre_init2_time` (CPCI2T)
`cime_pre_init2_time_adjustment` (CPCIA)
`cime_init_time_adjustment` (CIITA)

### Equations:
\(\text{BCNT} = \text{ECNT}\) - The start and end counts are related by their difference.
\(\text{CPPI1T} = (\text{ECNT} - \text{BCNT}) / \text{IRTR}\) - Calculate the time spent on `cime_pre_init1`.
\(\text{ESMTI} = (\text{ECNT} - \text{BCNT}) / \text{IRTR}\) - Calculate the time spent on `ESMF_Initialize`.
\(\text{CPCI2T} = (\text{ECNT} - \text{BCNT}) / \text{IRTR}\) - Calculate the time spent on `cime_pre_init2`.
\(\text{CIITA} = CPPI1T + ESMTI + CPCIA\) - Calculate the total initialization time for `cime_init`, adjusting for previously recorded times.

days_since_1jan4713bc = gregorian2julian_date(previous_day, previous_month, previous_year)
days_since_start = floor(seconds_since_previous_date / real(sec_per_day,kind=time_precision))
seconds_since_current_date = seconds_since_previous_date - (real(days_since_start,kind=time_precision) * real(sec_per_day,kind=time_precision))
gregorian2julian_day = day + sum(days_per_month(1:month-1))

===== File: timeinfoMod.F90 =====

### Variables:

`dayspyr_mod` (d)
`first`
`year_curr` (y_c)
`year_prev` (y_p)

`mon_prev` (m_p)

`thiscalday_mod` (c_d)
`nextsw_cday_mod` (n_s_c_d)
`end_cd_mod`
`doalb`

### Equations:
Δt = 3600. (Δt = 3600 s)
j_d = j_d + 1 ... if d_c > d_m(m_c) (j_d → j_d + 1, when day_curr exceeds days_per_mon(mon_curr))
c_d = 1.0_r8 + n_s(1.0/24.0_r8) (thiscalday_mod = 1.0_r8 + nstep_mod \* (1.0 / 24.0_r8))
n_s_c_d = mod((n_s/(d/Δt))*1.0_r8,d)+1._r8 ... if n_s > 1 (nextsw_cday_mod = MOD((nstep_mod / (86400.0_r8 / dtime_mod)) * 1.0_r8, d) + 1._r8, for nstep_mod ≠ 1)
s_c = mod(s_c + int(Δt), 86400) ... if s_c = 0 (secs_curr = MOD(secs_curr + INT(dtime_mod), 86400) when secs_curr equals 0)
d_c = d_c + 1 ... if s_c == 0 & d_c ≤ d_m(m_c) (day_curr = day_curr + 1, if new_day is true and day_curr does not exceed days_per_mon(mon_curr))
j_d = j_d + 1 ... if d_c > d_m(m_c) (jday_mod = jday_mod + 1 when day_curr exceeds days_per_mon(mon_curr))
m_c = m_c + 1 ... if d_c > d_m(m_c) & m_c ≤ 12 (mon_curr = mon_curr + 1, if new month and month is not December)
y_p = y_c ... if m_c ≥ 12 (year_prev = year_curr when month exceeds 12)
y_c = y_c + 1 ... if m_c ≥ 12 (year_curr = year_curr + 1 when month exceeds 12)

===== File: elmgridMod.F90 =====

### Variables:

nlevgrnd (N)
scalez (σ)
zsoi(j) (Z̅_n)
zisoi(j) (Z¯_n)
dzsoi(j) (ΔZ_n)

### Equations:
Z̅_n = σ \* (e^(0.5 \* (n - 0.5)) - 1) for n = 1 to N
ΔZ_n = 0.5 \* (Z̅_(n+1) + Z̅_n) for n = 1
ΔZ_n = 0.5 \* (Z̅_(n+1) - Z̅_(n-1)) for n = 2 to N-1
ΔZ_N = Z̅_N - Z̅_(N-1)
Z¯_0 = 0
Z¯_n = 0.5 \* (Z̅_n + Z̅_(n+1)) for n = 1 to N-1
Z¯_N = Z̅_N + 0.5 \* ΔZ_N

===== File: d2a3dijk.F90 =====

### Variables:

### Equations:
$\boxed{ua(i,j,k) = \frac{1}{2} (u(i,j,k) + unorth(i,k))}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy$ and $j=jlastxy$
$\boxed{ua(i,j,k) = \frac{1}{2}(u(i,j,k) + u(i,j+1,k))}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy$ and $j=jfirstxy:jlastxy-1$
$\boxed{veast(j,k) = v(ifirstxy,j,k)}$, where $k=km$ and $j=jfirstxy:jlastxy$
$\boxed{va(i,j,k) = \frac{1}{2}(v(i,j,k) + v(i+1,j,k))}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy-1$ and $j=jfirstxy:jlastxy$
$\boxed{va(ilastxy,j,k) = \frac{1}{2}(v(ilastxy,j,k) + veast(j,k))}$, where $k=km$ and $j=jfirstxy:jlastxy$
$\boxed{uvaglob(i,k,ik) = 0.0_r8}$, where $k=km$, $i=1:im$ and $ik=1:4$
$\boxed{uvaloc(i,k,ic) = ua(i,j,k)}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy$, $j=jfirstxy:jlastxy$ if $jfirstxy == 1$ and $ic=lbegin:lend$
$\boxed{uvaglob(i,k,ic) = uvaloc(i,k,ic)}$, where $k=km$, $i=1:im$, $ic=lbegin:lend$
$\boxed{uaglob(i) = -\frac{1}{im} \sum_{ik=1}^{imh} (uvaglob(i+imh,k,1)-uvaglob(i,k,1))*sinlon(i) + (uvaglob(i,k,2)-uvaglob(i+imh,k,2))*coslon(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$ and $k=km$
$\boxed{vaglob(i) = \frac{1}{im} \sum_{ik=1}^{imh} (uvaglob(i+imh,k,1)-uvaglob(i,k,1))*coslon(i) + (uvaglob(i,k,2)-uvaglob(i+imh,k,2))*sinlon(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$ and $k=km$
$\boxed{uaglob(i+imh) = -uaglob(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$
$\boxed{vaglob(i+imh) = -vaglob(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$
$\boxed{ua(i,1,k) = uaglob(i)}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy$ if $jfirstxy == 1$
$\boxed{va(i,1,k) = vaglob(i)}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy$ if $jfirstxy == 1$
$\boxed{un(k) = \frac{1}{im} \sum_{ik=1}^{imh} (uvaglob(i+imh,k,3)-uvaglob(i,k,3))*sinlon(i) + (uvaglob(i+imh,k,4)-uvaglob(i,k,4))*coslon(i)}$, where $k=km$
$\boxed{vn(k) = \frac{1}{im} \sum_{ik=1}^{imh} (uvaglob(i,k,3)-uvaglob(i+imh,k,3))*coslon(i) + (uvaglob(i+imh,k,4)-uvaglob(i,k,4))*sinlon(i)}$, where $k=km$
$\boxed{uaglob(i) = -un(k)*sinlon(i) + vn(k)*coslon(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$ and $k=km$
$\boxed{vaglob(i) = un(k)*coslon(i) + vn(k)*sinlon(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$ and $k=km$
$\boxed{uaglob(i+imh) = -uaglob(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$
$\boxed{vaglob(i+imh) = -vaglob(i)}$, where $i=1:imh$
$\boxed{ua(i,jm,k) = uaglob(i)}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy$ if $jlastxy == jm$
$\boxed{va(i,jm,k) = vaglob(i)}$, where $k=km$, $i=ifirstxy:ilastxy$ if $jlastxy == jm$

nrh (N_RH)

### Equations:
TSI = ∑(solar) (Equation 1)
f_i = solar / TSI (Equation 2)
l_b(i) = wavenum_low(i) (Equation 3)
h_b(i) = wavenum_high(i) (Equation 4)
b_mp(i) = 0.5 * (l_b(i) + h_b(i)) (Equation 5)
TSI = ∑(solar_i)
f_i = solar_i / (∑(solar_j))
l_b(i) = w_(low,i)
h_b(i) = w_(high,i)
b_mp(i) = 0.5 * (w_(low,i) + w_(high,i))

### Equations:
$ lsize = SparseMatrix_lsize(sMat) $
The local number of matrix elements is set to the value of $lsize$ in sMat.
$ gsize = SparseMatrix_nCols(sMat) $
The global size is set to the value of $nCols$ in sMat (note: this should be $nRows$, not $nCols$ for SparseMatrixToYGlobalSegMap_).
$ igCol = SparseMatrix_indexIA(sMat, 'gcol', dieWith=myname_) $
The index $igCol$ is set to the value of $indexIA$ in sMat for attribute 'gcol'.
$ gCol(i) = sMat%data%iAttr(igCol,i) $
For each element $i$, the value of $gCol(i)$ is set to the corresponding value of $iAttr$ in sMat, accessed through index $igCol$.
$ call ComputeSegments_(gCol, lsize, ngseg, starts, lengths) $
The subroutine ComputeSegments_ is called with arguments $gCol$, $lsize$, $ngseg$, and $starts$ and $lengths$, which are used to compute the segment information for the input list.
$ call GlobalSegMap_init(xGSMap, starts, lengths, root, comm, comp_id) $
The subroutine GlobalSegMap_init is called with arguments $xGSMap$, $starts$, $lengths$, and other parameters, which are used to initialize the output object $xGSMap$.
$ call List_clean(sort_keys) $
$ allocate(gCol(lsize), stat=ierr); if(ierr /= 0) call die(myname_,'allocate(gCol...',ierr) $
$ deallocate(gCol, starts, lengths, stat=ierr); if(ierr /= 0) call die(myname_,'deallocate(gCol...',ierr) $
$ allocate(gRow(lsize), stat=ierr); if(ierr /= 0) call die(myname_,'allocate(gRow...',ierr) $

### Equations:
$\tau_x = \tau_{x} + \tau_{xn} \alpha$
$\frac{\partial\tau_x}{\partial x}=\frac{\partial(\tau_x+\tau_{xn}\alpha)}{\partial x}$
$\tau_y = \tau_y + \tau_{yn} \alpha$
$\frac{\partial\tau_y}{\partial y}=\frac{\partial(\tau_y+\tau_{yn}\alpha)}{\partial y}$
Cdn_atm_ratio = Cdn_atm_ratio + &
$\frac{\partial Cdn\_atm\_ratio}{\partial x}=\frac{\partial (Cdn\_atm\_ratio+Cdn\_atm\_ratio\_n\alpha)}{\partial x}$
Q_sfc = Q_sfc_f*raicen
$Q_{sfc}=Q_{sfc_f}\frac{1}{\alpha}$
F_cond_top=F_cond\_top\_f \* raicen
F\_cond\_top=F\_cond\_top\_f \*\*raicen
E_lat=E_lat\_f\*raicen
E\_lat=E\_lat\_f\*raicen
H_sen = H_sen_f * raicen
H\_sen=H\_sen\_f\*raicen

===== File: Test_FixtureTestCase.F90 =====

### Variables:
`aSuite` (ASuite)
`newTestSuite` (NTS)
`newTestMethod` (NMT)
`REFLECT(method)` (Rm)
`testRunWithFixture` (TRWF)
`testBrokenTestCase` (TBT)
`testBrokenSetUpCase` (TBSC)
`aTest` (ATest)
`aTestResult` (ATR)
`newSerialContext` (NSC)
`fixtureTestCase` (FTC)
`brokenTestCase` (BTC)
`brokenSetUpCase` (BSC)
`serialContext` (SC)
`failureCount` (FC)

### Equations:
`aSuite = newTestSuite('Test_FixtureTestCase')`: ASuite = NTS('Test_FixtureTestCase')
`call aSuite%addTest(NMT('testRunWithFixture', TRWF))`: ASuite = ASuite + NMT('testRunWithFixture', TRWF)
`call aSuite%addTest(NMT('testBrokenTestCase', TBT))`: ASuite = ASuite + NMT('testBrokenTestCase', TBT)
`call aSuite%addTest(NMT('testBrokenSetUpCase', TBSC))`: ASuite = ASuite + NMT('testBrokenSetUpCase', TBSC)
`aTestResult = newTestResult()`: ATR = NTR
`aTest = newFixtureTestCase()`: ATest = NFC
`call aTest%setSurrogate()`:
FTC → FTC ⁽¹⁾ (FTC with surrogate)
`call test%setSurrogate()`: BTC → BTC ⁽²⁾ (BTC with surrogate) and BSC → BSC ⁽³⁾ (BSC with surrogate)
`aTest%run(ATR, NSC)`:
FTC ⁽¹⁾ + ATR + SC → FTC ⁽⁴⁾ (FTC after run)
`test%run(aTestResult, newSerialContext())`:
BTC ⁽²⁾ + ATR + SC → BTC ⁽⁵⁾ (BTC after run) and BSC ⁽³⁾ + ATR + SC → BSC ⁽⁶⁾ (BSC after run)
`call assertEqual('setUp run tearDown', aTest%runLog)`:
FTC ⁽⁴⁾ ≈ 'setUp run tearDown'
`call assertEqual('setUp broken run tearDown', test%runLog)`:
BTC ⁽⁵⁾ ≈ 'setUp broken run tearDown'
`call assertEqual('broken setUp', test%runLog)`:
BSC ⁽⁶⁾ ≈ 'broken setUp'
`FC = aTestResult%failureCount()`:
ATR → ATR ⁽¹⁾ (ATR with failure count) and FC = FCL (Failure Count of Log)
`FC = 1`:
FCL = 1

================================================================================

Precall_cen_sum (:,:,:,:,:,i)

Prain_cen_sum (:,:,i)
Qlsink_avg_cen_sum (:,:,:,:,:,i)

### Equations:
**Mass balance**: `Mass_bnd_final = Mass_bnd_sum` at all levels (z)
**Energy balance**: `Ent_bnd_sum = Area_cen_sum * rh_cen_sum` at all levels and transport classes
**Precipitation mass balance**: `Prain_cen_sum = Prainsum1 - Qrain_cen_sum` for all precipitating sub-classes
**Precipitation solid mass balance**: `Precsolid_cen_sum = Precsolidsum1 - Qsnow_cen_sum - Qgraup_cen_sum` for all precipitating sub-classes
**Precipitation latent heat balance**: `Qlsink_avg_cen_sum = Precr_cen_sum / (1.0 + Precallsum1)` for all transport classes and cloud sub-classes

===== File: phcs.F90 =====

### Variables:
p (Short Notation: P)
n (Short Notation: N)
m (Short Notation: M)
r (Short Notation: R)
x1 (Short Notation: X1 or SINPHI)
teta (Short Notation: TETA or COLAT)
p2 (Short Notation: P2)
q (Short Notation: Q)
twopmq (Short Notation: TPQ)
k (Short Notation: K)
an (Short Notation: AN)
cosfak (Short Notation: CFSK or COSFK)
sinfak (Short Notation: SFKS or SINFK)
costet (Short Notation: CST)
sintet (Short Notation: SST)
xtemp (Short Notation: P or H or TEMP)

### Equations:
$\frac{d}{dx}P_N(x) = -\left(1-x^2\right)^{0.5} \frac{d}{dx} P_{N-1}(x)$
$P_N(x) = \frac{1}{N!}\left(\frac{x^2-1}{x}\right)^{\frac{N}{2}} \sum_{k=1}^{N} (-1)^k \binom{N-k+1/2}{N/2} \left(\frac{x^2-1}{x^2}\right)^{\frac{k}{2}}$
$\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}\left[\frac{(n+m)!}{(n+2m-1)(n+2m)!(n-m)!}(x)^{n+2m}\right] = \frac{n!}{\sqrt{(2n+1)\pi}}\cos(m\arccos(x))$
$\frac{d}{dx}\left[\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}\left[\frac{(n+m)!}{(n+2m-1)(n+2m)!(n-m)!}(x)^{n+2m}\right]\right] = \frac{d}{dx}\left[\frac{n!}{\sqrt{(2n+1)\pi}}\cos(m\arccos(x))\right]$
$\frac{d}{dx}H_N(x) = -\left(1-x^2\right)^{-0.5}\left[(N+1)(1-x^2)^{0.5}P_{N+1}(x) + \frac{(2N+1)x}{1-x^2}P_{N-1}(x)\right]$
$\frac{d^2}{dx^2}P_N(x) = -\left(\frac{N(N+1)}{(x^2-1)^2}\right)P_{N}(x)$
$P_m^N(x) = (-1)^{m-N}\frac{(N+m)!}{(N-m)!} \frac{(x^2-1)^{\frac{-N+m}{2}}}{\sqrt{(2N+1)(N+m)(N-m)}} P_N^{m}(x)$
$\sum_{i=0}^{\infty}\left[\frac{(N+i)!}{(2N+2i)(N-i)!}(x)^{N+2i}\right] = \frac{(N+1)!}{\sqrt{(2N+1)}} \frac{P_N(x)}{(x^2-1)^{\frac{N}{2}}}$
VariableName (Short Notation)
ix         (ix)
x1         (x1)
pmn        (pmn)
hmn        (hmn)
jmax       (jmax)
nmax       (nmax)
n          (n)
m          (m)
ml         (ml)
p          (p)
k          (k)
q          (q)
teta       (teta)
xx1        (xx1)
xte        (xte)
an         (an)
sinpar     (sinpar)
cospar     (cospar)
p2         (p2)
sqp        (sqp)
cosfak     (cosexp)
sinfak     (sinep)
ateta      (atetap)
costet     (costep)
sintet     (sinsep)

### Equations:
Equation in standard mathematical format (use subscript and superscript)
P0n = an * cospar (1)
P1n = an * sinpar (2)
hmn(n) = (n-1)*(xx1*xtemp(1,n)-(n2m1/n2m3)**0.5_r16*xtemp(1,n-1)) (3)
hmn(n+jmax) = n*xx1*xtemp(2,n)-(n2p1nnm1/n2m1)**0.5_r16*xtemp(2,n-1) (4)
xtemp(3,j) = cmn*xtemp(1,j) - xx1*(xdmn*xtemp(1,j+1)-emn*xtemp(3,j-1)) (5)
pmn(mto) = xtemp(3,j) (6)
hmn(mto) = (r+t)*xx1*xtemp(3,j) - (wt*(q+1._r16)/wm2)**0.5_r16*xtemp(3,j-1) (7)

===== File: calcfull.f90 =====

### Variables:

`j` (Index)

`nmon` (Number of Months)

`mon1rd`, `mon1` (Months)
`iyrnrd`, `iyrn` (Years)
`monnrd`, `monn` (Months)
`maxiter` (Maximum Number of Iterations)
`tmin` (Minimum Temperature)
`tmax` (Maximum Temperature)
`dt` (Temperature Difference)
`conv` (Convergence Threshold)
`bbmin` (Base Minimum Temperature)
`obsclim(i,j,mm)` (Observed Climate Data)
`arr(i,n)` (Array of Calculated Values)
`centmon(i,j,mm)` (Centroid Monthly Data)
`a(nmon)` (Coefficients)
`c(nmon)` (Coefficients)
`correl(mm)` (Correlation Coefficients)
`vecin(nmon)` (Intermediate Vector)
`vecout(nmon)` (Intermediate Vector)

### Equations:
$\boxed{\text{tt} = \text{arr}(i,\text{nprior}+1) \times \text{cc}}$  (TT Calculation)
$i$: Index of longitude
$nprior$: Number of prior months
$cc$: Correlation coefficient
$\boxed{\text{tt} = \min(\max(\text{obsclim}(i,j,\text{mm}) + \text{tt}, \text{tmin}), \text{tmax})}$  (Temperature Adjustment)
$i$: Index of longitude
$j$: Index of latitude
$\text{mm}$: Month index
$\boxed{\text{arr}(i,m) = \text{tt}}$  (Update array with calculated values)
$i$: Index of longitude
$m$: Month index
$\boxed{\text{vecin}(n) = \text{arr}(i,n) + \text{obsclim}(i,j,\text{mm})}$  (Intermediate vector calculation)
$n$: Month index
$i$: Index of longitude
$j$: Index of latitude
$\text{mm}$: Month index
$\boxed{\text{vecout}(n) = \text{vecin}(n)}$  (Intermediate vector copy)
$n$: Month index
$\boxed{\text{arr}(i,n) = \text{vecout}(n) - \text{centmon}(i,j,\text{mm})}$  (Update array with calculated values)
$i$: Index of longitude
$n$: Month index
$j$: Index of latitude
$\text{mm}$: Month index

===== File: shr_timer_mod.F90 =====

### Variables:
n (i)
stat_free (i)
stat_inuse (i)
stat_started (i)
stat_stopped (i)
max_timers (i)
status (array of i)
cycles1 (array of i or 8)
cycles2 (array of i or 8)
cycles_max (i)
name (array of a)
dt (array of r)
calls (array of i)
clock_rate (r)

### Equations:
clock_rate = \frac{1}{\text{cycles}} - Equation 1
dt(n) = dt(n) + \text{clock\_rate} * (\text{cycles2}(n) - \text{cycles1}(n)) \quad\text{or}\quad dt(n) = dt(n) + \text{clock\_rate} * (cycles\_max + \text{cycles2}(n) - \text{cycles1}(n))  - Equation 2
cycles2(n) = \text{system\_clock()}(count=cycles2(n)) - Equation 3
cycles1(n) = \text{system\_clock()}(count=cycles1(n)) - Equation 4

===== File: extpressure.F90 =====

### Variables:
$u$ (U)
$v$ (V)
$h$ (H)
$dpdx$ (Dpdx)
$dpdy$ (Dpdy)
$h\_press$ (Hp)
$z$ (Z)
$i$ (I)
$rat$ (Rat)
$uint$ (Uint)
$vint$ (Vint)
$hint$ (Hint)

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} = \frac{u_{n+1} - u_n}{z_{n+1} - z_n}\cdot dpdx + \left( 1 - \frac{u_{n+1} - u_n}{z_{n+1} - z_n} \right)\cdot (dpdx - \frac{\bar{u}}{h})$ $\hspace{25mm}$ [Equation 1]
$\frac{\partial v}{\partial x} = \frac{v_{n+1} - v_n}{z_{n+1} - z_n}\cdot dpdy + \left( 1 - \frac{v_{n+1} - v_n}{z_{n+1} - z_n} \right)\cdot (dpdy - \frac{\bar{v}}{h})$ $\hspace{25mm}$ [Equation 2]
$u = u + dpdx - \frac{\overline{u}}{h}$ $\hspace{40mm}$ [Equation 3]
$v = v + dpdy - \frac{\overline{v}}{h}$ $\hspace{40mm}$ [Equation 4]
$\bar{u} = \frac{1}{\sum h_i}\cdot \sum h_i u_i$ $\hspace{30mm}$ [Equation 5]
$\bar{v} = \frac{1}{\sum h_i}\cdot \sum h_i v_i$ $\hspace{30mm}$ [Equation 6]

### Variables:

### Equations:
$\tau_{sampled} = \text{merge}(\tau, 0.0, cloud\_mask)$
$ssa_{sampled} = \text{merge}(ssa, 0.0, cloud\_mask)$
$g_{sampled} = \text{merge}(g, 0.0, cloud\_mask)$
VariableName (Short Notation)
`ncol` (NCOL)
`nlay` (NLAY)
`ngpt` (NGPT)
`icol` (ICOL)
`ilay` (ILAY)
`ibnd` (IBND)
`igpt` (IGPT)
`rho` (RHO)
`tau` (TAU)
`ssa` (SSA)
`g` (G)
`cloud_frac` (CF)
`overlap_param` (OP)
Cloud Fraction (CF)
Overlap Parameter (OP)
Optical Depth (TAU)
Single Scattering Albedo (SSA)
Extinction Coefficient (G)
Correlation Coefficient (RHO)
Number of Columns (NCOL)
Number of Layers (NLAY)
Number of G-points (NGPT)

### Equations:
`cloud_mask(icol,ilay,igpt) = local_rands(1:ngpt) > (1._wp - cloud_frac(icol,ilay))`
`rho = overlap_param(icol,ilay-1)`
`local_rands(1:ngpt) =  rho*(local_rands(1:ngpt)      -0.5_wp) + &
`cloud_mask(icol,ilay,1:ngpt) = local_rands(1:ngpt) > (1._wp - cloud_frac(icol,ilay))`
`sampled_field(1:ncol,ilay,igpt) = merge(input_field(1:ncol,ilay,ibnd), 0._wp, cloud_mask(1:ncol,ilay,igpt))`
ncol (Number of columns)
nlay (Number of layers)
ngpt (Number of g-points)
nbnd (Number of bands)
icol (Column index)
ilay (Layer index)
igpt (G-point index)
ibnd (Band index)
i (Index, general purpose)
j (Index, general purpose)
rho (Correlation coefficient)

### Equations:
tau ≈ 0 (for homogeneous field)
ssa ≈ 0 (for homogeneous field)
g ≈ 0 (for homogeneous field)
ρ = -1 ≤ overlap_param(i) ≤ 1 (overlap parameter range)
local_rands(igpt) =  ρ(local_rands(igpt)      -0.5_wp) + sqrt(1._wp-rho*rho)*(randoms(igpt,i,j) - 0.5_wp) + 0.5_wp (correlated random deviates)
cloud_mask(ic,ilay,igpt) = local_rands(igpt) > (1._wp - cloud_frac(ic,ilay)) (sampling rule for maximum-random overlap)
cloud_mask(ic,ilay,igpt) = local_rands(igpt) > (1._wp - cloud_frac(ic,ilay)) (sampling rule for exponential-random overlap)

### Equations:
**CDN**(iunit) = **CDN**(iunit) - **SNI**(iunit) (1)
**SI**(iunit) = **GWShareIrrig**(iunit)***WDI**(iunit) + **Supply**(iunit) - **SNI**(iunit) (2)
**RNI**(iunit) = 0.0_r8 (3)
**CDI**(iunit) = **CDI**(iunit) - **SI**(iunit) (4)
**WDI**(iunit) = **WDI**(iunit) - **Supply**(iunit) + **SNI**(iunit) (5)
**D**(iunit) > 0.0_r8 and **SI**(iunit) > 0.0_r8:
**WDN**(iunit) > 0.0_r8 and **SNI**(iunit) > 0.0_r8:
**SI**(iunit) = **SI**(iunit) + ( **Supply**(iunit) - **SNI**(iunit) ) (8)
**WDN**(iunit) > 0.0_r8:
**Trunoff%qsub**(iunit, nt_nliq) =  **Trunoff%qsub**(iunit, nt_nliq) + temp (10)

### Equations:
CDN = CDN - SNI
D > 0.0_r8 and SI > 0.0_r8:
D(iu) > 0.0_r8:
SNI' = FNI * WDN
RI = RI + FIRR * (WDI - CDN)
SNI = SNI + SNI'
SI = SI + S
D(iu) > 0.0_r8:
RNI = FNIR * WDN
RI = RI + FIRR * (WDI - CDN)
RNI = RNI + FNIR * WDN
SI = S
RNI = FNIR * (WDN - CDN)
SI = S + SI
Trunoff%wr(iunit,nt_nliq) = 0.5 * (Trunoff%wr(iunit,nt_nliq) - (StorWater%ReturnNonIrrig(iunit)/Tctl%DATAH))
Trunoff%wr(iunit,nt_nliq) = 0.5 * (Trunoff%wr(iunit,nt_nliq) + (StorWater%ReturnNonIrrig(iunit)/Tctl%DATAH))

### Equations:
Equation in standard mathematical format
RIRR(iunit) = 0
SIRR(iunit) = 0
RNIR(iunit) = 0
SNIR(iunit) = 0
QSUB(iunit,nt_nliq) = StorWater%ReturnIrrig(iunit)/(TUnit%area(iunit)*TUnit%frac(iunit)*Tctl%DATAH)
QSUB(iunit,nt_nliq) = Trunoff%wr(iunit,nt_nliq) + StorWater%ReturnNonIrrig(iunit)/Tctl%DATAH
RIRR(iunit) = StorWater%GWShareIrrig(iunit)*(StorWater%WithDemIrrig(iunit)-StorWater%ConDemIrrig(iunit))
RNIR(iunit) = StorWater%GWShareNonIrrig(iunit)*(StorWater%WithDemNonIrrig(iunit)-StorWater%ConDemNonIrrig(iunit))
SIRR(iunit) = StorWater%GWShareIrrig(iunit)*StorWater%WithDemIrrig(iunit)
SNIR(iunit) = StorWater%GWShareNonIrrig(iunit)*StorWater%WithDemNonIrrig(iunit)
StorWater%SuppIrrig(iunit) = (StorWater%supply(iunit)-StorWater%SuppNonIrrig(iunit))
StorWater%WithDemIrrig(iunit) = (StorWater%WithDemIrrig(iunit)-tempfloatI)
StorWater%ConDemNonIrrig(iunit) = (StorWater%ConDemNonIrrig(iunit)-StorWater%SuppNonIrrig(iunit))
StorWater%ReturnIrrig(iunit)= (firr * (StorWater%WithDemIrrig(iunit)-StorWater%ConDemIrrig(iunit)))
StorWater%SuppNonIrrig(iunit)= (fnonirr*StorWater%WithDemNonIrrig(iunit))
StorWater%ReturnNonIrrig(iunit)= (firr * (StorWater%WithDemIrrig(iunit)-StorWater%ConDemIrrig(iunit)))
Trunoff%qsub(iunit,nt_nliq)= (Trunoff%qsub(iunit,nt_nliq)+temp)
Trunoff%wr(iunit,nt_nliq)= (Trunoff%wr(iunit,nt_nliq)+StorWater%ReturnNonIrrig(iunit)/Tctl%DATAH)

$Q_I = 0$
$R_{IRRIG} = 0$
$S_{IRRIG} = 0$
$R_{NIRRG} = 0$
$S_{NIRRG} = 0$
$C_{IRRIG} = 0$
$C_{NIRRG} = 0$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ then } C_{NIRRG}(i) \leftarrow C_{NIRRG}(i) - S_{NIRRG}(i)$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ then } R_{IRRIG} (i) = g_i(i) \cdot (W_D_I(i) - C_{IRRIG} (i))$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ then } S_{NIRRG} (i) = g_ni(i) \cdot (W_D_NI (i) - C_{NIRRG} (i))$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ and } ( W_D_I(i) > 0 ) \text{ then } R_{IRRIG}(i) = R_{IRRIG}(i) + F_i \cdot (W_D_I (i) - C_{IRRIG} (i))$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ and } ( W_D_NI(i) > 0 ) \text{ then } R_{NIRRG}(i) = R_{NIRRG}(i) + F_ni \cdot (W_D_NI (i) - C_{NIRRG} (i))$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ then } S_{IRRIG}(i) = g_i(i) \cdot W_D_I (i)$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ then } S_{NIRRG}(i) = g_ni(i) \cdot W_D_NI (i)$
$Q = -q_eout + R_{NIRRG} / Δt$
$q_wrt = q_wrt + R_{NIRRG} / Δt$
$\text{if }( \text{TDF}_\text{flag} > 0 ) \text{ then } S_{IRRIG}(i) = S_{IRRIG}(i) + W_S (i)$
$T_Q(i) = T_Q(i) + Q / A(i)$

===== File: omcalc.F90 =====

### Variables:
rcoslat (1/cos(lat))
d (divergence)
u (zonal wind * cos(lat))
v (meridional wind * cos(lat))
dpsl (longitudinal component of grad ln(ps))
dpsm (latitudinal component of grad ln(ps))
pmid (mid-level pressures)
pdel (layer thicknesses (pressure))

omga (vertical pressure velocity)
i (longitude index)
k (level index)

u_i (single column of zonal wind * cos(lat))
v_i (single column of meridional wind * cos(lat))
pmid_i (single column of mid-level pressures)
pdel_i (single column of layer thicknesses (pressure))
rpmid_i (single column of 1./pmid)
omga_i (single column of vertical pressure velocity)
hkk (diagonal element of hydrostatic matrix)
hlk (super diagonal element)
suml (partial sum over l = (1, k-1))
vgpk (v dot grad ps)
tmp (vector temporary)

### Equations:
∂ω/∂p = -0.5 * 1/pmid * d * Δp
ω(p) = (∂ω/∂p) * pmid
∂ω/∂t = -0.5 * 1/pmid * d * Δp + v * grad(lnps)
suml = ∑[d * Δp]
∂ω/∂t = ∂ω/∂p * pmid + (v * grad(lnps)) / pmid
ω(p) = (∂ω/∂t) * pmid

### Equations:
$\frac{q_{flx}(i,1) - \left( q_{min}(1) - q_{bot}(i,1) \right)}{ztodt\cdot gravit \cdot srfrpdel(i)} = excess(i)$
$\frac{excess(i)}{latvap} + lhflx(i) = \left( \frac{excess(i)}{latvap} - lhflx(i) \right)_{new}$
$\left( \frac{-excess(i)}{latvap} + shflx(i) \right)_{new} = \left( \frac{-excess(i)}{latvap} + shflx(i) \right)$
$\left( q_{flx}(i,1) - excess(i) \right)_{new} = q_{flx}(i,1) - excess(i)$

### Equations:
$\text{displace}(i) = \frac{\text{dof}(\text{mod}(i \cdot \text{lenblocks}, n)) - 1}{\text{lenblocks}}$
$\text{bsize} = \gcd(\text{arr}_1, \ldots, \text{arr}_n)$
$x_{i+1} - x_i = 0$ for all $i$
$\text{bsizeg} = \gcd(\text{gaps})$
$\text{displace}(i) = \frac{\text{gindex}}{\text{lenblock}}$
$x_{a+1} - x_b = 0$ for some $a, b$ where $\gcd(a, b) > 1$

### Equations:
`kmax(icrm)=0`
K = 0
`kmin(icrm)=nzm+1`
K = nzm + 1
`if(qcl(icrm,i,j,k)+qci(icrm,i,j,k).gt.0.D0.and.tabs(icrm,i,j,k).lt.273.15D0) then`
no equation, conditional statement
`kmin(icrm) = min(kmin(icrm),k)`
Kmin(Icrm) = min(Kmin(Icrm),K)
`kmax(icrm) = max(kmax(icrm),k)`
Kmax(Icrm) = max(Kmax(Icrm),K)
`qifall(icrm,k) = 0.D0`
Qifall(Icrm,K) = 0
`tlatqi(icrm,k) = 0.D0`
Tlatqi(Icrm,K) = 0
`fz(icrm,i,j,k) = 0.D0`
F(Icrm,I,J,K) = 0
`coef = dtn/(0.5D0*(adz(icrm,kb)+adz(icrm,k))*dz(icrm))`
α = Δt / (0.5 \* (ΔZ(KB) + ΔZ(K)) \* ΔZ)
`qiu = rho(icrm,kc)*qci(icrm,i,j,kc)`
Qiu = ρ(ICRM,KC) \* Qi(ICRM,I,J,KC)
`qic = rho(icrm,k) * qci(icrm,i,j,k)`
Qic = ρ(ICRM,K) \* Qi(ICRM,I,J,K)
`qid = rho(icrm,kb)*qci(icrm,i,j,kb)`
Qid = ρ(ICRM,KB) \* Qi(ICRM,I,J,KB)
`vt_ice = min(real(0.4D0,crm_rknd),8.66D0*(max(real(0.,crm_rknd),qic)+1.D-10)**0.24D0)`
Vt_Ice = min(0.4, 8.66 \* (Qic + 10^(-10))^(0.24))
`tmp_phi = max(real(0.,crm_rknd),min(0.5D0*(1.+tmp_theta),real(2.D0,crm_rknd),2.D0*tmp_theta))`
Φ = max(0, min(0.5 \* (1 + Θ), 2, 2 \* Θ))
`fz(icrm,i,j,k) = -vt_ice*(qic - 0.5D0*(1.D0-coef*vt_ice)*tmp_phi*(qic-qid))`
F(Icrm,I,J,K) = -Vt_Ice \* (Qic - 0.5 \* α \* Vt_Ice \* Φ \* (Qic - Qid))
`coef=dtn/dz(icrm)`
α = Δt / ΔZ(ICRM)
`dqi=coef*(fz(icrm,i,j,k)-fz(icrm,i,j,k+1))`
ΔQi = α \* (F(ICRM,I,J,K) - F(ICRM,I,J,K+1))
`micro_field(icrm,i,j,k,ici)  = micro_field(icrm,i,j,k,ici)  + dqi`
Micro(Icrm,I,J,K,Ici) += ΔQi
`qifall(icrm,k) = qifall(icrm,k) + dqi`
Qifall(Icrm,K) += ΔQi
`lat_heat  = (fac_cond+fac_fus)*dqi`
LH = (FC + FF) \* ΔQi
`t(icrm,i,j,k)  = t(icrm,i,j,k)  - lat_heat`
T(ICRM,I,J,K) -= LH
`tlatqi(icrm,k) = tlatqi(icrm,k) - lat_heat`
Tlatqi(Icrm,K) -= LH

===== File: p3e.f90 =====

### Variables:
NPOS (N_pos)
NVAR (N_var)
NDof (N_dof)
DELX (Δx)
FDAT (f_data)
BCLO (B_clo)
BCHI (B_chi)
EDGE (e_value)
DFDX (e_slope)
OPTS (options)
DMIN (min_grid_spacing)

### Equations:
e_value(ivar, ipos) = (-1.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos-2) + 7.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos-1) + 7.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos+0) - 1.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos+1)) / 12.d0 ( EDGE[iVar] = (-1) \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos-2] + 7 \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos-1] + 7 \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos+0] - 1 \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos+1]) / 12 )
e_slope(ivar, ipos) = (1.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos-2) - 15.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos-1) + 15.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos+0) - 1.d0 * fdat(1, ivar, ipos+1)) / 12.d0 ( e_slope[iVar] = 1 \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos-2] - 15 \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos-1] + 15 \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos+0] - 1 \* F_DAT[ivar][ipos+1]) / 12 )
e_slope(ivar, ipos) = e_slope(ivar, ipos) / delx(+1) ( e_slope[iVar] = e_slope[iVar] / ΔX[ipos+1] )
xhat = 0.5d0 * max(delh(-1), dmin) + 0.5d0 * max(delh(+0), dmin) ( X_HAT = 0.5 \* MAX(ΔH[-1], d_min) + 0.5 \* MAX(ΔH[0], d_min) )
xmap(idof) = -(delh(-2) + delh(-1)) / xhat ( X_MAP[Idof] = - (ΔH[-2] + ΔH[-1]) / X_HAT ) for idof = -2
xmap(idof) = -delh(-1) / xhat ( X_MAP[Idof] = - ΔH[-1] / X_HAT ) for idof = -1
xmap(idof) = 0.d0 ( X_MAP[Idof] = 0 )
xmap(idof) = delh(+0) / xhat ( X_MAP[Idof] = ΔH[0] / X_HAT ) for idof = +1
xmap(idof) = (delh(+0) + delh(+1)) / xhat ( X_MAP[Idof] = (ΔH[0] + ΔH[1]) / X_HAT ) for idof = +2
ivec(1, idof) = xmap(idof) ** 1 / 1.0d+0 ( IVEC[1][Idof] = X_MAP[Idof] ^ 1 / 1 )
ivec(2, idof) = xmap(idof) ** 2 / 2.0d+0 ( IVEC[2][Idof] = X_MAP[Idof] ^ 2 / 2 )
ivec(3, idof) = xmap(idof) ** 3 / 3.0d+0 ( IVEC[3][Idof] = X_MAP[Idof] ^ 3 / 3 )
ivec(4, idof) = xmap(idof) ** 4 / 4.0d+0 ( IVEC[4][Idof] = X_MAP[Idof] ^ 4 / 4 )
cmat(1, idof) = ivec(idof,-1) - ivec(idof,-2) ( CMAT[1][Idof] = IVEC[Idof][-1] - IVEC[Idof][-2] ) for idof = +1
cmat(2, idof) = ivec(idof,+0) - ivec(idof,-1) ( CMAT[2][Idof] = IVEC[Idof][+0] - IVEC[Idof][-1] ) for idof = +2
cmat(3, idof) = ivec(idof,+1) - ivec(idof,+0) ( CMAT[3][Idof] = IVEC[Idof][+1] - IVEC[Idof][+0] ) for idof = +3
cmat(4, idof) = ivec(idof,+2) - ivec(idof,+1) ( CMAT[4][Idof] = IVEC[Idof][+2] - IVEC[Idof][+1] ) for idof = +4
fhat(+1,ivar) = delx(ipos-2) * fdat(+1,ivar,ipos-2) / xhat ( F_HAT[+1][Ivar] = ΔX[ipos-2] \* F_DATA [+1][Ivar][ipos-2] / X_HAT )
fhat(+2,ivar) = delx(ipos-1) * fdat(+1,ivar,ipos-1) / xhat ( F_HAT[+2][Ivar] = ΔX[ipos-1] \* F_DATA [+1][Ivar][ipos-1] / X_HAT )
fhat(+3,ivar) = delx(ipos+0) * fdat(+1,ivar,ipos+0) / xhat ( F_HAT[+3][Ivar] = ΔX[ipos+0] \* F_DATA [+1][Ivar][ipos+0] / X_HAT )
fhat(+4,ivar) = delx(ipos+1) * fdat(+1,ivar,ipos+1) / xhat ( F_HAT[+4][Ivar] = ΔX[ipos+1] \* F_DATA [+1][Ivar][ipos+1] / X_HAT )
edge(ivar, ipos) = fhat(1, ivar) ( EDGE[Ivar][Ipso] = F_HAT[1][Ivar] )
dfdx(ivar, ipos) = fhat(2, ivar) / xhat ( DFDX[Ivar][Ipso] = F_HAT[2][Ivar] / X_HAT )

### Equations:
$$\text{invariants}(\text{k,m}_\text{ndx}) = \frac{\text{Pa}_\text{x}\text{fac} \cdot \text{pmid}(\text{ncol},\text{k})}{\text{boltz}_\text{cgs} \cdot \text{tfld}(\text{ncol},\text{k})}$$
Where k is the vertical layer index, m_ndx is the index for molecular density, Pa_xfac is the factor to convert Pascals to Dynes/cm^2, pmid is the pressure field, boltz_cgs is the Boltzmann constant in CGS units, and tfld is the temperature field.
$$\text{invariants}(\text{k,n}_\text{2 ndx}) = \begin{cases}
Where k is the vertical layer index, n2_ndx is the index for N2 density, has_var_o2 is a flag indicating whether the variable O2 exists, and vmr is the VMR field.
$$\text{invariants}(\text{k,o}_\text{2 ndx}) = 0.21 \cdot \text{invariants}(\text{k,m}_\text{ndx}),$$
Where k is the vertical layer index, o2_ndx is the index for O2 density, and m_ndx is the index for molecular density.
$$\text{invariants}(\text{k,h}_\text{2o ndx}) = \text{h2ovmr}(\text{ncol},\text{k}) \cdot \text{invariants}(\text{k,m}_\text{ndx}),$$
Where k is the vertical layer index, h2o_ndx is the index for H2O density, and h2ovmr is the water vapor VMR field.
$$\text{cnst\_offline}(\text{ncol},\text{k}) = \text{get\_cnst\_data}(\text{tracer\_cnst\_flds}(i), \text{cnst\_offline}),$$
Where ncol is the column count, k is the vertical layer index, i is the tracer index, and get_cnst_data is a function that retrieves data from the physics buffer.
$$\text{invariants}(\text{k,i ndx}) = \text{cnst\_offline}(\text{ncol},\text{k}) \cdot \text{invariants}(\text{k,m}_\text{ndx}),$$
Where k is the vertical layer index, i_ndx is the index for tracer i density, cnst_offline is the data retrieved from the physics buffer, and m_ndx is the index for molecular density.

### Variables:

### Equations:
\( Dp = R - P \)
\( PM = P + 0.2Dp \)
\( Dt = Dp \cdot ADTG \)
\( Q1 = Dt \)
\( TARG = T + 0.2Dt \)
\( Q2 = Dt - (TARG - T)q1 \)
\( DT3 = Dp \cdot ADTG(TARG, S, PM) \)
\( Q3 = DT3 - (TARG - T)Q2 \)
\( POTEMP = TARG + 0.05(DT3 - c_2 Q3) \)
\( ADTG(s, t, p) = a000 + t(a001 + t(a002 + t a003)) + (s - 35)(a010 + t a011) + p(a100 + t(a101 + t(a102 + t a103))) + p^2(a200 + t(a201 + t a202)) \)
\( c_1 = 0.0174533 \)
\( c_2 = 288.958 \)
\( c_3 = -0.0000014 \)
\( p_5 = 0.2 \)

### Equations:
$rrho = \frac{rair \times t}{pmid}$
$ustar = max\left(\sqrt{\sqrt{taux^2 + tauy^2} \times rrho}, ustar_min\right)$

$kqfs = qflx \times rrho$
$kbfs = khfs + zvir \times ths \times kqfs$
$obklen = -thvs \times ustar^3 / (g \times vk \times (kbfs + sign(1.e-10_r8,kbfs)))$
$virtem = t \times (1.0_r8 + zvir \times q)$

### Equations:
\(\frac{\partial}{\partial t}q = \frac{ptend\%q(icol,k,1)}{ztodt}\) (PTENDQ_RATE)
\(\frac{\partial}{\partial t}cldliq = \frac{ptend\%q(icol,k,2)}{ztodt}\) (PTENDC_RATE)
\(k_{mx} = 0\) where \(ptend\%q(icol,k,1) \ge qtmx\) and \(kmn = k\) where \(ptend\%q(icol,k,1) \le qtmn\) (KMX_KMN)
\(lhflx\_res(icol) = lhflx(icol) - cam\_in \%lhf(icol)\) (LHFRES_DIFF)
\(shflx\_res(icol) = shflx(icol) - cam\_in \%shf(icol)\) (SHFRES_DIFF)
\(taux\_res(icol) = taux(icol) - cam\_in \%wsx(icol)\) (TAUXRES_DIFF)
\(tauy\_res(icol) = tauy(icol) - cam\_in \%wsy(icol)\) (TAUYRES_DIFF)
\(qflx\_res(icol) = qflx(icol) - cam\_in \%cflx(icol,1)\) (QFLXRES_DIFF)
\(\frac{lhf}{srfflx\%lhf(icol)}\) where \(lhflx\_res(icol) / srfflx\%lhf(icol)\) (LHFRES_RATIO)
\(\frac{shf}{srfflx\%shf(icol)}\) where \(shflx\_res(icol) / srfflx\%shf(icol)\) (SHFRES_RATIO)
\(\frac{taux}{srfflx \%wsx(icol)}\) where \(taux\_res(icol) / srfflx\%wsx(icol)\) (TAUXRES_RATIO)
\(\frac{tauy}{srfflx \%wsy(icol)}\) where \(tauy\_res(icol) / srfflx\%wsy(icol)\) (TAUYRES_RATIO)
\(\frac{qflx}{srfflx \%cflx(icol,1)}\) where \(qflx\_res(icol) / srfflx\%cflx(icol,1)\) (QFLXRES_RATIO)

### Variables:

### Equations:
a (A)
anorm (Anorm)
b (B)
c (C)
f (F)
g (G)
h (H)
i (I)
j (J)
k (K)
l (L)
m (M)
nm (N)
n (N)
np (NP)
r (R)
rv1 (RV1)
s (S)
tmp (TMP)
u (U)
v (V)
w (W)
x (X)
y (Y)
z (Z)

### Equations:
f = s*rv1(i)
 F = S*RV1(I)
g = w(i)
 G = W(I)
h = sqrt(f*f + g*g)
 H = √(F^2 + G^2)
c = (g*h)
 C = (G*H)
s = -(f*h)
 S = -(F*H)
a(j,nm) = (y*c) + (z*s)
 A(J,NM) = (Y*C) + (Z*S)
a(j,i) = -(y*s) + (z*c)
 A(J,I) = -(Y*S) + (Z*C)
g = sqrt( f*f + 1.0_r8 )
 G = √( F^2 + 1 )
f = ((x - z)*(x + z) + h*((y/(f + sign(g,f))) - h))/x
 F = ((X - Z)*(X + Z) + H*(Y/(F + SIGN(G,F)) - H))/X
c = f/z
 C = F/Z
s = h/z
 S = H/Z
s = s + u(i,j)*b(i)
 S = Σ U(I,J)*B(I)
x(j) = s
 X(J) = S
tmp(j) = s/w(j)
 TMP(J) = S/W(J)
s = s + v(j,jj)*tmp(jj)
 S = Σ V(J, JJ)*TMP(JJ)
a(i,k) = (y*c)+(z*s)
 A(I,K) = (Y*C) + (Z*S)
a(k,i) = -(y*s)+(z*c)
 A(K,I) = -(Y*S) + (Z*C)

y_(1) = a0 + a1 * x_(1)^1 + a2 * x_(1)^2 + a3 * x_(1)^3
y_(2) = a0 + a1 * x_(2)^1 + a2 * x_(2)^2 + a3 * x_(2)^3
(y_(1)-y0_) / (x_(1)-x0_) = a1 + 2 * a2 * x_(1)^1 + 3 * a3 * x_(1)^2
(y_(2)-y_(1)) / (x_(2)-x_(1)) = a1 + 2 * a2 * x_(2)^1 + 3 * a3 * x_(2)^2
(y_(2)-y_(1)) / (x_(2)-x_(1)) = a1 + 2 * a2 * x_(2)^1 + 3 * a3 * x_(2)^2
a0 + a1 * x_(1)^1 + a2 * x_(1)^2 + a3 * x_(1)^3 = y_(1)
a0 + a1 * x_(2)^1 + a2 * x_(2)^2 + a3 * x_(2)^3 = y_(2)
fprime = 3 * a3 * x_n^2 + 2 * a2 * x_n^1 + a1
det_ = -(x_(2) - x_(1))^3
y0_ = a0 + a1 * x0_^1 + a2 * x0_^2 + a3 * x0_^3

### Equations:
ptemp = pt / (1 + zvir*q3) * pexf (standard mathematical format: T = Th / (1 + rv*h))
pm = 0.5 * (pe(i,k,j) + pe(i,k+1,j)) (standard mathematical format: m = (p_i + p_{i+1})/2)
ptg = (ptg(i,k,j+1) - ptg(i,k,j-1)) / (2 * grid%dp) / aearth (standard mathematical format: ∂T/∂y = (∂T/∂y)_n - (∂T/∂y)_s)/(2*Δy)*a)
pexf = (psurf_ref / pm(i,k,j))**cappa (standard mathematical format: φ = P_0/P^cappa)
uy = (ug(i,k,j+1) - ug(i,k,j-1)) / (2 * grid%dp) / aearth (standard mathematical format: ∂U/∂y = (∂U/∂y)_n - (∂U/∂y)_s)/(2*Δy)*a)
uy = (ug(i,k,j+1) - ug(i,k,j-1)) / (2 * grid%dp) / aearth (standard mathematical format: ∂U/∂y = (∂U/∂y)_n - (∂U/∂y)_s)/(2*Δy)*a)
vx = (vg(ip,k,j) - vg(im,k,j)) / (2 * grid%dl) / (aearth * (grid%cosp(j)+1.e-3_r8))
vx = (vg(ip,k,j) - vg(im,k,j)) / (2 * grid%dl) / (aearth * (grid%cosp(j)+1.e-3_r8))

### Equations:
ptemp(i,k,j) = pt(i,j,k) / (1._r8 + zvir*q3(i,j,k)) * pexf
pty(i,k,j) = ( ptg(i,k,j+1) - ptg(i,k,j-1) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dp)
uy(i,k,j) = ( ug(i,k,j+1) - ug(i,k,j-1) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dp)
vy(i,k,j) = ( vg(i,k,j+1) - vg(i,k,j-1) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dp)
ptx(i,k,j) = ( ptg(ip,k,j) - ptg(im,k,j) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dl)
ux(i,k,j) = ( ug(ip,k,j) - ug(im,k,j) ) / (2._r8 *grid%dl)
vx(i,k,j) = ( vg(ip,k,j) - vg(im,k,j) ) / (2._r8 *grid%dl)
frontgf(i,k,j) =                                                                          &
ptx(i,k,j)**2._r8 * (ux(i,k,j) - v3(i,k,j) * tglat / aearth)                          &
pty(i,k,j)**2._r8 * vy(i,k,j)                                                         &
ptx(i,k,j) * pty(i,k,j) * ( vx(i,k,j) + uy(i,k,j) + u3(i,k,j) * tglat / aearth )
frontga(i,k,j) = atan2 ( pty(i,k,j) , ptx(i,k,j) + 1.e-10_r8 )

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial p_t}{\partial j} = \frac{1}{a_e} \frac{\Delta p_t}{\Delta \phi}$, where $p_t$ is potential temperature
$\frac{\partial u_y}{\partial i} = \frac{1}{a_e} \frac{\Delta u_y}{\Delta \lambda}$, where $u_y$ is U-wind meridional gradient
$\frac{\partial v_y}{\partial i} = \frac{1}{a_e} \frac{\Delta v_y}{\Delta \lambda}$, where $v_y$ is V-wind meridional gradient
$\frac{\partial p_x}{\partial j} = \frac{p_t}{a_e (c_{os} + 10^{-3})} \frac{\Delta p_x}{\Delta \phi}$, where $p_x$ is potential temperature zonal gradient
$\frac{\partial u_x}{\partial j} = \frac{u_y}{a_e (c_{os} + 10^{-3})} \frac{\Delta u_x}{\Delta \phi}$, where $u_x$ is U-wind zonal gradient
$\frac{\partial v_x}{\partial j} = \frac{v_y}{a_e (c_{os} + 10^{-3})} \frac{\Delta v_x}{\Delta \phi}$, where $v_x$ is V-wind zonal gradient
$f_{gf}(i,j,k) = - p_{tx}^2 (u_x - v_3 \tan(\phi)) - p_{ty}^2 v_y - p_{tx} p_{ty} (v_x + u_3 \tan(\phi))$
$f_{ga}(i,j,k) = \arctan\left( \frac{p_{ty}}{p_{tx}+10^{-10}} \right)$

### Equations:
pm = 0.5_r8 * ( pe(i,k,j) + pe(i,k+1,j) )
pexf = (psurf_ref / pm)**cappa
ptemp = pt(i,j,k) / (1._r8 + zvir*q3(i,j,k)) * pexf
pty = ( ptg(i,k,j+1) - ptg(i,k,j-1) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dp)
uy = ( ug(i,k,j+1) - ug(i,k,j-1) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dp)
vy = ( vg(i,k,j+1) - vg(i,k,j-1) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dp)
ptx = ( ptg(ip,k,j) - ptg(im,k,j) ) / (2._r8 * grid%dl)
ux = ( ug(ip,k,j) - ug(im,k,j) ) / (2._r8 *grid%dl)
vx = ( vg(ip,k,j) - vg(im,k,j) ) / (2._r8 *grid%dl)
frontgf = - ptx**2 * (ux - v3 * tglat / aearth) - pty**2 * vy - ptx * pty * (vx + uy + u3 * tglat / aearth)
frontga = atan2(pty,ptx+1.e-10_r8)

### Equations:
$p_{mid} = \frac{1}{2}( p_i + p_{i+1})$
$\theta_p = T_v / ( 1 + q \cdot V_i ) \cdot p^{c_\alpha} $
$\left. \frac{\partial \theta_p}{\partial y} \right|_{k,l} = \frac{(\theta_p)_{l+1,k} - (\theta_p)_{l-1,k}}{2 \Delta y} / a$
$\left. \frac{\partial (U_w)_i}{\partial y} \right|_{k,l} = \frac{(U_w)_{i,l+1} - (U_w)_{i,l-1}}{2 \Delta y} / a $
$\left. \frac{\partial (V_w)_i}{\partial y} \right|_{k,l} = \frac{(V_w)_{i,l+1} - (V_w)_{i,l-1}}{2 \Delta y} / a $
$\left. \frac{\partial (\theta_p)_l}{\partial x} \right|_{k,j} = \frac{(\theta_p)_{j,l+1} - (\theta_p)_{j,l-1}}{2 \Delta x} / (a \cdot c_s(j)) $
$\left. \frac{\partial (U_w)_l}{\partial x} \right|_{k,j} = \frac{(U_w)_{j,l+1} - (U_w)_{j,l-1}}{2 \Delta x} / (a \cdot c_s(j)) $

$frontgf(i,k,j) = - ptx(i,k,j)^2 \cdot (ux(i,k,j) - v3(i,k,j) \cdot tglat / aearth) - pty(i,k,j)^2 \cdot vy(i,k,j) - ptx(i,k,j) \cdot pty(i,k,j) \cdot (vx(i,k,j) + uy(i,k,j) + u3(i,k,j) \cdot tglat / aearth)$

write(stderr,'(5a)') 'unknown rank .',myname_,': from ',trim(where_),'()'
write(stderr,'(9a)') 'unknown rank .',myname_,': from ',trim(where_),'()',', line trim(adjustl(lineno_)), of file' fnam_
write(stderr,'(9a)') myrank_,'.',myname_,': from ',trim(where_),'()',', line trim(adjustl(lineno_)), of file' fnam_
call abort
call MP_abort(MP_comm_world,2,ier_)

===== File: compose_test_mod.F90 =====

### Variables:
`np` (Number of grid points in each spatial direction.)
`nlev` (Number of vertical levels.)
`qsize` (Size of the qdp array.)
`Sx` (X-coordinate of the lower left corner of the domain in spherical coordinates.)
`Sy` (Y-coordinate of the lower left corner of the domain in spherical coordinates.)
`Lx` (Width of the domain in the x-direction.)
`Ly` (Height of the domain in the y-direction.)
`ie` (Element index.)
`n0_qdp` (Number of qdp arrays to fill for the current element.)
`p_elem` (Pointer to the element's spherical polar coordinates.)
`dp3d` (Three-dimensional density array.)
`dp` (Two-dimensional density array.)
`qdp` (Four-dimensional qdp array.)
`t` (Time variable.)
`vstar` (Velocity array at previous time step.)
`tl` (Time level object.)
`dt` (Time step size.)
`nstep` (Current time step number.)
`np1_qdp` (Number of qdp arrays to fill for the next time step.)
`i` and `j` (Loop counters.)

### Equations:
`dp3d(ie, i, j, tl%np1) = dp3d(ie, i, j, 0)` (Initial density array.)
`qdp(ie, i, j, k, m, n) = qdp(ie, i, j, 0, m, n)` (Initial qdp array.)
`tl%nstep = tl%nstep + qsplit` (Update time step number.)
`dt = twelve_days / nsteps` (Calculate time step size.)
`tprev = dt*(i-1)` and `t = dt*i` (Calculate previous and current time values.)
`compose_h2d = i == 1` and `compose_d2h = i == 1 .or. i == nsteps` (Determine whether to perform h2d or d2h remapping.)
`prim_advec_tracers_remap_ale(elem, deriv, hvcoord, hybrid, dt, tl, nets, nete)` (Perform tracer advection and remapping.)
`timelevel_qdp(tl, qsplit, np1_qdp, n0_qdp)` (Update time level object for qdp arrays.)
`compose_stt_record_q(ie, elem(ie)%spherep, elem(ie)%spheremp, tl%np1, dp3d, np1_qdp, qdp)` (Record final q values.)
`compose_stt_finish(hybrid%par%comm, hybrid%par%root, hybrid%par%rank, eval)` (Perform global reductions and clean up.)

===== File: cloud_cover_diags.F90 =====

### Variables:
`lchnk` (LCHNK)
`ncol` (NCOL)
`cld` (CLD)
`pmid` (PMID)
`nmxrgn` (NMXRGN)
`pmxrgn` (PMXRGN)
`clrsky` (CLRSKY)
`clrskymax` (CLRMAXSKY)
`i` (I)
`k` (K)
