`max_nmxrgn` (MAX_NMXRGN)
`ityp` (ITYP)

### Equations:
$\sum_{k=1}^{\text{pver}} cld(i,k) = \text{CLD}(i)$
$\frac{1}{2} (\text{PMID}(i,\min(k,pver)) + \text{PMID}(i,\max(k,pver))) = \text{PMID}(i,k)$
$\sum_{k=1}^{\text{pver}} (\text{CLD}(i,k) - \text{CLRMAXSKY}(i)) \text{CLRSKY}(i) = \text{CLOUD}(i)$
$\sum_{k=1}^{\text{pver}} (\text{CLD}(i,k) - \text{CLRMAXSKY}(i)) = \text{CLTOTT}(i)$
$\sum_{k=1}^{\text{pver}} (\text{CLD}(i,k) - \text{CLRMAXSKY}(i)) = \text{CLLOWT}(i)$
$\sum_{k=1}^{\text{pver}} (\text{CLD}(i,k) - \text{CLRMAXSKY}(i)) = \text{CLMEDT}(i)$
$\sum_{k=1}^{\text{pver}} (\text{CLD}(i,k) - \text{CLRMAXSKY}(i)) = \text{CLOHGT}(i)$
$\min(\max(\text{PMID}(i,k),\text{PTYPMIN}(\text{ITYP})) , \text{PTYPMAX}(\text{ITYP})) = \text{PTYM}(i,k)$
$\min(\max(\text{PMXRGN}(i,\text{IRGN}(i)),\text{PTYPMIN}(\text{ITYP})) , \text{PTYPMAX}(\text{ITYP})) = \text{PTYM}(i,k)$
$\text{CLRSKYMAX}(\text{I}) = \prod_{k=\text{1}}^{\text{pver}} (1 - \text{CLD}(i,k))$
$\frac{\min(1.0_r8,\max(\text{PMXRGN}(\text{i},\text{IRGN}(\text{i})) , \text{CLRSKYM}(i)))}{\sum_{k=\text{1}}^{\text{pver}} (\prod_{j=1}^{k-1} (1 - \text{CLD}(i,j)) \cdot \min(1.0_r8,\max(\text{PMXRGN}(\text{i},\text{IRGN}(\text{i})) , \text{CLRSKYM}(i))))}$
$\text{CLRMAXSKY}(\text{i}) = 1.0_r8$

===== File: rad_solar_var.F90 =====

### Variables:
`nradbins` (N_{bands})
`yr` (Year)
`mon` (Month)
`day` (Day)
`tod` (Time of day)
`ierr` (Error code)
`nbins` (Number of bins in spectrum)
`we` (Weights of the bins)
`radbinmin` (Minimum wavelength of each band, μm)
`radbinmax` (Maximum wavelength of each band, μm)
`sol_irrad` (Lean solar irradiance data)
`tsi_ref` (Reference total solar irradiance)
`ref_band_irrad` (Reference solar irradiance in each band)
`irrad` (Solar irradiance at model timestep in each band)
`sfac` (Scaling factors for CAM heating)
`targ` (Target values after rebinning)

### Equations:
`nradbins = get_number_sw_bands()`  - (1)
`ierr /= 0 → endrun('Error allocating space')`  - (2)
`call get_ref_solar_band_irrad( ref_band_irrad )`  - (3)
`tsi_ref = get_ref_total_solar_irrad()`  - (4)
`irrad(i) = integrate_spectrum( nbins, nradbins, we, radbinmin, radbinmax, sol_irrad, trg)`  - (5)
`sfac(:nradbins) = irrad(:nradbins)/ref_band_irrad(:nradbins)`  - (6)
`sfac(:nradbins) = sol_tsi/tsi_ref`  - (7)
`trg_x(1) = min_trg(i)`  - (8)
`trg_x(2) = max_trg(i)`  - (9)
`targ(1) = rebin( nsrc, 1, src_x, trg_x, src(1:nsrc), targ(:) )`  - (10)
`trg(i) = targ(1)*(trg_x(2)-trg_x(1))`  - (11)
`get_number_sw_bands`: Returns the number of bands in solar irradiance data.
Equation: N_{bands} = get_number_sw_bands() (1)
`get_ref_solar_band_irrad`: Returns the reference solar irradiance in each band.
Equation: call get_ref_solar_band_irrad( ref_band_irrad ) (3)
Note: This is a subroutine, not an equation.
`get_ref_total_solar_irrad`: Returns the reference total solar irradiance.
Equation: tsi_ref = get_ref_total_solar_irrad() (4)
Note: This is a subroutine, not an equation.
`rebin`: Rebins the input data to a new grid.
Equation: targ(1) = rebin( nsrc, 1, src_x, trg_x, src(1:nsrc), targ(:) ) (10)
Note: This is a subroutine, not an equation.
`nradbins = get_number_sw_bands()`  - (1)
`ierr /= 0 → endrun('Error allocating space')`  - (2)
`ref_band_irrad(i) = get_ref_solar_band_irrad(i)`  - (12)
`tsi_ref = get_ref_total_solar_irrad()`  - (13)
`irrad(i) = integrate_spectrum( nbins, nradbins, we, radbinmin, radbinmax, sol_irrad, trg)`  - (14)
`sfac(:nradbins) = irrad(:nradbins)/ref_band_irrad(:nradbins)`  - (6)
`sfac(:nradbins) = sol_tsi/tsi_ref`  - (7)
`trg_x(1) = min_trg(i)`  - (8)
`trg_x(2) = max_trg(i)`  - (9)
`targ(1) = rebin( nsrc, 1, src_x, trg_x, src(1:nsrc), targ(:) )`  - (15)
`trg(i) = targ(1)*(trg_x(2)-trg_x(1))`  - (11)

===== File: diffuse_scalar3D.F90 =====

### Variables:
`ncrms` (N)
`dimx1_d,dimx2_d,dimy1_d,dimy2_d` (no short notation, treated as separate variables for clarity)
`grdf_x, grdf_y, grdf_z` (G)
`field` (F)
`fluxb, fluxt` (F)
`tkh` (T)
`rho, rhow` (ρ)
`flux` (F)
`dx, dy, dz, adzw, dtn` (constants)
`rdx2, rdy2, rdz2, dxy, dyx` (constants derived from dx, dy, and dz)
`rdx5, rdy5, rdz5` (constants derived from rdx2, rdy2, and rdz2)
`tmp` (temporary variable, treated as a constant for clarity)

### Equations:
∂F/∂t = -G_x * (∂F/∂x) - G_y * (∂F/∂y) + G_z * (ρ * ∂^2 F / ∂z^2)
∂F/∂t = -(Flux_x - Flux_x_{i-1}) - (Flux_y - Flux_y_{j-1})
Flux_z = -T_k * ρ * (∂ F / ∂ z)
ρ_i = 1 / (ρ * adz_k)
rdx2 = 1 / (dx^2), rdy2 = 1 / (dy^2), rdz2 = 1 / (dz^2)
dxy = dx / dy, dyx = dy / dx
Flux_x = -0.5 * rdx2 * G_x * (T_kh_{i+1} + T_kh_i) * (F_{i+1} - F_i)
Flux_y = -0.5 * rdy2 * G_y * (T_kh_{j+1} + T_kh_j) * (F_{j+1} - F_j)
dfdt = dfdt - (Flux_x - Flux_x_{i-1}) - (Flux_y - Flux_y_{j-1})
Flux_z = -0.5 * rdz2 * G_z * (T_kh_{k+1} + T_kh_k) * ρ_i * (F_{k+1} - F_k)
∂ρ / ∂t = -ρ * (∂^2 F / ∂z^2) - Flux_z
Field_{i,j,k}^{n+1} = Field_{i,j,k}^n + Dfdt_{i,j,k}

(3 + b_rain) / 4 = powr1
(5 + b_rain) / 8 = powr2
(3 + b_snow) / 4 = pows1
(5 + b_snow) / 8 = pows2
(3 + b_grau) / 4 = powg1
(5 + b_grau) / 8 = powg2
dqcc/dt = (autor*(qcc-qcw0))/(1.+dtn*(accrr+accrcs+accrcg+autor))
dqii/dt = (autos*(qii-qci0))/(1.+dtn*(acris+acrig+autos))
accrr = 0
if omp > 0.001: accrr = accrrc * qrr ** powr1
accrcs = 0
accris = 0
if omp < 0.999 and omg < 0.999:
tmp = qp * (1.-omp)*(1.-omg) ** pows1
accrcs = accrsc * tmp
accris = accrsi * tmp
accrig = 0
accrg = 0
if omp < 0.999 and omg > 0.001:
tmp = qp * (1.-omp)*omg ** powg1
accrig = accrgi * tmp
accrcg = accrgc * tmp
dqcc/dt = dtn *(accrr*qcc + autor*(qcc-qcw0)+(acris+acrig)*qii + (accrcs+accrcg)*qcc + autos*(qii-qci0))
qn_new = qn - dq
qp_new = qp + dq
q_new = q - dq
qsatt = 0
if omn > 0.001: qsatt = omn*qsatw_crm(tabs, pres)
if omn < 0.999: qsatt = (1.-omn)*qsati_crm(tabs,pres)
dq/dt = evapr1 * sqrt(qrr) + evapr2 * qrr ** powr2
dq/dt = dq/dt + evaps1 * sqrt(qss) + evaps2 * qss ** pows2
dq/dt = dq/dt + evapg1 * sqrt(qgg) + evapg2 * qgg ** powg2
dq_new = dtn *(q/qsatt - 1) * dq
qp_new = qp + dq
q_new = q - dq
if dq > -0.5*qp: dq = max(-0.5*qp, dq)
dq/dt = (qp / qsatt - 1) * dtn * dq
q_new = q + qp
qpevp = qpevp - qp

### Equations:
No explicit mathematical equations are present in the Fortran code. However, we can interpret some operations as implicit equations.
  ΔH = ρ \* z
  Where ΔH is the change in heat flux (hr_col), ρ is the density of the medium (hr_vr_col), and z is the height or depth (dz)
  ΔFC = ρ \* z
  Where ΔFC is the change in fire decomposition loss flux (fire_decomp_closs_col), ρ is the density of the medium (fire_decomp_closs_vr_col), and z is the height or depth (dz)
  ΔH(c,t) = ΔH(c,t) + ρ(c,t) \* z(c,t)
  Where ΔH is the change in heat flux (hr_col), ρ is the density of the medium (hr_vr_col), and z is the height or depth (dz). The sum is taken over all time steps t.
  ΔFC(c,t) = ΔFC(c,t) + ρ(c,t) \* z(c,t)
  Where ΔFC is the change in fire decomposition loss flux (fire_decomp_closs_col), ρ is the density of the medium (fire_decomp_closs_vr_col), and z is the height or depth (dz). The sum is taken over all time steps t.

===== File: ref_pres.F90 =====

### Variables:
pref_edge (Pa edge)
pref_mid (Pa mid)
pref_mid_norm (Normalized Pa mid)
ptop_ref (Top of model, Pa)
psurf_ref (Surface pressure, Pa)
num_pr_lev (Number of top levels using pure pressure representation)
trop_cloud_top_press (Pressure used to set troposphere cloud physics top, Pa)
clim_modal_aero_top_press (Pressure used to set MAM process top, Pa)
do_molec_press (Pressure below which molecular diffusion is calculated, Pa)
molec_diff_bot_press (Pressure used to set bottom of molecular diffusion region, Pa)
do_molec_diff (Flag for molecular diffusion)
ntop_molec (Top level index for molecular diffusion)
nbot_molec (Bottom level index for molecular diffusion)

### Equations:
$\text{pref\_mid}(k) = \frac{\text{pref\_edge}(k)}{\text{psurf\_ref}}$
pref_mid(k) = pref_edge(k)/psurf_ref
$\text{ptop\_ref} = \text{pref\_edge}(1)$
ptop_ref = pref_edge(1)
$\text{psurf\_ref} = \text{pref\_edge}(\text{pverp})$
psurf_ref = pref_edge(pverp)
$k_{\text{trop}} = \max \left( k | \text{pref\_mid}(k) > \text{trop\_cloud\_top\_press} \right)$
ktrop = max(k | pref_mid(k) > trop_cloud_top_press)
$k_{\text{MAM}} = \max \left( k | \text{pref\_mid}(k) > \text{clim\_modal\_aero\_top\_press} \right)$
klim_MAM = max(k | pref_mid(k) > clim_modal_aero_top_press)
$k_{\text{molec}} = \max \left( k | \text{pref\_mid}(k) < \text{do\_molec\_press} \right)$
kmolec = max(k | pref_mid(k) < do_molec_press)
$\text{do\_molec\_diff} = (\text{ptop\_ref} < \text{do\_molec\_press})$
do_molec_diff = (ptop_ref < do_molec_press)
$k_{\text{molec}} = \max \left( k | \text{pref\_mid}(k) > \text{molec\_diff\_bot\_press} \right)$
kmolec = max(k | pref_mid(k) > molec_diff_bot_press)

===== File: test_modis_simulator.F90 =====

### Variables:
`wp` (Short Notation for real word precision kind)

### Equations:
In the call to `modis_l2_simulator`, it's likely that the simulator uses some form of radiative transfer equation to calculate optical thickness and cloud top pressure. However, since this code is a test modis simulator, it might be assumed that these calculations are done elsewhere.
In the call to `modis_L3_simulator`, it's likely that some kind of aggregation or averaging function is used to calculate grid-mean properties (e.g., Cloud_Fraction_Total_Mean). However, since this code only calls and doesn't implement the simulator, we can infer equations from possible properties that could be calculated as averages.
`pressureLayers(1, :) = (pressureLevels(1, 2:) + pressureLevels(1, 1:nLayers)) / 2`
This equation is used to calculate `pressureLayers`. The equation can be written as: $\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{nLayers+1}p_i}{2}=\bar{p}$ where $p_i$ are the pressure levels and $\bar{p}$ is the average.
`temp(1, :) = (/ 200., 220., 240., 260., 280., 300.0 /)`
This equation simply assigns values to `temp`. The equation can be written as: $T_i=constant_i$ where $T_i$ are the temperature levels and constant_i are constants.
`sum(Optical_Thickness_vs_Cloud_Top_Pressure(1, :, :))`
This equation is used in a print statement to calculate the total fraction from histogram. The equation can be written as: $\int_{0}^{CTP\max}\tau(x)dx=\sum_{k=1}^{numPressureHistogramBins}\tau(k)\Delta CTp(k)$ where $\tau(x)$ is the optical thickness, $CTP\max$ is the maximum cloud top pressure and $\Delta CTp(k)$ are the histogram boundaries.

### Variables:

### Equations:
\(\text{cldf}(i,k) = \min\left( \text{cldfrac}(i,k), 0.0001 \right)\)   where cldf is clipped cloud fraction
\(s_k(i,1) = (\text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}) - \lfloor \text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}) \rfloor ) \times 10^9\)
\(s_k(i,2) = (\text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}-1) - \lfloor \text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}-1) \rfloor ) \times 10^9\)
\(s_k(i,3) = (\text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}-2) - \lfloor \text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}-2) \rfloor ) \times 10^9\)
\(s_k(i,4) = (\text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}-3) - \lfloor \text{p_m}(i,\text{n_l}-3) \rfloor ) \times 10^9\)
\(\text{kiss_gen} = \text{ShrKissRandGen}(s_k)\)
\(\text{rand_num\_1d}(i,1) = \text{kiss\_gen}\%random()\)
\(\text{kiss\_gen}\%advance(\text{changeseed})\)
\(\text{kiss\_gen}\%random(\text{rand_num})\)
\(\text{cdf}(i,k) = \text{rand_num}(i,k)\) for all \( i, k \)
if \(\text{cdf}(i,k-1) > 1 - \text{f_c_cl}(i,k-1),\) then
\(\text{cdf}(i,k) = \text{cdf}(i,k-1)\)
else
\(\text{cdf}(i,k) = \text{cdf}(i,k) (1 - \text{f_c_cl}(i,k))\)
end if
\(\text{i\_c}(i,k) = (\text{cdf}(i,k) \geq 1 - \text{spread}(\text{f_c_cl}(i,k), \text{n_g}))\)

### Equations:

R_i^c = N_N(i)/(S_S(i) + 1e-10)
T_x(n_lev) = -T_x
T_y(n_lev) = -T_y
T_x(i) = -N_u(i)*(U(i+1) - U(i))/(0.5*(H(i+1)+H(i)))
T_y(i) = -N_u(i)*(V(i+1) - V(i))/(0.5*(H(i+1)+H(i)))

E_p^0 = epot
E_p = E_p^0 - ∑_{i=1}^{nlev} H(i)*b(i)*z
E_t = ρ_0 * ∑_{i=1}^{n_lev} (TKE(i) + TKE(i-1)) * H(i)
z = -∑_{i=1}^{nlev} (0.5*H(i))
T_x(0) = -D(1)*U(1)*sqrt(U(1)^2+V(1)^2)

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial f}{\partial t} = -u \frac{\partial f}{\partial x} - w \frac{\partial f}{\partial z}$
Equation for the advection of $f$, where $u$ and $w$ are the velocities in the $x$ and $z$ directions, respectively.
$\max(f(i,j,k),f(i+1,j,k)) = u_{i+1/2} f(i+1,j,k) + (1-u_{i+1/2}) f(i,j,k)$
Equation for the upwind differencing of $f$, where $u_{i+1/2}$ is the velocity at the interface between grid points $i$ and $i+1$.
$\min(f(i,j,k),f(i-1,j,k)) = u_{i-1/2} f(i-1,j,k) + (1-u_{i-1/2}) f(i,j,k)$
Equation for the upwind differencing of $f$, where $u_{i-1/2}$ is the velocity at the interface between grid points $i$ and $i-1$.
$\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} = \frac{\max(0, f(i,j,k)-f(i-1,j,k)) - \min(0, f(i+1,j,k)-f(i,j,k))}{\Delta x}$
Equation for the calculation of the velocity $u$ using the upwind differencing scheme.
$\frac{\partial w}{\partial z} = \frac{\max(0, f(i,j,k)-f(i,j,k-1)) - \min(0, f(i,j,k+1)-f(i,j,k))}{\Delta z}$
Equation for the calculation of the velocity $w$ using the upwind differencing scheme.
$\mu_{i+1/2} = \frac{\max(0, f(i,j,k)-f(i-1,j,k))}{\min(f(i,j,k),f(i-1,j,k)) + \epsilon}$
Equation for the calculation of the limiter function $\mu_{i+1/2}$.
$f(i,j,k) = (u_{i+1/2} f(i+1,j,k) + (1-u_{i+1/2}) f(i,j,k)) \left(1 + \frac{\partial u}{\partial x} \Delta t\right)$
Equation for the time advancement of $f$ using the upwind differencing scheme.
$\frac{\partial f}{\partial t} = -u \frac{\partial f}{\partial x} - w \frac{\partial f}{\partial z} + \text{source term}$
Equation for the advection-diffusion of $f$, where $u$ and $w$ are the velocities in the $x$ and $z$ directions, respectively, and $\text{source term}$ represents any source or sink terms.

$\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} = -\left( \frac{2g_1}{\tau_x^2}(u_{i+1/2,j,k}-u_{i,j,k})-g_1 \cdot \left(\frac{\tau_x^2}{4}\right) \cdot (u_{i+1/2,j,k} + u_{i-1/2,j,k} + u_{i,j,k+1/2} + u_{i,j,k-1/2})\right)$
$\frac{\partial v}{\partial t} = -\left( \frac{2g_2}{\tau_y^2}(v_{i,j+1/2,k}-v_{i,j,k})-g_2 \cdot \left(\frac{\tau_y^2}{4}\right) \cdot (v_{i,j+1/2,k} + v_{i,j-1/2,k} + v_{i,j,k+1/2} + v_{i,j,k-1/2})\right)$
$\frac{\partial w}{\partial t} = -\left( \frac{2g_3}{\tau_z^2}(w_{i,j,k+1}-w_{i,j,k})-g_3 \cdot \left(\frac{\tau_z^2}{4}\right) \cdot (w_{i,j,k+1} + w_{i,j,k-1} + w_{i,j,k+1/2} + w_{i,j,k-1/2})\right)$
$\frac{d u_w}{d k} = -g_3 \tau_z^2 (w_{i,j,k+1}-w_{i,j,k}) \rho(k) i_{\rho}(k)$

$u_w(k=0) = 0$
$v_w(k=0) = 0$
$\frac{d u_w}{d k} = -\left(\frac{\tau_z^2}{4} (w_{i,j,k+1/2}-w_{i,j,k-1/2}) \rho(w)(k) i_{\rho w}(k) + (u_i(j,k+1)-u_{i,j,k}) i_{\rho w}(k+1) \tau_z^2)\right)$
$\frac{d v_w}{d k} = -\left(\frac{\tau_z^2}{4} (w_{i,j,k+1/2}-w_{i,j,k-1/2}) \rho(w)(k) i_{\rho w}(k) + (v_i(j,k+1)-v_{i,j,k}) i_{\rho w}(k+1) \tau_z^2)\right)$
$\frac{d u}{d t} = - \left(\frac{\tau_x^2}{4} \cdot (u_{i+1/2,j,k}-u_{i-1/2,j,k}) \cdot (w_i(j,k)-w_i(j,k-1)) \rho(k) i_{\rho}(k) + (w_{i,j,k+1}-w_{i,j,k}) \frac{\tau_z^2}{4} \cdot (u_i(j,k)-u_i(j,k+1)) \right)$
$\frac{d v}{d t} = - \left(\frac{\tau_y^2}{4} \cdot (v_{i,j+1/2,k}-v_{i,j-1/2,k}) \cdot (w_i(j,k)-w_i(j,k-1)) \rho(w)(k) i_{\rho w}(k) + (w_{i,j,k+1}-w_{i,j,k}) \frac{\tau_z^2}{4} \cdot (v_i(j,k)-v_i(j,k+1)) \right)$

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial}{\partial t}a_{ice}(i,j,n) = 0$ (No change in ice concentration over time, aicen)
$\frac{\partial}{\partial t}t_{r}(i,j,k,n) = 0$ (No change in tracers over time, trcrn)

$s_{snow}(i,j) = \sum_n s_{snow}(i,j,n)$ (Snow volume per unit area, vsnon)
$e_{ice}(i,j,k) = \sum_n e_{ice}(i,j,k,n)$ (Energy of melting for each ice layer, eicen)
$e_{snow}(i,j,k) = \sum_n e_{snow}(i,j,k,n)$ (Energy of melting for each snow layer, esnon)

$\left. t_{0} = \frac{2 \pi y_{{\text{day}}}}{y_{{\text{rdays}}}} \right.$
$\left. t_{02} = 2 t_{0} \right.$
$\left. t_{03} = 3 t_{0} \right.$
$\left. s_{{\text{dec}}} = 0.006918 - 0.399912 \cos(t_{0}) + 0.070257 \sin(t_{0}) - 0.006758 \cos(2t_{0}) + 0.000907 \sin(2t_{0}) - 0.002697 \cos(3t_{0}) + 0.001480 \sin(3t_{0}) \right.$

$\left. c_{{\text{zen}}} = \sin(r_{{\text{lat}}}) \sin(s_{{\text{dec}}}) + \cos(r_{{\text{lat}}}) \cos(s_{{\text{dec}}}) \cos(t_{{\text{sun}}}) \right.$
$\left. c_{{\text{zen}}} = \begin{cases} 0, & \text{if } c_{{\text{zen}}} < 0 \\ c_{{\text{zen}}}, & \text{otherwise} \end{cases} \right.$
$\left. z_{{\text{zen}}} = \frac{180}{\pi} \arccos(c_{{\text{zen}}}) \right.$

3: s_t = t_stopf('prim_init2')
4: i_r = hvcoord_init(vfile_mid, vfile_int, .true., hybrid%masterthread, ierr)
5: P_r%comm = initmp()
6: i_s = pio_read_phis(elem,hybrid%par,"PHIS") or i_s = pio_read_phis(elem,hybrid%par,"PHIS_d")
7: h_c = hvcoord_init(vfile_mid, vfile_int, .true., hybrid%masterthread, ierr)
8: P_r%rank < 100 => write(6,9) par%rank,ithr,omp_get_max_threads(),nets,nete
9: i_h = omp_get_thread_num()
10: i_s = interp_movie_init(elem,par,hvcoord,tl)
11: i_s = prim_movie_init(elem,par,hvcoord,tl)
12: i_s = t_stopf('prim_io_init')
13: i_s = interp_movie_output(elem, tl, par, 0d0) or i_s = prim_movie_output(elem, tl, hvcoord, par)
14: if(MODULO(tl%nstep,restartfreq)==0): i_r = WriteRestart(elem,ithr,1,nelemd,tl)
15: print_test_results(elem,tl,hvcoord,P_r)
16: t_stopf('Total')

max_vel = 30.0D0
max_vel = max(max_vel, sqrt(v1*v1+v2*v2))
max_vel = ParallelMax(max_vel, hybrid)

v1     = elem(ie)%D(i,j,1,1)*elem(ie)%state%v(i,j,1,k,n0)+elem(ie)%D(i,j,1,2)*elem(ie)%state%v(i,j,2,k,n0)
v2     = elem(ie)%D(i,j,2,1)*elem(ie)%state%v(i,j,1,k,n0)+elem(ie)%D(i,j,2,2)*elem(ie)%state%v(i,j,2,k,n0)

max_vel = ParallelMax(max_vel, hybrid)
dt_grvin = (mindx/dd_pi)/max_vel
cfl = floor(0.75D0*dt_adv/dt_grv)+1
dt_adv = min(dt_adv,dt_grv*real(cfl))

`rh` (relative humidity, fraction)
`do_kinetic` (bool)
`wiso_alpl` (fractionation coefficient)
`wiso_alpi` (fractionation coefficient)
`wiso_akel` (kinetic fractionation coefficient)
`wiso_akci` (kinetic fractionation coefficient)

### Equations:
α = 1 (If the source and destination water types are the same, then no fractionation occurs.)
α = wiso_alpl(ispec, tk) (Is the source vapor and destination a liquid?)
α = wiso_alpi(ispec, tk) (Is the source ice and destination a liquid?)
α = 1._r8 / wtype_get_alpha (Is the source a liquid and destination vapor?)
wtype_get_alpha = wiso_akel(ispec, tk, rh, wtype_get_alpha) (Is the source vapor and destination a liquid? Using kinetic calculation)
wtype_get_alpha = wiso_akci(ispec, tk, wtype_get_alpha) (Is the source ice and destination a liquid? Using kinetic calculation)

===== File: EMI_Atm2LndType_ExchangeMod.F90 =====

### Variables:
`forc_pbot_downscaled` (F)
`forc_t_downscaled` (F)
`forc_solad` (S)
`forc_solai` (S)
`top_as%pbot` (T)
`top_as%tbot` (T)
`col_pp%topounit(c)` (C)
`filter(fc)` (F)
`cur_data%data_real_1d(c)` (D)
`cur_data%data_real_2d(g,j)` (R)

### Equations:
$\boxed{D_{c} = F_{pbot}(T) \quad ,\quad c=1,2,...,num\_filter}$
$F_PBOT(T)$ represents the downscaled bottom forcings and $D_c$ is the data at column level.
$\boxed{D_{c} = F_{t}(T) \quad ,\quad c=1,2,...,num\_filter}$
$F_T(T)$ represents the downscaled temperature forcings and $D_c$ is the data at column level.
$\boxed{R(g,j) = F_{solad}(G,J) \quad ,\quad g=1,2,...,num\_filter,\; j=1,2}$
$F_Solad(G,J)$ represents the solar direct radiation fluxes and $R(g,j)$ is the data at grid level.
$\boxed{R(g,j) = F_{solai}(G,J) \quad ,\quad g=1,2,...,num\_filter,\; j=1,2}$
$F_Solai(G,J)$ represents the solar diffuse radiation fluxes and $R(g,j)$ is the data at grid level.
F: Fortran integer
S: Solar Flux (real)
T: Temperature (real)
C: column number (integer)
D: Data value (real)
R: Radiation Flux (real)
G: Grid point (integer)

### Variables:

`lsum` (Σ)
`maxbadloc` (M)
`maxbad` (B)
`rank` (R)
`iostat` (I)

### Equations:
Δ = W - R  # General equation for difference between write and read arrays
# = COUNT(Δ > 1.0d-299)  # Count of elements where difference is greater than threshold value
Σ = SUM(Δ)  # Sum of differences in array elements
∑ = MPI_Allreduce(Σ,MY_COMM,ierr)  # Allreduce operation on sum of differences across communicator
M = maxloc(Δ)  # Location of maximum difference element
B = maxval(Δ)  # Maximum difference value in the array
I = -20 (when iostat is present)  # Error status when discrepancy detected

### Equations:
Δλ_j = 1 / φ_i^(j) - φ_i^(j+1) ≈ dlam(j)

if( φ_p(i,k) ≥ φ_i(j_b(i,k)+1) ) then, j_b(i,k) = j_b(i,k) + 1
i_1 = i1
i_b(i,k,1) = i_1 + int( λ_p(i,k)*r_dlam(j_b(i,k)-1))
if (fullgrid), then: i_b(i,k,2:4) = i_b(i,k,1)
else:
i_b(i,k,2) = i_1 + int( λ_p(i,k)*r_dlam(j_b(i,k)))
i_b(i,k,3) = i_1 + int( λ_p(i,k)*r_dlam(j_b(i,k)+1))

### Equations:

**X-Interpolation Formula**: FINt = FB*HL + FXL*DHL + FB*HR + FXR*DHR

===== File: shear_prod2D.F90 =====

### Variables:
`nzm` (N_z_m)
`nx` (N_x)
`ncrms` (N_cRMS)
`k` (k)
`i` (i)
`icrm` (cRMS_index)
`ib` (i_minus_1)
`ic` (i_plus_1)
`j` (j)
`dx` (delta_x)
`dz` (delta_z_cRMS)
`adz` (advection_coefficient_z_cRMS)
`rdx0` (inverse_delta_x)
`rdx` (grid_anisotropy_factor)
`rdx_up` (grid_anisotropy_factor_up)
`rdx_dn` (grid_anisotropy_factor_dn)
`rdz` (grid_anisotropy_factor_z)
`rdzw_up` (grid_anisotropy_factor_zw_up)
`rdzw_dn` (grid_anisotropy_factor_zw_dn)
`u` (velocity_x_cRMS)
`v` (velocity_y_cRMS)
`w` (velocity_w_cRMS)
`u0` (reference_velocity_x_cRMS)
`v0` (reference_velocity_y_cRMS)
`def2` (shear_product_2D)

### Equations:
$\boxed{\text{Grid anisotropy factor: } rdx = \sqrt{dx \cdot rdz}}$
where $rdx0 = \frac{1}{\delta_x}$, $dx = \delta_x$, and $rdz = \frac{1}{\delta_z^{cRMS} \cdot advection_coefficient_z^{cRMS}}$
$\boxed{\text{Grid anisotropy factor at upper boundary: } rdx_{up} = \sqrt{dx \cdot rdzw_{up}}}$
where $rdx0 = \frac{1}{\delta_x}$, $dx = \delta_x$, and $rdzw_{up} = \frac{1}{\delta_z^{cRMS} \cdot advection_coefficient_zw^{cRMS}}$
$\boxed{\text{Grid anisotropy factor at lower boundary: } rdx_{dn} = \sqrt{dx \cdot rdzw_{dn}}}$
where $rdx0 = \frac{1}{\delta_x}$, $dx = \delta_x$, and $rdzw_{dn} = \frac{1}{\delta_z^{cRMS} \cdot advection_coefficient_zw^{cRMS}}$
$\boxed{\text{Grid anisotropy factor at z-direction: } rdz = \frac{1}{\delta_z^{cRMS} \cdot advection_coefficient_z^{cRMS}}}$
$\boxed{\text{Shear product 2D: } def_{2}(i,j,k) = 2. ( (u(i+1,j,k)-u(i,j,k)) \cdot rdx)^2 + ( (w(i,j,k+1)-w(i,j,k)) \cdot rdz)^2 }$
$\boxed{\text{Shear product 2D with terms at upper boundary: } def_{2}(i,j,k) = 2. ( (u(i+1,j,k)-u(i,j,k)) \cdot rdx)^2 + ( (w(i,j,k+1)-w(i,j,k)) \cdot rdz)^2 + 0.5D0 \cdot ( (v(i+1,j,k)-v(i,j,k)) \cdot rdx)^2 + ( (v(i,j,k+1)-v(i,j,k)) \cdot rdx)^2 + ... }$
$\boxed{\text{Shear product 2D with terms at lower boundary: } def_{2}(i,j,k) = 2. ( (u(i+1,j,k)-u(i,j,k)) \cdot rdx)^2 + ( (w(i,j,k+1)-w(i,j,k)) \cdot rdz)^2 + 0.5D0 \cdot ( (v(i+1,j,k)-v(i,j,k)) \cdot rdx)^2 + ( (v(i,j,k+1)-v(i,j,k)) \cdot rdx)^2 + ... }$

===== File: convert_fluxes.F90 =====

### Variables:
`nlev` (NL)
`g` (G)
`cp` (CP)
`rho_0` (ROHO)
`heat` (HEAT)
`p_e` (PE)
`rad` (RADL)
`T` (TL)
`S` (SL)
`tFlux` (TF)
`sFlux` (SF)
`btFlux` (BTF)
`bsFlux` (BSF)
`tRad` (TRADL)
`bRad` (BRADL)

### Equations:
$\text{Alpha} = \alpha(S_{NL}, T_{NL}, 0, G, ROHO)$
$\beta = \beta (S_{NL}, T_{NL}, 0, G, ROHO)$
$tFlux = \frac{HEAT}{ROHO \cdot CP}$
$bTFlux = G \cdot \alpha \cdot tFlux$
$sFlux = - S_{NL} \cdot PE $
$bSFlux =  -G \cdot \beta \cdot sFlux$
$tRad_0 = \frac{RADL_0}{ROHO \cdot CP}$
$bRad_0 = G \cdot \alpha \cdot tRad_0$
$tRad_i = RADL_i / (ROHO \cdot CP)$
$bRad_i = G \cdot \alpha \cdot tRad_i$

ntilyr (Ntlyr)
ntslyr (Ntslr)
ntrcr (Ntr)

### Equations:
Aic = Aic + (Aic_rest - Aic) * Ct
Vic = Vic + (Vic_rest - Vic) * Ct

===== File: dcmip2016-kessler.F90 =====

### Variables:
theta (θ) - potential temperature (K)
qv (qῡ) - water vapor mixing ratio (gm/gm)
qc (qc) - cloud water mixing ratio (gm/gm)
qr (qr) - rain  water mixing ratio (gm/gm)
rho (ρ) - dry air density (not mean state as in KW) (kg/m^3)
pk (p̄) - Exner function (p/p0)**(R/cp)
z (z) - heights of thermodynamic levels in the grid column (m)
nz (n_z) - number of thermodynamic levels in the column
precl (pre_cl) - Precipitation rate (m_water / s)
r (r) - density ratio (rho(k)/rho(1))
rhalf (r_half) - square root of density ratio
velqr (v_eqr) - liquid water terminal velocity (m/s)
sed (s_ed) - sedimentation term
pc (p_c) - pressure correction factor
f2x (f_2x) - constant (17.27 d0)
f5 (f_5) - constant ((237.3 d0 * 17.27 d0 * 2500000 d0 / 1003 d0))
xk (x_k) - ratio of gas constant to specific heat capacity at constant pressure
psl (p_s_l) - pressure at sea level (mb)
rhoqr (ρ_q_r) - density of liquid water (kg/m^3)
dt_max (d_t_max) - maximum time step size in accordance with CFL condition
rainsplit (r_a_i_n_split) - number of subcycles
nt (n_t) - current subcycle index
dt0 (d_t_0) - subcycle time step

### Equations:
Autoconversion and accretion rates: qrprod = qc(k) - (qc(k)-dt0*max(.001*(qc(k)-.001d0),0.d0))/(1.d0+dt0*2.2d0*qr(k)**.875)
Saturation vapor mixing ratio: qvs = pc(k)*exp(f2x*(pk(k)*theta(k)-273.d0)/(pk(k)*theta(k)-36.d0))
Evaporation rate: ern = min(dt0*(((1.6d0+124.9d0*(r(k)*qr(k))**.2046)*(r(k)*qr(k))**.525)/(2550000d0*pc(k)/(3.8d0 *qvs)+540000d0))*(dim(qvs,qv(k))/(r(k)*qvs)),max(-prod-qc(k),0.d0),qr(k))
Saturation adjustment: theta(k)= theta(k) + 2500000d0/(1003.d0*pk(k))*(max( prod,-qc(k))-ern)
Exner function: pk = (p/p0)**(R/cp)
Precipitation rate calculation: precl = precl + rho(1) * qr(1) * velqr(1) / rhoqr

### Equations:
L_(C)(0) = 1
L_(0) = Σ[I(K(i) == K_0)], i = 1:N
L_(C)(1) = L_(0) + 1
I̅[N] = I_X, where N is the index of the bin that key(x) belongs to.
If (K[I_X] == K_0), then L_(0) = L_(0) + 1; otherwise, N_I = L_C(1) + L_(1).
I = I̅[:], where I̅ is the rearranged array of indices.
N_I = L_CS[I_B] + L_NS[I_B], where L_CS and L_NS are arrays of locations and sizes, respectively, for each bin (I_B).
L_NS[I_B] = L_NS[I_B] + 1
L_0 = L_0 + 1
I = I̅[:], where I̅ is the rearranged array of indices.
For each bin (I_B), L_NS[I_B] = 0 and L_CS[I_B] = 0.
L_CS[I_B] = L_0_C, where L_0_C is the cumulative sum of sizes (L_NS) for each bin (I_B).
Allocate arrays L_CS and L_NS with size N_B.
Deallocate arrays I̅_B and I̅.
Find the bin (I_B) that contains key I_X.
L_NS[I_B] = L_NS[I_B] + 1
N_I = L_CS[I_B] + L_NS[I_B], where L_CS and L_NS are arrays of locations and sizes, respectively.
L_NS[I_B] = L_NS[I_B] + 1
Allocate arrays L_CS and L_NS with size N_B.

===== File: ChecksBalancesMod.F90 =====

### Variables:
currentSite (ed_site_type)
el (integer, element index in FATES)
total_stock (real(r8))
litter_stock (real(r8))
biomass_stock (real(r8))
seed_stock (real(r8))
currentPatch (pointer to ed_patch_type)
currentCohort (pointer to ed_cohort_type)
patch_biomass (real(r8))
patch_seed (real(r8))
patch_litter (real(r8))
litt (pointer to litter_type)
element_id (integer)
live_stock (real(r8))
seed_stock (real(r8))
litter_stock (real(r8))
bc_in (bc_in_type)
numlevsoil (integer)

### Equations:
$litter\_stock = 0.0_r8$
$biomass\_stock = 0.0_r8$
$seed\_stock = 0.0_r8$
$currentPatch \leftarrow currentSite \% oldest\_patch$
$\mathrm{do\ while}\left(associated(currentPatch)\right)$
$call PatchMassStock(currentPatch,el,patch\_biomass,patch\_seed,patch\_litter)$
$litter\_stock = litter\_stock + patch\_litter$
$biomass\_stock = biomass\_stock + patch\_biomass$
$seed\_stock = seed\_stock + patch\_seed$
$\mathrm{if}\left(element\_id.equiv.carbon12\_element\right)$
$\mathrm{do\ while}\left(associated(currentCohort)\right)$
$live\_stock = live\_stock - currentCohort \% resp\_m\_def \* currentCohort \% n$
$currentCohort \leftarrow currentCohort \% shorter$
$\mathrm{end\ do}$
$\mathrm{end\ if}$
$total\_stock = biomass\_stock + seed\_stock + litter\_stock$
$litter\_stock = currentPatch \% area \* \left(sum(litt \% ag\_cwd) + sum(litt \% bg\_cwd) + sum(litt \% leaf\_fines) + sum(litt \% root\_fines)\right)$
$seed\_stock = currentPatch \% area \* \left(sum(litt \% seed) + sum(litt \% seed\_germ)\right)$
$live\_stock = 0._r8$
$\mathrm{do\ while}\left(associated(currentCohort)\right)$
$live\_stock = live\_stock + \left(currentCohort \% prt \% GetState(struct\_organ,element\_id) + currentCohort \% prt \% GetState(sapw\_organ,element\_id) + currentCohort \% prt \% GetState(leaf\_organ,element\_id) + currentCohort \% prt \% GetState(fnrt\_organ,element\_id) + currentCohort \% prt \% GetState(store\_organ,element\_id) + currentCohort \% prt \% GetState(repro\_organ,element\_id)\right) \* currentCohort \% n$
$\mathrm{if}\left(element\_id.equiv.carbon12\_element\right)$
$\mathrm{do\ while}\left(associated(currentCohort)\right)$
$live\_stock = live\_stock - currentCohort \% resp\_m\_def \* currentCohort \% n$
$\mathrm{end\ if}$
$\mathrm{end\ do}$
$\mathrm{if}\left(litt \% ag\_cwd(c) < 0._r8\right)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'In\ pool:\ ',c$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Element\ id:\ ',element\_id$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Negative\ AG\ CWD:\ ',litt \% ag\_cwd(c)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'lat/lon:\ ',currentSite \% lat,currentSite \% lon$
$call endrun(msg=errMsg(sourcefile, __LINE__))$
$\mathrm{do}\ ilyr = 1,numlevsoil$
$\mathrm{if}\left(litt \% bg\_cwd(c,ilyr) < 0._r8\right)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'In\ pool:\ ',c$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Soil\ layer:\ ',ilyr$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Element\ id:\ ',element\_id$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Negative\ BG\ CWD:\ ',litt \% bg\_cwd(c,ilyr)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'lat/lon:\ ',currentSite \% lat,currentSite \% lon$
$call endrun(msg=errMsg(sourcefile, __LINE__))$
$\mathrm{end\ if}$
$\mathrm{end\ do}$
$\mathrm{do}\ pft = 1,numpft$
$\mathrm{if}\left(litt \% seed(pft) < 0._r8\right)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'For\ PFT:\ ',pft$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Element\ id:\ ',element\_id$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Negative\ seed\ pool:\ ',litt \% seed(pft)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'lat/lon:\ ',currentSite \% lat,currentSite \% lon$
$call endrun(msg=errMsg(sourcefile, __LINE__))$
$\mathrm{end\ if}$
$\mathrm{end\ do}$
$\mathrm{do}\ dcmpy = 1,ndcmpy$
$\mathrm{if}\left(litt \% leaf\_fines(dcmpy) < 0._r8\right)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'For\ PFT:\ ',pft$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Element\ id:\ ',element\_id$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Negative\ leaf\ fine\ litter:\ ',litt \% leaf\_fines(dcmpy)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'lat/lon:\ ',currentSite \% lat,currentSite \% lon$
$call endrun(msg=errMsg(sourcefile, __LINE__))$
$\mathrm{end\ if}$
$\mathrm{do}\ ilyr = 1,numlevsoil$
$\mathrm{if}\left(litt \% root\_fines(dcmpy,ilyr) < 0._r8\right)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'For\ PFT:\ ',dcmpy$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Soil\ layer:\ ',ilyr$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Element\ id:\ ',element\_id$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'Negative\ leaf\ fine\ litter:\ ',litt \% root\_fines(dcmpy,ilyr)$
$write(fates\_log(),*) 'lat/lon:\ ',currentSite \% lat,currentSite \% lon$
$call endrun(msg=errMsg(sourcefile, __LINE__))$
$\mathrm{end\ if}$
$\mathrm{end\ do}$
$\mathrm{end\ do}$

$z\frac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2} = \sum_{n=1}^{pnmax} ztdtsq(n) \cdot sq(n)$  $\text{where }u \in \left\{grlps1, grt1, grz1, grd1, grfu1, grfv1, grut1, grvt1, grrh1, grlps2, grt2, grz2, grd2, grfu2, grfv2, grut2, grvt2, grrh2\right\}$ (Line 73)

===== File: Test_MpiException.F90 =====

### Variables:
`suite` (SU)
`method` (MET)
`npes` (NPE)
`test_anyExceptions_none` (TAEN)
`numProcesses` (NP)
`this` (TH)
`context` (CON)
`assertionResult` (AR)
`processRank` (PR)
`message` (MSG)

### Equations:
AR = anyExceptions(CON)  $\rightarrow$  AR = ∃EX
AR = assertFalse(∃EX)  →  AR ≠ ∃EX
AR = assertTrue(catch(MSG))  $\rightarrow$  AR = ∃EX
AR = getNumExceptions(CON)  $\rightarrow$  AR = NE
AR = assertEqual(0,NE)  →  AR = (NE = 0)
AR = getNumExceptions(CON)  $\rightarrow$  AR = NE
AR = assertEqual(2,NE)  →  AR = (NE = 2)
AR = catch(MSG)  $\rightarrow$  AR = ∃EX
NE = NE + 1  $\rightarrow$  NE ← NE + 1
AR = assertTrue(catch(MSG))  $\rightarrow$  AR = ∃EX

===== File: LinearInterpolator.F90 =====

### Variables:
numNodes (N)
x (x_i)
y (y_i)
i (i)
location (x_i)
value (y_i)
at (a)
upperLower (l, u)
x1 (x_l)
x2 (x_u)
dx (Δx)
f1 (f_l)
f2 (f_u)

### Equations:
N = size(x)
x_i = location(i)
y_i = value(i)
a = at
1 ≤ l ≤ u ≤ N
x_l < a < x_u or x_l = a or x_u = a
Δx = x_u - x_l
f_l = (x_u - a) / Δx
f_u = 1 - f_l
y(a) = [y_l, y_u] interpolation:
y(a) = y_i for node point (l = u)
y(a) = f_l \* y_l + f_u \* y_u otherwise

### Equations:
$c_{\psi3} = c_2 + \frac{c_1 - c_2}{R_i^~} \cdot \frac{c_{m1}}{c_{m2}}$
$f_c = c_{m1} \cdot a_n^~ - c_{m2} \cdot a_n^~ - c_m0^{-3}$

$f_c' = f_p - f_c$
$s_t = -\frac{f_c'}{\left(\frac{(f_p-f_c)'}{e}\right)}$
$s_t = 0.5\left(-\frac{f_c}{\left(\frac{f_p-f_c}{e}\right)} + a_n^{\sim}\right)$

===== File: par_xsum.F90 =====

### Variables:
grid (G)
im (I)
lim (L)
nprxy_x (N)
offset (O)
ipe (IP)
i (I)
l (L)
ltot (LTOT)
a (A)
sum (SUM)
D0_0 (D0)
rel_diff (RD)
l_a (LA)
a_tmp (ATMP)
sendcount (SC)
recvcount (RC)
write_warning (W)

### Equations:
$\sum_{l=1}^{LTOT}\sum_{i=grid\%ifirstxy}^{grid\%ilastxy} A(i,l) = \text{SUM}(l)$
This equation represents the sum of all entries in array "a" along each row and is stored in output variable "sum".
$\left| \frac{\text{SUM}_\text{reproducible} - \text{SUM}_{\text{old method}}}{|\text{SUM}_{\text{old method}}|} \right| > \text{SHR\_REPROSUM\_RELDIFFMAX}$
This equation is used to check if the "fast" reproducible sum is accurate enough. If not, the old method is used.
$\text{LA}(i+(ipe-1)*L) = A(i+\text{O},l)$
This equation represents the allocation of array "a" into local array "la".
$A_{\text{tmp}}(i) = \sum_{ipe=1}^{N} \text{LA}(i+(ipe-1)*L)$
This equation represents the sum of all entries in local arrays "la" and is stored in output variable "a_tmp".
$\text{SUM}(l) = \text{SUM}(l) + A_{\text{tmp}}(i)$
This equation updates the output variable "sum" by adding the sum of local array "a_tmp".

### Variables:

Thermal conductivity or its derivative (l or dl/dx)

Y-coordinate (y)
Z-coordinate (z)
Heat source term (Q)
Temperature at boundaries (T_BC)

### Equations:
$T(x) = 10\sin(\pi x) + 270$
$\frac{\partial T}{\partial x} = 10 \pi \cos(\pi x)$
$\frac{\partial^2 T}{\partial x^2} = -10\pi^2\sin(\pi x)$
$l(x) = e^{x}$
$\frac{dl}{dx} = e^{x}$

===== File: rayleigh_friction.F90 =====

### Variables:
`rayk0` (k_0)
`pver` (n)
`ztodt` (delta_t)
`tau0` (Tau_0)
`otau0` (1/Tau_0)
`otau` (Omega)
`krange` (Delta_k)
`x` (X)
`raykrange` (K_range)
`raytau0` (Tau_0_top)
`c1`, `c2`, `c3`
`rztodt` (1/delta_t)
`n` (ncol)

### Equations:
`otau(k) = otau0 * (1 + tanh(X)) / 2.` ( Omega_k = (1/Tau_0) * (1 + tanh((k_0 - k)/Delta_k)) / 2 )
`c2 = 1._r8 / (1._r8 + Omega_k * delta_t)`
`c1 = -Omega_k * c2`
`c3 = 0.5_r8 * (1._r8 - c2*c2) * (1/delta_t)`
`u_tend(k,i) = - c1 * u(k,i)`
`v_tend(k,i) = - c1 * v(k,i)`
`s_tend(k,i) = - c3 * (u(k,i)**2 + v(k,i)**2)`

===== File: ice_warnings.F90 =====

### Variables:

char_len_long (cLL)
nWarningsArray (nWA)
iWarning (iW)
warning (w)
warnings (Ws)
nWarningsOut (nWO)
warning (w)

### Equations:
NWarnings = 0
∅
Ws(nWB) = ∅
∀i ∈ {1, ..., nWB}: Ws(i) = ""
nWA = |Ws|
∃i ∈ {1, ..., nWA}: Ws(i) ≠ "" and ∀j ∈ {nWA+1, ..., nWB}: Ws(j) = ∅
nWA < nWB
Wtmp(nWA) = ∅
∀i ∈ {1, ..., nWA}: Wtmp(i) = ""
∀i ∈ {1, ..., nWA}: Wtmp(i) = trim(Ws(i))
Ws(∅)
Ws(nWB) = ∅
∀i ∈ {1, ..., nWA+nWB}: Ws(i) = ""
∀i ∈ {1, ..., nWA}: Ws(i) = trim(Wtmp(i))
Wtmp(∅)
NWarnings = nWB
Ws(nWB+1) = trim(w)
nWO = NWarnings

================================================================================

===== File: prescribed_ozone.F90 =====

### Variables:
`pcols` (P_cols)
`pver` (P_ver)
`begchunk` (Beg_chunk)
`endchunk` (End_chunk)
`mwdry` (M_wdry)
`boltz` (Boltz)
`molmass` (Mol_mass)
`amass` (A_mass)
`ncol` (N_col)
`c` (Chunk_index)
`state` (Physics_state)

### Equations:
$\frac{m_wdry \times Boltz \times T}{A_{mass} \times PMIDDry} = To_{MMR}$
where $T$ is temperature and $PMIDDry$ is dry air pressure.
$To_{MMR} \cdot Mol_mass = TMPPTR$
where $TMPPTR$ is a temporary pointer to the buffer data.
$(A_{mass}/Mol_mass) \cdot TMPPTR = OutData$
where $OutData$ is the output data for the ozone field.
$Ozone\_Field = Ozone\_Field \times To_{MMR}$
where $Ozone\_Field$ is the ozone field in the buffer.

For loop iterating over datasets:
$\text{For } i = 1 \ldots ndatasets:$
$dataset = \text{h5dcreate}_f(file, name, datatype, filespace)$
$\text{Verify return value of } dataset$
$lnames(i) = \text{name}$
Loop iterating over group iteration:
$\text{For } i = 0: \text{Until error or idx > ndatasets+2}:$
$ret\_value = \text{h5literate}_f(file, H5_INDEX_NAME_F, H5_ITER_INC_F, idx, f1, f2)$
$\text{Verify return value of } ret\_value$
$\text{Increment idx and i}$
Logic for verifying index and name retrieval:
$idx = \text{i + 10}$
$\text{Verify that } idx \leq ndatasets+2$
$\text{Verify that } lnames(INT(idx)) \neq \text{NULL}$

===== File: geometry_mod.F90 =====

### Variables:
elem (Element)
nelemd (Integer)
par (Parallel_t)
gp (Quadrature_t)
i, j (Integer)
area_elem (Real)
area_dummy (Real)
sum_w (Real)
delta (Real)
tol_local (Real)
dp (Real)
x (Real)
y (Real)

### Equations:
The geometric area of the domain is given by $4\pi R$, where $R$ is the radius of the sphere. However, this equation is not explicitly present in the code.
The numerical area of an element is computed as the sum of the integration weights: $\sum_{i,j} w_iw_j \det(e_{ij}) = 0.0d0$. (Equation 1)
The ratio of the geometric area to the numerical area is calculated using repro_sum: $ratio = \frac{\text{geometric area}}{\text{numerical area}}$. (Equation 2)
The correction for the element's area is applied by modifying its inner integration weights: $\sum_{i,j} w_iw_j \det(e_{ij}) + \delta \sum_{i,j} w_iw_j = 0.0d0$, where $\delta$ is a small value. (Equation 3)
The corrected area of an element is given by $area_{corrected} = \frac{4\pi R}{ratio}$, but this equation is not explicitly present in the code.
In the case of the plane geometry, the numerical area of an element is computed as $\sum_{i,j} w_iw_j \det(e_{ij}) = dx dy$. (Equation 4)
The correction for the element's area is applied by modifying its inner integration weights: $dx dy + \delta \sum_{i,j} w_iw_j = 0.0d0$, where $\delta$ is a small value. (Equation 5)

================================================================================

===== File: advect_mom.F90 =====

### Variables:
Time (t)
Number of grid points (N)
Grid spacing (dx, dy, dz)
Horizontal velocity components (U, V)
Vertical velocity component (W)
Density (ρ)
Mass flux in x-direction (∂ρ/∂x)
Mass flux in y-direction (∂ρ/∂y)
Mass flux in z-direction (∂ρ/∂z)
Momentum (ρu, ρv, ρw)

### Equations:
Mass continuity equation: ∇⋅(ρ\mathbf{v}) + \frac{\partial\rho}{\partial t} = 0
Momentum equation in x-direction: \rho\frac{Du}{Dt} = -\frac{\partial p}{\partial x} + \nu\nabla^2u
Momentum equation in y-direction: \rho\frac{Dv}{Dt} = -\frac{\partial p}{\partial y} + \nu\nabla^2v
Momentum equation in z-direction: \rho\frac{Dw}{Dt} = -\frac{\partial p}{\partial z} + \nu\nabla^2w

$\boxed{need_to_pack = .false.}$ (NP = FALSE )

$\boxed{case (L2E_STATE_CARBON_POOLS_VERTICALLY_RESOLVED)}$
$\boxed{do fc = 1, num_filter}$ (FC = 1 → FC ≤ NF)
$\boxed{c = filter(fc)}$ (C = F(FC))

$\boxed{enddo}$ (J ≥ 1 → J ≤ NL)
$\boxed{enddo}$ (FC ≥ 1 → FC ≤ NF)
$\boxed{case (E2L_STATE_CARBON_POOLS_VERTICALLY_RESOLVED)}$
$\boxed{do fc = 1, num_filter}$ (FC = 1 → FC ≤ NF )
$\boxed{c = filter(fc)}$ (C = F(FC) )

$\boxed{enddo}$ (K ≥ 1 → K ≤ NDP)
$\boxed{enddo}$ (J ≥ 1 → J ≤ NL)
$\boxed{enddo}$ (FC ≥ 1 → FC ≤ NF )

### Variables:

### Equations:
num_rrtmg_levs = count( pref_edge(:) > 1._r8 ) ! pascals (1.e-2 mbar)
tint(i,k) = pstate%t(i,k) - dy * (pstate%t(i,k) - pstate%t(i,k-1))
rstate%pintmb(:ncol,k) = pstate%pint(:ncol,kk) * 1.e-2_r8
rstate%pmidmb(:ncol,k) = pstate%pmid(:ncol,kk) * 1.e-2_r8
rstate%tlay(:ncol,k) = pstate%t(:ncol,kk)
rstate%tlev(:ncol,k) = tint(:ncol,kk)
rstate%pmidmb(:ncol,1) = 0.5_r8 * rstate%pintmb(:ncol,2)
rstate%pintmb(:ncol,1) = 1.e-4_r8
h2ovmr = (sp_hum / (1._r8 - sp_hum)) * amdw
o3vmr = o3 * amdo
co2vmr = co2 * amdc
ch4vmr = ch4 * amdm
o2vmr = o2 * amdo2
n2ovmr = n2o * amdn
cfc11vmr = cfc11 * amdc1
cfc12vmr = cfc12 * amdc2

===== File: viscosity_theta.F90 =====

### Variables:

vtheta_dp (θ)

### Equations:

θ' = ∇⋅(V∇θ)    ! Equation 2
w' = ∇⋅(V∇w)     ! Equation 3

===== File: H5VLff.F90 =====

### Variables:
`name` (Name)
`vol_id` (Volume ID)
`hdferr` (HDF Error Flag)
`vipl_id` (Virtual Object Layer ID)
`registered` (Registration Status)
`c_name` (C String Name)
`l` (Length)
`obj_id` (Object ID)
`value` (Value)

### Equations:
$v_{\text{vol}} = H5VLregister\_connector\_by\_name(n, v_{\text{vipl}}, c_{n})$
$H5VLregister\_connector\_by\_name(n, v_{\text{vipl}}, c_{n})$ is the Fortran function to register a VOL connector by name.
$v_{\text{vol}}$ is the volume ID.
$n$ is the connector name.
$v_{\text{vipl}}$ is the virtual object layer ID.
$c_{n}$ is the null-terminated string of the connector name.

$H5VLregister_connector\_by\_value(cv, v_{\text{vipl}}, c_{cv})$ is the Fortran function to register a VOL connector by value.
$v_{\text{vol}}$ is the volume ID of the connector.
$c_{cv}$ is the integer value of the connector.
$H5VLis_connector\_registered\_by\_name(cn) = r$
$r$ represents whether the VOL class has been registered according to a specified connector name or not.
$H5VLis_connector\_registered\_by\_value(cv) = r$
$r$ represents whether the VOL class has been registered according to a specified connector value (ID) or not.

===== File: ecacnpBGCDecompType.F90 =====

### Variables:
`o_scalar` (Oscalar)
`w_scalar` (Wscalar)
`t_scalar` (Tscalar)
`depth_scalar` (Depthscalar)
`Q10` (Q10)
`froz_q10` (Frozq10)
`decomp_depth_efolding` (Decompdepthefolding)
`minpsi` (Minpsi)
`k_m_o2` (Kmo2)
`vmax_decomp_n` (Vmaxdecompn)
`vmax_decomp_p` (Vmaxdecompp)
`latacc` (Latacc)
`temp` (Temp)
`depz` (Depz)
`o2_w2b` (O2w2b)
`sucsat` (Sucsat)
`soilpsi` (Soilpsi)

### Equations:
`Tscalar = Q10**((Temp-(SHR_CONST_TKFRZ+25._r8))/10._r8)`
Tscalar ≡ t_scalar
Temp ≡ temp
SHR_CONST_TKFRZ ≡ TKfrz ( Freezing point in degrees C)
`Tscalar = (Q10**(-25._r8/10._r8))*(Frozq10**((Temp-SHR_CONST_TKFRZ)/10._r8))`
Temp < TKfrz
Tscalar ≡ t_scalar
Temp ≡ temp
`Tscalar = Tscalar * (Catanf(Tref)/Catanf_30) / (Q10**((Tref-25._r8)/10._r8))`
Tscalar ≡ t_scalar
Catanf_30 ≡ catanf(30._r8)
Q10 ≡ q10
Tref ≡ normalization_tref (Reference temperature for normalization in degrees C)
`Wscalar = log(Minpsi/Psi)/log(Minpsi/Maxpsi)`
Wscalar ≡ w_scalar
Minpsi ≡ minpsi
Maxpsi ≡ sucsat * (-9.8e-6_r8) (kg -> MPa)
Psi ≡ min(soilpsi, Maxpsi)
`Oscalar = max(O2w/(O2w+Kmo2),1.e-20_r8)`
Oscalar ≡ o_scalar
O2w ≡ o2b / o2_w2b
Kmo2 ≡ k_m_o2
`Depthscalar = exp(-Depz/Decompdepthefolding)`
Depthscalar ≡ depth_scalar
Depz ≡ depz
Decompdepthefolding ≡ decomp_depth_efolding

St(1) ≤ Gd(1) AND St(2) ≤ Gd(2) AND St(3) ≤ Gd(3)
Ct = Gd - St + 1
i ∈ {1, 2, 3}, Ct(i) = Gd(i) - St(i) + 1
PC ≥ (NlPS / Rk) * NSl
C ∈ {0, 1, ...}, found = .FALSE., do C = 1, NlPS; if (Np ≥ PC); then
PC = CEILING(NlPS / RANK) * CEILING(NSl / C)
St = (/ mod(Rk, CEILING(NlPS/RK)) * C, 0, INT(Rk/CEILING(NlPS/RK)) * C /)
call adjust_bounds(Dt, St, Ct, Rk)
if (PC == Np); then found = .TRUE.; end if
PC ≤ CEILING(NlPS / Rk) * CEILING(NSl / SlbC)
do C = 1, NlPS; if (Np ≥ PC); then
PC = CEILING(NlPS / REAL(C)) * CEILING(NSl / REAL(SlbC))
St = (/ 0, mod(Rk, CEILING(NlPS/REAL(C))) * C, INT(Rk/CEILING(NlPS/REAL(C))) * SlbC /)
call adjust_bounds(Dt, St, Ct, Rk)
Np = PC
if (found); then exit end if
Is = (/0, 0, 0/)
St > Gd
Ct(1) = Gd(1) - St(1) + 1
Ct(1) = Gd(1) - St(1) + 1
Ct(2) = Gd(2) - St(2) + 1
Ct(2) = Gd(2) - St(2) + 1

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial T}{\partial t} = \frac{delps(i)h_y(k+1)(T_{i,k+1}-T_{i,k})pint(i,plevp)}{2pdelp(i,k)}$ [where $k=1$, and $h_y$ is a coefficient]
$\frac{\partial T}{\partial t} = \frac{delps(i)h_y(k)(T_{i,k}-T_{i,k-1})pint(i,plevp)}{2pdelp(i,k)}$ [where $k=KLEV$, and $h_y$ is a coefficient]
$\frac{\partial T}{\partial t} = \frac{delps(i)h_y(k+1)(T_{i,k+1}-T_{i,k})pint(i,plevp)}{2pdelp(i,k)} + \frac{delps(i)h_y(k)(T_{i,k}-T_{i,k-1})pint(i,plevp)}{2pdelp(i,k)}$ [where $1<k<KLEV$, and $h_y$ is a coefficient]
$\frac{\partial T}{\partial t} = \frac{T_{i,k}-t(i,k) + tcor(i,k)}{ztodt}$ [added to the diffusive heating term, where $tcor$ is the temperature correction term]
$t(i,k) = t(i,k) - ztodt \left( u(i,k)\udif(i,k) + v(i,k)\vdif(i,k) \right)/\left(cpair \times (1+cpvirqsave(i,k)) \right)$ [to conserve internal energy]
$\frac{\partial T}{\partial t} = \frac{-u(i,k)\udif(i,k) - v(i,k)\vdif(i,k)}{cpair(1 + cpvir qsave(i,k))}$ [added to the diffusive heating term, to conserve internal energy]

`h5dset_extent_f(dset_id, size, error)`: This operation sets the extent of a dataset. If we consider the original extent as (3, 3), then the new extent will be (size(1), size(2)).
`H5dread_f(dset_id, H5T_NATIVE_INTEGER, rdata, data_dims, error, memspace, dataspace)`: This operation reads data from a dataset. If we consider the original extent as (3, 10), then the read buffer will be filled with data starting from the offset (0, 3) and up to a maximum count of (3, 7).
size(1:2) = (/3,10/) => new_extent = (size(1), size(2))
rdata(:, :) = h5dread_f(dset_id, H5T_NATIVE_INTEGER, data_dims)

### Equations:
`finundated_col` (Level of the column, cc): Real value
Equation: `finundated_col(cc) = finundated_col(cc)` (cc = 1)
Simplified: `finundated(col 1) = L2E_STATE_FRAC_INUNDATED(level 1)`
Superscript and subscript:
Finundated_col^cc = L2E_STATE_FRAC_INUNDATED^c
Equation: `H2OSOI_LIQ_COL^cc(lbj:ubj) = L2E_STATE_H2OSOI_LIQ_NLEVSOI^c(lbj:ubj)`

ρ_vap (cc, lbj:ubj) = ϕ(vap)
q_soil_col (cc) = φ(ρ_vap, h2osoi_vol, smp_l)
θ (cc, lbj:ubj) = ψ(h2osoi_liq, h2osoi_ice, h2osoi_liqvol, h2osoi_icevol)
ϕ (cc, lbj:ubj) = χ(θ, q_soil_col)
Variables:
ϕ (saturation vapor pressure)
Notation: ϕ = χ(θ, q_soil_col)
Variables:
θ (soil moisture content)
q_soil_col (soil column water flux)
Notation: θ = χ(q_soil_col)
Variables:
T (soil temperature)
Notation: T = χ(θ, q_soil_col)
Variables:
Rn (net radiation flux)
LE (latent heat flux)
H (sensible heat flux)
G (ground heat flux)
Notation: Rn = χ(LE, H, G)
Variables:
P (precipitation flux)
ET (evapotranspiration flux)
R (runoff flux)
Notation: P = χ(ET, R)

Equation: $f_{inundated}^{col}(cc) = f_{inundated}(c)$

Equation: $f_{h2o}^{col}(cc) = f_{h2o}(c)$

$\frac{\partial u_{\text{esmt}}}{\partial t} = - \nabla \cdot (\mathbf{u}_{\text{esmt}}) + ESMT_OFFSET$
$u_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) = u_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) + ESMT_OFFSET(icrm)$
$\nabla \cdot (\mathbf{u}_{\text{esmt}}) = - \frac{\partial u}{\partial x} - \frac{\partial v}{\partial y}$
$v_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) = v_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) + ESMT_OFFSET(icrm)$
$\nabla \cdot (\mathbf{v}_{\text{esmt}}) = - \frac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \frac{\partial v}{\partial x}$
$u_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) = u_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) - ESMT_OFFSET(icrm)$
$v_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) = v_{\text{esmt}}(i, j, k, icrm) - ESMT_OFFSET(icrm)$

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial Y}{\partial t} = - \frac{\partial F}{z}$ (Equation 2.1)
$\frac{\partial Y}{t} = - w\partial_{z}Y$ (Equation 2.2)
$F_i^{n+1} = Y_i^n - \frac{\Delta t}{h_i} (F_i^n - F_{i-1}^n)$
$Y_i$ (Y)

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial Y}{\partial t} = -w \frac{\partial Y}{\partial z}$
$Y$ (Y)
$z$ ($Z$)
$w$ (WW)

### Equations:
$dp(k) = \left(hyai(k+1)-hyai(k)\right)ps0 + \left(hybi(k+1)-hybi(k)\right)ps_v$
$\sum_{k=1}^{nlev} dp(k) = \left(hyai(nlev+1)-hyai(1)\right)ps0 + \left(hybi(nlev+1)-hybi(1)\right)ps_v$
$ps_v = ps0+\sum_{k=1}^{nlev} dp(k)$
$dp_star(k) = dp(k) + dt_q\left(\eta_dot_dpdn(i,j,k+1) - \eta_dot_dpdn(i,j,k)\right)$
$\frac{dp_star(k)-dp(k)}{dt_q} = \eta_dot_dpdn(i,j,k+1) - \eta_dot_dpdn(i,j,k)$
$P_S_V_NP1 = H_Y_AI_1 P_S0 + \sum_{k=1}^{nlev} dp(k)$
$\frac{\delta_t}{2}\left(\eta_dot_dpdn(i,j,k+1) - \eta_dot_dpdn(i,j,k)\right) = \frac{dp_star(k)-dp(k)}{\delta_t}$
$T_{remapped} = T_{initial} \cdot dp_star$
$V_x_{remapped} = V_x_{initial} \cdot dp_star$
$Q_{remapped} = Q_{dp} \div dp_star$

### Variables:

`value` (i32)

`i` (i32)
`j` (i32)
`jp` (i32)

### Equations:
1: \[ isActive = \begin{cases}
2: \[ getNumProcesses = MPI\_Comm\_size(mpiCommunicator) \]
3: \[ processRank = MPI\_Comm\_rank(mpiCommunicator) \]
4: \[ isRootProcess = (root == processRank()) \]
5: \[ newCommunicator = MPI\_Comm\_create(mpiCommunicator, newGroups(1), ier) \]
6: \[ subContext\%mpiCommunicator = newCommunicator \]
7: \[ barrier = MPI\_barrier(mpiCommunicator) \]
8: \[ sum = tmp \]
9: \[ tmp = MPI\_Allreduce(value, tmp, 1, MPI\_INTEGER, MPI\_SUM, mpiCommunicator) \]
10: \[ makeMap = Mpi\_AllGather(numEntries, counts, displacements, MPI\_INTEGER, MPI\_Integer, mpiCommunicator) \]
11: \[ gatherString = Mpi\_GatherV(sendBuffer, numEntries, MPI\_CHARACTER, recvBuffer, counts, displacements, MPI\_CHARACTER, root, mpiCommunicator) \]
12: \[ gatherInteger = Mpi\_allGatherV(values, size(values), MPI\_INTEGER, list, counts, displacements, MPI\_INTEGER, mpiCommunicator) \]
13: \[ gatherLogical = Mpi\_AllGatherV(values_, size(values), MPI\_LOGICAL, list, counts, displacements, MPI\_LOGICAL, mpiCommunicator) \]
14: \[ allReduce = MPI\_Allreduce(q, anyQ, 1, MPI\_LOGICAL, MPI\_LOR, mpiCommunicator) \]
15: \[ clean = MPI\_Comm\_free(mpiCommunicator, ier) \]

===== File: mo_solar_parms.F90 =====

### Variables:
`ntimes` (NTIMES)
`tim_ndx` (TIM_NDX)
`dates` (DATE)
`dels` (DELs)
`times` (TIME)
`f107` (F107)
`f107a` (F107A)
`kp` (KP)
`ap` (AP)
`yr` (YR)
`mon` (MON)
`day` (DAY)
`ncsec` (NCSEC)
`wrk_date` (WRK_DATE)
`wrk_time` (WRK_TIME)
`n` (N)
`astat` (ASTAT)
`ierr` (IERR)
`unitn` (UNITN)
`locfn` (LOCFN)

### Equations:
DELs = (WRK_TIME - TIMES(TIM_NDX))/(TIMES(TIM_NDX+1) - TIMES(TIM_NDX)) (DELs ≡ Δt)
WRK_DATE = 10000*YR + 100*MON + DAY (WRK_DATE ≡ date)
WRK_TIME = FLT_DATE(WRK_DATE, 0) (WRK_TIME ≡ time)
TIM_NDX = N - 1 (TIM_NDX ≡ index of closest previous time step)
F107_S = F107(TIM_NDX) + DELs*(F107(NP) - F107(TIM_NDX)) (F107_S ≡ solar EUV factor)
F107A_S = F107A(TIM_NDX) + DELs*(F107A(NP) - F107A(TIM_NDX)) (F107A_S ≡ averaged solar EUV factor)
KP_S = KP(TIM_NDX) + DELs*(KP(NP) - KP(TIM_NDX)) (KP_S ≡ solar magnetic field factor)
AP_S = AP(TIM_NDX) + DELs*(AP(NP) - AP(TIM_NDX)) (AP_S ≡ solar magnetic field factor)
HP_S = MAX(3._R8,-2.78_R8 + 9.39_R8*KP_S) (HP_S ≡ hemispheric power)

`ka(i,j,l) = kao(i,j,no27)`

`kb(i,j,l) = kbo(i,j,no27)`

`absa(j,l) = ka(1,1,l)` and `ka(1,1,l) = absa(j,l)`

KA_subscript_1 _subscript_1 _superscript_l = ABSA_superscript_j _subscript_l
`absb(j,l) = kb(1,13,l)` and `kb(1,13,l) = absb(j,l)`

`rayl(l) = raylo(no27)`

===== File: gw_utils.F90 =====

### Variables:

v (V-component of a vector)
mag (Magnitude of a vector)

### Equations:
$mag = \sqrt{u^2 + v^2}$  (1)
$u_n = \frac{u}{\sqrt{u^2 + v^2}}$  (2)
$v_n = \frac{v}{\sqrt{u^2 + v^2}}$  (3)
$\text{dot}_\text{2d} = u_1u_2 + v_1v_2$  (4)

===== File: marbl_ciso_surface_flux_mod.F90 =====

### Variables:

eps_k (E_K)
alpha_k_14c (AK_14)
alpha_aq_g_surf_14c (AQS_14)
alpha_dic_g_surf_14c (ADS_14)

### Equations:
R13C_atm = R13C_std * ( 1 + D13C / c1000 )
R14C_atm = R14C_std * ( 1 + D14C / c1000 )
where ( dic /= c0 ) R13C_dic = TAS(:,di13c_ind) / DIC
where ( dic /= c0 ) R14C_dic = TAS(:,di14c_ind) / DIC
eps_aq_g_surf = 0.0049 * SST - 1.31
eps_dic_g_surf = 0.014 * SST * CO3_SURF_fields / DIC - 0.105 * SST + 10.53
alpha_k = 1 + eps_k / c1000
alpha_aq_g_surf = 1 + eps_aq_g_surf / c1000
alpha_dic_g_surf = 1 + eps_dic_g_surf / c1000
alpha_k_14c = 1 + eps_k * 2.0 / c1000
alpha_aq_g_surf_14c = 1 + eps_aq_g_surf * 2.0 / c1000
alpha_dic_g_surf_14c = 1 + eps_dic_g_surf * 2.0 / c1000
flux13 = PV * alpha_k * alpha_aq_g_surf * ((co2star + dco2star) * R13C_atm - co2star * R13C_dic / alpha_dic_g_surf)
flux14 = PV * alpha_k_14c * alpha_aq_g_surf_14c * ((co2star + dco2star) * R14C_atm - co2star * R14C_dic / alpha_dic_g_surf_14c)
flux13_as = PV * alpha_k * alpha_aq_g_surf * ((co2star + dco2star) * R13C_atm)
flux14_as = PV * alpha_k_14c * alpha_aq_g_surf_14c * ((co2star + dco2star) * R14C_atm)
flux13_sa = PV * alpha_k * alpha_aq_g_surf * (co2star * R13C_dic / alpha_dic_g_surf)
flux14_sa = PV * alpha_k_14c * alpha_aq_g_surf_14c * (co2star * R14C_dic / alpha_dic_g_surf_14c)
num_elements (NEL)
surface_flux_forcing_ind (SFIND)
surface_flux_forcings (SFORC)
tracers_at_surface (TASURF)
surface_fluxes (SFLUX)
marbl_tracer_indices (MTI)
marbl_surface_flux_share (MSFS)
marbl_surface_flux_diags (MFDIAG)
sst (SATMP)
d13c (DC13C)
d14c (DC14C)
dic (DICE)
co2star (CO2STAR)
dco2star (DCO2STAR)
co3_surf_fields (COSURF)
pv (PVSURF)
eps_k (EPSK)
alpha_k (ALK)
alpha_aq_g_surf (AAQS)
alpha_dic_g_surf (ADGS)
eps_aq_g_surf (EAQG)
eps_dic_g_surf (EDICS)
frac_co3 (FCO3)
R13C_atm (R13ATM)
R14C_atm (R14ATM)
R13C_dic (R13DIC)
R14C_dic (R14DIC)

### Equations:
$\\boxed{R13C_{atm} = R13C_{std} * \\left( 1 + \\frac{d13c}{1000}\\right)}$
$\\boxed{R14C_{atm} = R14C_{std} * \\left( 1 + \\frac{d14c}{1000}\\right)}$
$\\boxed{eps_aq_g_surf = 0.0049 * satmp - 1.31}$
$\\boxed{eps_dic_g_surf = 0.014 * satmp * fco3 - 0.105 * satmp + 10.53}$
$\\boxed{\alpha_k = 1 + \\frac{eps_k}{1000}}$
$\\boxed{\alpha_aq_g_surf = 1 + \\frac{eps_aq_g_surf}{1000}}$
$\\boxed{\alpha_dic_g_surf = 1 + \\frac{eps_dic_g_surf}{1000}}$
$\\boxed{\alpha_k_{14c} = 1 + 2 * \\frac{eps_k}{1000}}$
$\\boxed{\alpha_aq_g_surf_{14c} = 1 + 2 * \\frac{eps_aq_g_surf}{1000}}$
$\\boxed{\alpha_dic_g_surf_{14c} = 1 + 2 * \\frac{eps_dic_g_surf}{1000}}$
$\\boxed{flux13 = pvsurf * \alpha_k * \alpha_aq_g_surf * ((co2star + dco2star) * r13atm - co2star * r13dic / \alpha_dic_g_surf)}$
$\\boxed{flux14 = pvsurf * \alpha_k_{14c} * \alpha_aq_g_surf_{14c} * ((co2star + dco2star) * r14atm - co2star * r14dic / \alpha_dic_g_surf_{14c})}$
$\\boxed{flux13_as = pvsurf * \alpha_k * \alpha_aq_g_surf * (co2star + dco2star) * r13atm}$
$\\boxed{flux14_as = pvsurf * \alpha_k_{14c} * \alpha_aq_g_surf_{14c} * (co2star + dco2star) * r14atm}$
$\\boxed{flux13_sa = pvsurf * \alpha_k * \alpha_aq_g_surf * co2star * r13dic / \alpha_dic_g_surf}$
$\\boxed{flux14_sa = pvsurf * \alpha_k_{14c} * \alpha_aq_g_surf_{14c} * co2star * r14dic / \alpha_dic_g_surf_{14c}}$

### Equations:
minVal = min(array) (minVal ≡ min(array))
anyValsLessThan = (minVal < check_value) (anyValsLessThan ⇔ minVal < check_value)
maxValue = max(array) (maxValue ≡ max(array))
anyValsOutside = minValue < checkMin .or. maxValue > checkMax (anyValsOutside ⇔ (minValue < checkMin) ∨ (maxValue > checkMax))
extentsAre1D = size(array, 1) == n1 (extentsAre1D ⇐⇒ size(array, 1) ≡ n1)
extentsAre2D = size(array, 1) == n1 .and. size(array, 2) == n2 (extentsAre2D ⇐⇒ (size(array, 1) ≡ n1) ∧ (size(array, 2) ≡ n2))
extentsAre3D = size(array, 1) == n1 .and. size(array, 2) == n2 .and. size(array, 3) == n3 (extentsAre3D ⇐⇒ (size(array, 1) ≡ n1) ∧ (size(array, 2) ≡ n2) ∧ (size(array, 3) ≡ n3))
extentsAre4D = size(array, 1) == n1 .and. size(array, 2) == n2 .and. size(array, 3) == n3 .and. size(array, 4) == n4 (extentsAre4D ⇐⇒ (size(array, 1) ≡ n1) ∧ (size(array, 2) ≡ n2) ∧ (size(array, 3) ≡ n3) ∧ (size(array, 4) ≡ n4))
extentsAre5D = size(array, 1) == n1 .and. size(array, 2) == n2 .and. size(array, 3) == n3 .and. size(array, 4) == n4 .and. size(array, 5) == n5 (extentsAre5D ⇐⇒ (size(array, 1) ≡ n1) ∧ (size(array, 2) ≡ n2) ∧ (size(array, 3) ≡ n3) ∧ (size(array, 4) ≡ n4) ∧ (size(array, 5) ≡ n5))
extentsAre6D = size(array, 1) == n1 .and. size(array, 2) == n2 .and. size(array, 3) == n3 .and. size(array, 4) == n4 .and. size(array, 5) == n5 .and. size(array, 6) == n6 (extentsAre6D ⇐⇒ (size(array, 1) ≡ n1) ∧ (size(array, 2) ≡ n2) ∧ (size(array, 3) ≡ n3) ∧ (size(array, 4) ≡ n4) ∧ (size(array, 5) ≡ n5) ∧ (size(array, 6) ≡ n6))
extentsAre2DInt = size(array, 1) == n1 .and. size(array, 2) == n2

===== File: rrtmg_lw_cldprop.f90 =====

### Variables:

### Equations:
$taucloud_{lay,ib} = 0.0_r8$ (i=1,nbndlw, j=1,nlayers)
$\text{if}( \text{cldfrac}_{\text{lay}} .ge. cldmin \land (\text{cw} .ge. cldmin \lor \text{tauctot}_{\text{lay}} .ge. cldmin) )$
$\text{if}( \text{inflag} == 0 )$
$\text{if}( \text{inflag} == 1 )$
$\text{if}( \text{inflag} == 2 )$
Calculation of absorption coefficients due to ice clouds.
nlayers (NL)
inflag (IF)
iceflag (ICEFLAG)
liqflag (LIQFLAG)
cldfrac (CLOUD FRACTION)
tauc (TAU C)
ciwp (CIWP)
clwp (CLWP)
rei (REI)
dge (DGE)
rel (REL)
ncbands (N BANDS)
taucloud (TAU CLOUD)
cwp (CWP)
radliq (RADIUS LIQUID)
radice (RADIUS ICE)
dgeice (GENERALIZED EFFECTIVE SIZE ICE)
abscoice (ABS COICE)
abscoliq (ABS COLIQ)
factor (FACTOR)
fint (FIN T)
tauctot (TAU COT)

### Equations:
$\tau_{cloud} = \sum_{ib=1}^{nbndlw} \tau_{c}(lay,ib)$
$cwp = ciwp(lay) + clwp(lay)$
$\text{if } cldfrac(lay) \geq cldmin \text{ and } (cwp \geq cldmin \text{ or } tauctot(lay) \geq cldmin)$, then:
$\text{if } inflag = 0$, then $ncbands = 16$ and $\tau_{cloud}(lay,ib) = \tau_{c}(ib,lay)$
$\text{elseif } inflag = 1$, then $ncbands = 16$ and $\tau_{cloud}(lay,ib) = abscld1 \times cwp$
$\text{elseif } inflag = 2$, then:
$\text{if } iceflag = 0$, then $radice = rei(lay)$ and $\abscoice(1) = \absice0(1) + \absice0(2)/radice$
$\text{elseif } iceflag = 1$, then:
$\text{if } radice < 13.0_r8$ or $radice > 130._r8$, stop with an error message
$ncbands = 5$, $abscoice(ib) = \absice1(1,ib) + \absice1(2,ib)/radice$
$\text{elseif } iceflag = 2$, then:
$\text{if } radice < 5.0_r8$, stop with an error message
$\text{if } radice \leq 131._r8$, $factor = (radice-2._r8)/3._r8$, $index = int(factor)$, $fint = factor-int(index)$, $abscoice(ib) = \absice2(index,ib) + fint*(\absice2(index+1,ib)-(\absice2(index,ib)))$
$\text{if } radice > 131._r8$, $abscoice(ib) = \absice0(1) + \absice0(2)/radice$
$\text{elseif } iceflag = 3$, then:
$dgeice = dge(lay)$
$\text{if } dgeice < 5.0_r8$, stop with an error message
$\text{if } dgeice \leq 140._r8$, $factor = (dgeice-2._r8)/3._r8$, $index = int(factor)$, $fint = factor-int(index)$, $abscoice(ib) = \absice3(index,ib) + fint*(\absice3(index+1,ib)-(\absice3(index,ib)))$
$\text{if } dgeice > 140._r8$, $abscoice(ib) = \absice0(1) + \absice0(2)/radice$

cwp = ciwp(lay) + clwp(lay)
abscoice(1) = 0.0_r8
abscoice(1) = absice0(1) + absice0(2)/radice
abscoice(1) = absice1(1,ib) + absice1(2,ib)/radice
abscoice(ib) = absice2(index,ib) + fint * (absice2(index+1,ib) - (absice2(index,ib)))
abscoice(ib) = absice3(index,ib) + fint * (absice3(index+1,ib) - (absice3(index,ib)))
abscoliq(1) = 0.0_r8
abscoliq(1) = absliq0
abscoliq(ib) = absliq1(index,ib) + fint * (absliq1(index+1,ib) - (absliq1(index,ib)))
taucloud(lay,ib) = tauc(ib,lay)
taucloud(lay,ib) = cwp * abscld1
taucloud(lay,ib) = ciwp(lay) * abscoice(ipat(ib,icepat)) + clwp(lay) * abscoliq(ipat(ib,liqpat))

avgdxin = (xin(nxin)-xin(1))/(nxin-1.)

wgtm(im) = (xin(1)        - xout(im)) /dxinwrap
wgtp(im) = (xout(im)+360. - xin(nxin))/dxinwrap
arrout(1,i) = arrin(1,iim(i))*wgtm(i) + arrin(1,iip(i))*wgtp(i)

### Equations:
$\tau_{d,i} = \frac{\tau_{d,i}^0}{1 + a_1 \tau_{d,i}^0}$
Tau: $\tau_d$ is the optical depth, which is used to compute the transmittance of the atmosphere. This equation is for the $i^{th}$ band and $\tau_d^0$ is the absorption optical depth.
$\mu_0 = \cos(\theta_s)$
Mu: $\mu_0$ is the cosine of the solar zenith angle, which can be calculated using trigonometry.
$T_{ij} = T_i e^{-\tau_j}$
Transmission: $T_{ij}$ represents the transmission through layer $j$ for band $i$. This equation uses the Beer-Lambert law to calculate the transmission based on the optical depth $\tau_j$ and the temperature $T_i$.
$\frac{dF}{d\mu_0} = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} B(\nu) e^{-\tau(\nu)} d\nu$
Flux derivative: This equation represents the derivative of flux with respect to solar zenith angle. It is an integral over all wavelengths, including the Planck source function $B(\nu)$, optical depth $\tau(\nu)$, and a differential element $d\nu$.
$F = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} B(\nu) e^{-\tau(\nu)} d\nu$
Flux equation: This represents the total flux as an integral over all wavelengths. It includes the Planck source function $B(\nu)$ and optical depth $\tau(\nu)$.

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial B(\nu,T)}{\partial T} = \frac{B}{T}\left( 5 - x\frac{e^{x}}{(e^x-1)^2}\right)$
$x$ (Planck function)
$B$ (Plank function)

### Equations:
$\sigma B(\nu,T) = \int_0^\infty J_{\lambda} (\nu)  e^{-h\nu/kt} d\nu$
$J_{\lambda}$ (Source function)
$h$ (Planck constant)
$k$ (Boltzmann constant)

### Equations:
$\tau_\alpha(\nu, p,T) = \sum_i \int_0^{\infty}\frac{d\sigma_\nu}{d\nu}  e^{-h\nu/kt}  x_i  d\nu$
$x_i$ (Gas concentration)
$\sigma_\nu$ (Cross-section)

### Equations:
$S(\nu,p,T) = \tau_{scat} (\nu, p,T) / \tau_o (\nu, p,T)$
$S$ (Single-scattering albedo)
$tau_{scat}$ (Scattering optical depth)
$tau_o$ (Total optical depth)

### Equations:
$\tau(\nu,p,T) =\int_0^{\infty} \sigma (\nu, p,T)  x_i d\nu$
$\tau$ (Total optical depth)
$\sigma$ (Cross-section)

### Equations:
$p(\nu) = B(\nu) + \frac{1}{4\pi}\int_0^{\infty} \sigma (\nu, p,T)  x_i d\nu$
$p$ (Radiance)
$B$ (Planck source function)

### Equations:
$\mu_0 = cos(\theta)$
μ₀ (Cosine of solar zenith angle)

### Equations:

τₖᵢ (Optical depth for kth gas at ith layer)
σᵏ (Cross-section of kth gas)
xᵢ (Concentration of gases in the atmosphere)

### Equations:

### Equations:
$\tau = \frac{p}{p_0}$
Tau ($\tau$) is calculated as the ratio of pressure $p$ to reference pressure $p_0$
$ssa = \frac{\tau}{1-\tau}$
Single-scattering albedo $ssa$ is calculated using optical properties $optical\_props$, tau $\tau$
$g = \frac{ssa}{\tau} + (1-ssa)$
Asymmetry parameter $g$ is calculated using single-scattering albedo $ssa$ and tau $\tau$
$F_{up}(b) = F_{toa}(b) \times \mu_0(b)$
Upward flux $F_up$ for band $b$ is calculated as the product of total upward flux $F_toa$ at top of atmosphere and cosine of solar zenith angle $\mu_0$
$F_{dn}(b) = F_{toa}(b) \times (1-\mu_0(b)) + F_sfc(b)$
Downward flux $F_dn$ for band $b$ is calculated as the sum of downward flux at top of atmosphere multiplied by cosine of solar zenith angle and surface flux $F_sfc$
$\tau_{ij} = \sum_k a_{ijk} \left( 1 + b_{ijk} x_k \right)^{-c_{ijk}}$
$\omega_{ij} = \sum_k d_{ijk} \left( 1 + e_{ijk} x_k \right)^{-f_{ijk}}$
$g_{ij} = \sum_k h_{ijk} \left( 1 + i_{ijk} x_k \right)^{-j_{ijk}}$
$\mu_0 = \cos(\theta)$

$ RlocalA = ParScatter( CommGlobal, 0, Rglobal, DecompA )$
$ RedistributeCreate( DecompA, DecompB, InterAB )$
$ RlocalB = RedistributePerform( InterAB, .TRUE., RlocalA, RlocalB )$
$ RlocalA = 0.0_r8 $
$ RlocalA = RedistributePerform( InterAB, .FALSE., RlocalB, RlocalA )$
$ CALL ParGather( CommGlobal, 0, RlocalA, DecompA, Rtmp )$
$ IF ( GID .eq. 0 ) THEN $
$    Rtmp = Rtmp - Rglobal $
$    IF ( SUM(Rtmp) .ne. 0.0_r8 ) THEN $
$      PRINT *,"RedistributeTest Failed: 1D Gathered ver. != Orig."$
$      Passed = .FALSE.$
$   ENDIF $
$END$
$CALL DecompFree( DecompB )$
$CALL DecompFree( DecompA )$

$y_j = \sum_{i=1}^{npts} A_{ij} x_i$, for $j=1,4,\ldots,npts$
This equation represents the matrix-vector multiplication in the `matvec` subroutine.
$y_{j+1} = \sum_{i=1}^{npts} A_{i,j+1} x_i$, for $j=1,2,\ldots,(npts-4)/4$
This equation represents the matrix-vector multiplication in the `matvec` subroutine.
$y_{j+2} = \sum_{i=1}^{npts} A_{i,j+2} x_i$, for $j=1,2,\ldots,(npts-4)/4$
This equation represents the matrix-vector multiplication in the `matvec` subroutine.
$y_{j+3} = \sum_{i=1}^{npts} A_{i,j+3} x_i$, for $j=1,2,\ldots,(npts-4)/4$
This equation represents the matrix-vector multiplication in the `matvec` subroutine.

This equation represents the remainder of the matrix-vector multiplication in the `matvec` subroutine.
$\text{info} = \text{DGEEV}( 'V', 'V', N, Er, N, lamr, wi, El, N, vr, N, work, lwork, \text{info})$
This equation represents the call to the DGEEV function in the `reigen_solver` function. The output of this function is not explicitly used in the code, so it is not a part of the equations.

### Variables:

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial}{\partial \nu} (\text{KALW}_i(\nu, b) + \text{KBOW}_i(\nu, b)) = 0$
where $i$ is the band index, $b$ is the band number
This equation can be represented as $\frac{\partial}{\partial \nu} (\text{KAOLW}_i(b,i) + \text{KBOWL}_i(b,i)) = 0$
$\text{FRA}_a^{\text{low}} = \text{FRA}_b^{\text{high}} = \frac{\partial}{\partial \nu} (\text{KALW}_{2, i=1}(b) + \text{KBOWL}_{2, i=1}(b)) = 0$
where $a$ and $b$ are the reference frequencies
$\text{SELF}_i^{\text{low}} = \frac{\partial}{\partial \nu} (\text{KAOLW}_i(b,i) + \text{KBOWL}_i(b,i)) = 0$
where $i$ is the band index, $b$ is the band number
$\text{ABS2}_{i,j}^{\text{low}} = \frac{\partial}{\partial \nu} (\text{KALW}_i(b,j) + \text{KBOWL}_i(b,j)) = 0$
where $i$ and $j$ are the band indices, $b$ is the band number
$\text{ABS4}_{i,j}^{\text{high}} = \frac{\partial}{\partial \nu} (\text{KALW}_i(b,j) + \text{KBOWL}_i(b,j)) = 0$
where $i$ and $j$ are the band indices, $b$ is the band number
$\text{FRA}_a^{\text{low}} - \text{FRA}_b^{\text{high}} = 0$

===== File: cldaero_mod.F90 =====

### Variables:
`xl` (Liquid Water Volume)
`cldnum` (Drop Number Concentration)
`cfact` (Correction Factor)
`cldfrc` (Cloud Droplet Radius Fraction)
`tfld` (Temperature in Kelvin)
`press` (Pressure in Pascals)
`rad_cd` (Drop Radius)
`num_cd` (Drop Number Concentration in 1/cm^3)
`radxnum_cd` (Product of Drop Radius and Drop Number Concentration)
`volx34pi_cd` ((3/4*pi) * Liquid Water Volume in cm^3/cm^3)
`gasdiffus` (H2SO4 Gas Diffusivity from Mosaic Code, cm^2/s)
`gasspeed` (H2SO4 Gas Mean Molecular Speed from Mosaic Code, cm/s)
`knudsen` (Knudsen Number)
`fuchs_sutugin` (Fuchs-Sutugin Correction Factor)
`uptkrate` (Instantaneous Uptake Rate)

### Equations:
$\text{num\_cd} = 1.0e-3_r8 \cdot cldnum \cdot cfact / cldfrc$ (Equation 1)
$\text{volx34pi\_cd} = xl \cdot 0.75_r8 / \pi$ (Equation 2)
$(\text{radxnum\_cd})^3 = \text{num\_cd} \cdot (\text{volx34pi\_cd})$ (Equation 3)
$\text{rad\_cd} = \text{radxnum\_cd} / \text{num\_cd}$ (Equation 4)
$\text{gasdiffus} = 0.557_r8 \cdot (\text{tfld})^{1.75_r8} / \text{press}$ (Equation 5)
$\text{gasspeed} = 1.455e4_r8 \cdot \sqrt{\text{tfld} / 98.0_r8}$ (Equation 6)
$\text{knudsen} = 3.0_r8 \cdot \text{gasdiffus} / (\text{gasspeed} \cdot \text{rad\_cd})$ (Equation 7)
$\text{fuchs\_sutugin} = (0.4875_r8 \cdot (1._r8 + \text{knudsen})) / (\text{knudsen} \cdot (1.184_r8 + \text{knudsen}) + 0.4875_r8)$ (Equation 8)
$\text{uptkrate} = 12.56637_r8 \cdot \text{radxnum\_cd} \cdot \text{gasdiffus} \cdot \text{fuchs\_sutugin}$ (Equation 9)

### Equations:
No explicit equations were found in the provided Fortran code. However, based on the comments and variable descriptions, we can infer some relationships between these variables.
Wavenum2 = Wavenum1 + Delwave (Wavenum2 = Wavenum1 + Δwavenumber)
Ngc = Ngs - Ngs_prev (Ngc = Σngs - Σngsprev)
Ngm = 0 (initially), then increment by 1 for each new g-interval in a band
Ngb(1) = 1, Ngb(i+1) = Ngb(i) + Ngn(i-1)
Ngm(ngptsw*i+1) = ngm((i-1)*mg+1)
Wt = uniform weights for original 16 g-intervals (not explicitly calculated)
Rwgt = weighted sum of wt values for combining original g-intervals

===== File: potentialml.F90 =====

### Variables:
nlev (N)
i, j (Dummy variables for loop counters)
z0b, z0s (Z0B, Z0S)
h (H)
depth (DEPTH)
NN (NN)
db (DB), ds (DS)

lk (Lk), leps (Le)

galp (GALP)
kappa (KAPPA)

L (L)
eps_min (EPS_MIN)
eps (E)

### Equations:
$\int_{z_0}^{z_0+l_u(z_0)} (b(z_0)-b(z)) dz = k(z_0) \label{eq:potentialml1}$
where $i=1,2,...,N$
$\int_{z_0-l_d(z_0)}^{z_0} (b(z)-b(z_0)) dz = k(z_0) \label{eq:potentialml2}$
where $i=1,2,...,N$
$l_k(z_0)= Min ( l_d(z_0),l_u(z_0)) \label{eq:potentialml3}$
where $i=1,2,...,N$
$l_{\epsilon}(z_0) = ( l_d(z_0) l_u(z_0) )^\frac{1}{2} \label{eq:potentialml4}$
where $i=1,2,...,N$
$\epsilon=C_{\epsilon} k^{3/2} l_{\epsilon}^{-1} \label{eq:potentialml5}$
where $C_{\epsilon}=0.7$ and $i=1,2,...,N$
$L = Min (l_k) \label{eq:potentialml6}$
where $i=1,2,...,N$
$\eps(i)=cde*sqrt(tke(i)*tke(i)*tke(i))/L(i) \label{eq:potentialml7}$
where $i=0,1,...,N$

### Equations:
$\text{let } p_\text{par} = 0.999;$
$\text{if } \vert yt\vert < tiny\_val \land \text{sign}(dt_j) < 0: pscal_j = -(\max(p_dt_j, 0) \cdot dt + \max(ystate_j, 0))/tmp \cdot p_\text{par};$
$\text{else } pscal_j = 1;$
$pscal_j = \min(pscal_i,rscal_{icol(id)});$
$reaction\_rates_j = reaction\_rates_j \cdot rscal_j;$
$rfluxes = spm_d\%val \cdot rfluxes;$
$d_dt = (spm_d\%val) \cdot rfluxes;$
$p_dt = (spm_p\%val) \cdot rfluxes;$
$pscal_i = 1 - \frac{\max(p_dt(i),0) dtime + \max(ystate(i),0)}{tmp} p_par;$
$if (abs(pscal_j) < 1.e-14_r8) then pscal(j) = 0_r8 endif;$
$pscal_i = 1_r8 - \frac{\max(p_dt(i),0_r8) dtime + \max(ystate(i),0_r8)}{tmp} p_par$
`tiny_val` (TINY_VAL)
`p_par` (P_PAR)

### Equations:
$yt=ystate(j)+\left(p_dt(j)+d_dt(j)\right)dtime$
$pscal(j)=-\frac{\max\left(\left|state(j,t)\right|,0_r8\right)}{tmp} \cdot p_{par}$ where $tmp=\left(state(j,t)+\left(p_dt(j)+d_dt(j)\right)dtime\right)$
$rscal(spm_d%icol(id))=\min\left(rscal(spm_d%icol(id)),pscal(ii)\right)$
$reaction\_rates(j)=reaction\_rates(j)\cdot rscal(j)$

∀i ∈ {1, ..., GSMap%ngseg},
P1GSMap%comp_id = GSMap%comp_id
P1GSMap%ngseg = GSMap%ngseg
P1GSMap%gsize = GSMap%gsize
∀i ∈ {1, ..., GSMap%ngseg}, P1GSMap%start(i) = slpArray(i)
The sort function rearranges the elements of PGSMap%start and permutes them according to the order in PGSMap%pe_loc.
This function uses the permutation vector perm to reorder the elements of PGSMap.
Similar to the sort and permute functions, but applied to P1GSMap.
This function initializes the GlobalSegMap data structure PGSMAP with the given values.
Similar to the previous initialization function, but with a different array of values slpArray.
`GlobalStorage (GSMap)` (G)
`ProcessStorage (GSMap, i-1)` (PSi)
`ngseg (GSMap)` (NG)
`nlseg (GSMap, myProc)` (NLS)
`comp_id (GSMap)` (C)
`gsize (GSMap)` (S)
`GlobalToLocalIndex (GSMap, i, mycomm)` (GLi)

### Equations:
G = GlobalStorage(GSMap)
Equation: G = ∑[1 to GSMap%ngseg] (start(i)) + ∑[1 to GSMap%ngseg] (length(i))
PSi = ProcessStorage(GSMap, i-1)
Equation: PSi = start(i) if i mod mycomm == 0 else length(i)
NG = ngseg(GSMap)
Equation: NG = GSMap%ngseg
NLS = nlseg(GSMap, myProc)
Equation: NLS = ∑[1 to size(points)] (points(i) == proc)
GLi = GlobalToLocalIndex(GSMap, i, mycomm)
Equation: GLi = start(j) if i <= first else length(j) + start(first) if i >= last

`nlat_i` (M)
`numlon_i(ji)` (`L_j`)
`nlon_o` (N)
`nlat_o` (M)
`numlon_o(jo)` (`L_o`)
`mx_ovr` (`Mx`)
`lon_i(ii,ji)` (`\lambda_{ii}^j`)
`lon_o(io,jo)` (`\phi_{io}^o`)
`lat_i(ji)` (`\theta_j^i`)
`lat_o(jo)` (`\vartheta_o^j`)
`area_o(io,jo)` (`A_{io}^o`)
`re` (R)
`deg2rad` (`\delta`)
`a_ovr` (`A_{oi}`)

### Equations:
`\frac{\partial A}{\partial \phi} = 0`
`\frac{\partial \vartheta_i}{\partial t} = 0`
`N_j^i + M_o < Mx`
`M_o = N_j^i \leq Mx`
`\left| sin(\delta \vartheta_o^j) - sin(\delta \theta_j^i) \right| > 0`
`\left( max\{\phi_{io}^{o+},\lambda_{ii+}^j\} - min\{\phi_{io}^{o-},\lambda_{ii-}^j\} \right)\delta \geq 0`
`A_{oi} = (max\{\phi_{io}^{o+},\lambda_{ii+}^j\} - min\{\phi_{io}^{o-},\lambda_{ii-}^j\})\delta(sin(\delta \vartheta_o^j) - sin(\delta \theta_j^i))R^2`
`W_{oi} = A_{oi} / A_{io}^o`
`\phi_{io+}^{o} > \lambda_{ii+}^j`

===== File: importBench.F90 =====

### Variables:
k (k)
l (l)
n (n)
currLength (2^(l-1))
colInd (2*(k-1))
lettInd (2*k - 1)
charInd (65 + attInd)
i (i)
attInd (mod(n, k))
myproc (myproc)
nTrials (1000)
lmax (17)
MaxNumAtts (26)
dummyAList
inputData (:)
outputData (:)
impTimings (:)
expTimings (:)
startTime (MPI_WTIME())
finishTime (MPI_WTIME())
impMeanTime
expMeanTime
impStdDevTime
expStdDevTime

### Equations:
currLength = 2^(l-1) (CurrLen = 2^subscript(l-1))
colInd = 2*(k-1)
lettInd = 2*k - 1
charInd = 65 + attInd
impTimings(n) = finishTime - startTime
expTimings(n) = finishTime - startTime
impMeanTime = (sum(impTimings)) / float(nTrials) = fraction(sum(Timings_import),nTrials)
expMeanTime = (sum(expTimings)) / float(nTrials) = fraction(sum(Timings_export),nTrials)
impStdDevTime = sqrt((sum((impTimings - impMeanTime)**2)) / float(nTrials-1))
expStdDevTime = sqrt((sum((expTimings - expMeanTime)**2)) / float(nTrials-1))
`subscript` is used to denote the position of an element in a sequence.
The notation for the standard deviation is taken from [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Standard_deviation).
The variable name "Timings_import" and "Timings_export" are not present in the original code, but it's used here to distinguish between import and export timings.

### Equations:
$pleaf = 0\_r8$
$pstorage = 0\_r8$
$pxfer = 0\_r8$
$tot\_leaf = leaf + leaf\_storage + leaf\_xfer$
$my\_leaf\_seed = leafc\_seed\_param * SpeciesTypeMultiplier(species, pft_type, COMPONENT\_LEAF)$
$my\_deadstem\_seed = deadstemc\_seed\_param * SpeciesTypeMultiplier(species, pft_type, COMPONENT\_DEADWOOD)$
$seed\_leaf\_patch = my\_leaf\_seed * pleaf$
$seed\_leaf\_storage\_patch = my\_leaf\_seed * pstorage$
$seed\_leaf\_xfer\_patch = my\_leaf\_seed * pxfer$
$pleaf = leaf / tot\_leaf$
$pstorage = leaf\_storage / tot\_leaf$
$pxfer = leaf\_xfer / tot\_leaf$
$multiplier = 1\_r8$
$multiplier = c3\_r2$
$multiplier = c4\_r2$
$multiplier = c14ratio$
$multiplier = 0\_r8$
$multiplier = 1 / veg\_vp\%leafcn(pft\_type)$
$multiplier = 1 / veg\_vp\%deadwdcn(pft\_type)$

===== File: ThermalKSPTemperatureSoilAuxMod.F90 =====

### Variables:
`auxvars` (A)
`var_type` (VT)
`nauxvar` (NAU)
`auxvar_ids` (AI)
`data_1d` (D)
`iauxvar` (IAU)
`iulog` (IU)
`PETSC_TRUE` (PT)
`PETSC_FALSE` (PF)

### Equations:
For `VAR_TEMPERATURE` case: A(VT=VAR_TEMPERATURE) = D(IAU)
Temperature variable of auxvar is set to data_1d value
For `VAR_FRAC` case: A(VT=VAR_FRAC) = D(IAU)
Fraction variable of auxvar is set to data_1d value
For `VAR_THERMAL_COND` case: A(VT=VAR_THERMAL_COND) = D(IAU)
Thermal conductivity variable of auxvar is set to data_1d value
For `VAR_ACTIVE` case: A(VT=VAR_ACTIVE)%is_active = (D(IAU)==1.d0)
Active status of auxvar is set to PETSC_TRUE if data_1d value equals 1, otherwise PETSC_FALSE
For `VAR_DZ` case: A(VT=VAR_DZ) = D(IAU)
dz variable of auxvar is set to data_1d value
For `VAR_DIST_UP` case: A(VT=VAR_DIST_UP) = D(IAU)
dist_up variable of auxvar is set to data_1d value
For getting `VAR_TEMPERATURE`, `VAR_DZ`, and `VAR_THERMAL_COND` values: D(IAU) = A(VT=% temperature, dz, or therm_cond)
Data_1d values are retrieved from the corresponding variables of auxvar

### Equations:
JD = 365.24219 \* Y + F(Y) + (H - 12) / 24 + (M - 15 \* H + 23) / 1440 + S/86400, where Y is the year, F is the fraction of a day, and S is the second offset from midnight.

### Equations:
$\boxed{dst_array(no) = 0._r8}$ for $n=1,gridmap%ns$
$\boxed{wtnorm(no) = wtnorm(no) + wt*src_mask(ni)}$ for $n=1,gridmap%ns$
$\boxed{if (wtnorm(no) > 0) then dst_array(no) = spval} else dst_array(no) = 1.e36$ for $no=1,ns$
$\boxed{dst_array(no) = dst_array(no) + wt*src_mask(ni)*src_array(ni)/wtnorm(no)}$ for $n=1,gridmap%ns$
$\boxed{fracdst = frac_dst(no)}$ where $no = gridmap%dst_indx(n)$
$\boxed{wt = wovr(n)}$ where $n=1,gridmap%ns$
$\boxed{src_mask(ni) > 0}$ where $ni = gridmap%src_indx(n)$

### Equations:
$ln(0) = 1$
$lc(0) = ln(0) + 1$
$ln(0) = \sum_{i=1}^{n} keys(i) \eqv. key0$
$ni = lc(0) + ln(0)$
$inew(ni) = ix$
$indx(i) = inew(ni)$
$ln(0:1) = 0$
$ln(0:1) = ln(0:1) + \sum_{i=1}^{n} (\{keys(ix) \eqv. key0\} \to ni = lc(0) + ln(0), else ni = lc(1) + ln(1))$
$ln(0) = ln(0) + 1$
$lc(1) = ln(0) + 1$

### Equations:
$ N = \text{number of full lines in the file} $
$N = \frac{\text{total number of data points}}{\text{number of entries per line}}$
$ V_{k,e} = \text{data point } e \text{ on line } k $
$\boxed{V_{k,e} = v((k-1)\cdot E + e)}$
$\boxed{k_{\text{last}} = \frac{\text{total number of data points}}{\text{number of entries per line}}}$
$ V_{(k_{\text{last}}+1),e} = \text{data point } e \text{ on the partial last line} $
$\boxed{V_{(k_{\text{last}}+1),e} = v(k_{\text{last}}\cdot E + e)}$
$ D_{d,j,e} = \text{data point } e \text{ at level } j \text{ on device } d $
$\boxed{D_{d,j,e} = v((j-1)\cdot \frac{\text{file dimension}_2}{\text{file per line}} + (k-1)\cdot \text{file per line} + e)}$
$ D_{d,(k_{\text{last}}+1),e} = \text{data point } e \text{ on the partial last level } k_{\text{last}}+1 \text{ on device } d $
$\boxed{D_{d,(k_{\text{last}}+1),e} = v((j-1)\cdot \frac{\text{file dimension}_2}{\text{file per line}} + (k-1)\cdot \text{file per line} + e)}$

### Equations:
$\frac{\partial \ln Ps}{\partial \theta} = 0$
$\sum_{l=1}^{k}\left[D_l \Delta P_l\right] = DDPN$
$V_k \cdot \nabla \ln Ps \, B = VKDP$
$\sum_{j=1}^{k} V_j \cdot \nabla \ln Ps \, \delta B_j + B_{k+1/2} \sum_{l=1}^{k}\left[D_l \Delta P_l\right] = VPDNS$
$P_s \frac{\partial}{\partial x} \ln Ps = 0$
$\frac{\partial \psi}{\partial \theta} = 0$
$\sum_{l=1}^{K} D_l \Delta P_l + V_k \cdot \nabla P_s^* \delta B_k = 0$
$B_{k+1/2} \left(\sum_{j=1}^{k}\left[D_j \Delta P_j\right] + V_j \cdot \nabla P_s^* \delta B_j\right) + VKDP = 0$
$\frac{\partial}{\partial \eta} \left(P_s^*\frac{\partial \psi}{\partial \eta}\right) = -DDPK$
$P_s^* \frac{\partial}{\partial x} \ln Ps^* = P_STAR DPSL$
$P_s^* \frac{\partial}{\partial y} \ln Ps^* = P_STAR DPSM$

### Equations:
$\frac{\mathrm{x1+x2+x3+x4}}{4} = \frac{\mathrm{x_1+x_2+x_3+x_4}}{4}$
$tx = (x1+x2+x3+x4)/4.0$
$ty = (y1+y2+y3+y4)/4.0$
$tz = (z1+z2+z3+z4)/4.0$
$da = \sqrt{tx^2 + ty^2 + tz^2}$
$tz = \frac{tz}{da}$

===== File: ice_therm_shared.F90 =====

### Variables:
qin (Enthalpy)
Tmltk (Melting Temperature at one level)
Tin (Internal Temperature)
l_brine (Logical, Brine Pocket Effects)
cp_ice (Specific Heat Capacity of Ice)
cp_ocn (Specific Heat Capacity of Ocean Water)
rhoi (Density of Ice)
Lfresh (Latent Heat of Fusion for Fresh Water)
Tffresh (Freezing Point of Fresh Water)
TTTice (Temperature Scale Factor)
qqqice (Saturation Specific Humidity at 0°C)
c1 (Constant)
c2 (Constant)
c4 (Constant)
ferrmax (Maximum Allowed Energy Flux Error)
Tmin (Minimum Allowed Internal Temperature)
hfrazilmin (Minimum Thickness of New Frazil Ice)
hi_min (Minimum Ice Thickness Allowed)
fswsfc (SW Absorbed at Ice/Snow Surface)
rhoa (Air Density)
flw (Incoming Longwave Radiation)
potT (Air Potential Temperature)
Qa (Specific Humidity)
shcoef (Transfer Coefficient for Sensible Heat)
lhcoef (Transfer Coefficient for Latent Heat)
emissivity (Emissivity of Ice Surface)
stefan_boltzmann (Stefan-Boltzmann Constant)

### Equations:
Tin = (-(-cp_ice*Tmltk + qin/rhoi - Lfresh) - sqrt((-cp_ice*Tmltk + qin/rhoi - Lfresh)^2 - c4*cp_ice*Lfresh*Tmltk)) / (c2*cp_ice) (when l_brine is true)
Tin = (Lfresh + qin/rhoi) / cp_ice (when l_brine is false)
TsfK = Tsf + Tffresh
qsat = qqqice * exp(-TTTice*(c1/TsfK))
flwdabs = emissivity * flw
flwoutn = -emissivity * stefan_boltzmann * TsfK^4
fsensn = shcoef * (potT - TsfK)
flatn = lhcoef * (Qa - Qsfc)
fsurfn = fswsfc + flwdabs + flwoutn + fsensn + flatn
dfsensn_dTsf = -shcoef
dflatn_dTsf = -lhcoef * TTTice * (c1/TsfK)^2 * (qqqice / rhoa)
dflwoutn_dTsf = -emissivity * stefan_boltzmann * c4*TsfK^3
dfsurfn_dTsf = dflwoutn_dTsf + dfsensn_dTsf + dflatn_dTsf

===== File: m_TraceBack.F90 =====

### Variables:
RoutineName (Routine)
ParentName (Parent)
ChildName (Child)
TraceBackString (TBStr)
ArrowChar (→)
ScratchBuffer (ScrBfr)
i (index)
ierr (error code)

### Equations:
RoutineNameLength = len(Routine)   (1)
ScratchBufferLength = len(StartChar) + RoutineNameLength
allocate(ScratchBuffer(ScratchBufferLength), stat=ierr)
ScratchBuffer(i) = StartChar(i:i)
do i=1,RoutineNameLength
call String_init(TraceBackString, ScratchBuffer)
ParentNameLength = len(ParentName)
ChildNameLength = len(ChildName)
ScratchBufferLength = ParentNameLength + ChildNameLength + len(ArrowChar)
allocate(ScratchBuffer(ScratchBufferLength), stat=ierr)
do i=1,ParentNameLength
do i=1,len(ArrowChar)
do i=1,ChildNameLength
call String_init(TraceBackString, ScratchBuffer)
