$\frac{edge(ivar,ipos)}{dd10} = \frac{\Delta x}{2} fdat(1,ivar,ipos-1) + \frac{\Delta x}{2} fdat(1,ivar,ipos+0)$
Equation used in the constant grid-spacing reconstruction section.
$\frac{dfdx(ivar,ipos)}{dd10} = -fdat(1,ivar,ipos-1) + fdat(1,ivar,ipos+0)$
Equation used in the constant grid-spacing reconstruction section.
$edge(ivar,ipos) = delh(+0) fdat(1,ivar,ipos-1) + delh(-1) fdat(1,ivar,ipos+0)$
Equation used in the variable grid-spacing reconstruction section.
$\frac{dfdx(ivar,ipos)}{dd10} = -2fdat(1,ivar,ipos-1) + 2fdat(1,ivar,ipos+0)$
Equation used in the variable grid-spacing reconstruction section.
$edge(ivar,head-1) = \begin{cases}\text{loose: } fdat(+1,ivar,head-1),\\\text{value: } bclo(ivar)\%value,\\\text{slope: } fdat(+1,ivar,head-1) + bclo(ivar)\%slope\end{cases}$
Equation used for the left-hand side boundary condition.
$dfdx(ivar,head-1) = \begin{cases}\text{loose: } 0,\\\text{value: } 0,\\\text{slope: } bclo(ivar)\%slope\end{cases}$
Equation used for the left-hand side boundary condition.
$edge(ivar,tail+1) = \begin{cases}\text{loose: } fdat(+1,ivar,tail+0),\\\text{value: } bchi(ivar)\%value,\\\text{slope: } fdat(+1,ivar,tail+0) + bchi(ivar)\%slope\end{cases}$
Equation used for the right-hand side boundary condition.
$dfdx(ivar,tail+1) = \begin{cases}\text{loose: } 0,\\\text{value: } 0,\\\text{slope: } bchi(ivar)\%slope\end{cases}$
Equation used for the right-hand side boundary condition.

### Variables:

### Equations:
$\frac{d}{dt}y = \frac{k_{0}}{t_{1}},$
$y^{*}=y+\Delta t\cdot f_{1}\left(t_{1},k_{0}\right),$
$\frac{d}{dt}y=\frac{k_{1}}{t_{2}},$
$y^{*}=y+\Delta t\cdot f_{2}\left(t_{2},k_{0},k_{1}\right),$
$\frac{d}{dt}y=\frac{k_{3}}{t_{3}},$
$y^{*}=y+\Delta t\cdot f_{3}\left(t_{3},k_{0},k_{1},k_{2}\right),$
$\frac{d}{dt}y=\frac{k_{4}}{t_{4}},$
$y^{*}=y+\Delta t\cdot f_{4}\left(t_{4},k_{0},k_{1},k_{2},k_{3}\right),$
$\frac{d}{dt}y=\frac{k_{5}}{t_{5}},$
$y^{*}=y+\Delta t\cdot f_{5}\left(t_{5},k_{0},k_{1},k_{2},k_{3},k_{4}\right),$
$y_{\mathrm{out}}=y+\Delta t\cdot z_{0}\cdot k_{0}+z_{2}\left(k_{2}-k_{0}\right)+z_{3}\left(k_{3}-k_{1}\right)+z_{4}\left(k_{4}-k_{2}\right)+z_{5}\left(k_{5}-k_{3}\right).$
$\varepsilon=\max\limits_{i}\left|\frac{y_{\mathrm{out},i}^{45}}{\Delta t}\right|.$
$\Delta t_{\mathrm{opt}}=\Delta t \cdot \min\left(0.25, 0.840896 \cdot \left(\frac{\varepsilon}{\max\left(\varepsilon,0.00001\varepsilon\right)}\right)^{1/4}\right).$
$\mathrm{if}~\varepsilon > \varepsilon_{\max} ~\mathrm{then}~\mathrm{pass}=~\mathrm{false};~\mathrm{else}~\mathrm{pass}=~\mathrm{true}.$
$y^{Euler}=y+\Delta t \cdot dYdx.$

===== File: mo_fluxes_broadband_kernels.F90 =====

### Variables:

### Equations:
\overline{\mathcal{F}}(i_c,i_l) = \sum_{i_g=1}^{N_{gpt}} \mathcal{F}_{s}(i_c,i_l,i_g)
diff = \mathcal{F}_\text{down}(i_c,i_l, i_g=1) - \mathcal{F}_\text{up}(i_c,i_l, i_g=1)
diff = \mathcal{F}_\text{down}(i_c,i_l, i_g=i_g) - \mathcal{F}_\text{up}(i_c,i_l, i_g=i_g)
\overline{\mathcal{F}}(i_c,i_l) = \overline{\mathcal{F}}(i_c,i_l) + diff
\overline{\mathcal{F}}_\text{net}(i_c,i_l) = \mathcal{F}_\text{down}(i_c,i_l, i_g=1) - \mathcal{F}_\text{up}(i_c,i_l, i_g=1)
\overline{\mathcal{F}}_\text{net}(i_c,i_l) = \mathcal{F}_\text{dn}(i_c,i_l) - \mathcal{F}_\text{up}(i_c,i_l)

`c` (C)
`kk` (K/2)
`is` (Latitude Index)
`iter` (Iteration Counter)
`n` (Indices)
`l` (Indices)
`sinlat` (Sine of Latitudes)
`wgt` (Gaussian Weights)

### Equations:
`pi = 4._r16*atan(one)`, Pi = 4 × arctan(1)
`c = (1._r16-(2._r16/pi)**2)*0.25_r16`
`fk = k`, K = fk
`xz = cos(sinlat(is)/(((fk+0.5_r16)**2+c)**0.5_r16))`, xz = cos(sin(lat) / ((k + 0.5)^2 + c)^0.5)
`pkm2 = 1._r16` (Initial value of -Polynomials)
`pk = (2._r16*fn-1._r16)*xz*pkm1-(fn-1._r16)*pkm2 / fn`, P-K = ((2 * n - 1) * xz * pkm1 - (n - 1) * pkm2) / n
`sp = pk/pkmrk` (S-P = P-K/Pk-mrk)
`xz = xz - sp` (X-Z = X-Z - S-P)
`avsp = abs(sp)` (A-V-S-P = |S-P|)
`wgt(is) = (2._r16*(1._r16-xz**2))/(fk*pkm1)**2`, W-GT = 2 × (1 - xz^2) / (k * pkm1^2)
`pk = pk*fn**2/(fn-1._r16)**2` (P-K = P-K * n^2 / (n - 1)^2)
`wgt(kk+1) = pk`, W-GT(Equator) = P-K
`a(n) = sinlat(n)` (A = Sin(Lat))
`a(l) = -sinlat(n)` (-A = -Sin(Lat))
`w(n) = wgt(n)` (W = W-GT)
`w(l) = wgt(n)` (-W = -W-GT)

### Equations:
\(\text{jar_forc}\%h2osoi\_liqvol=h2osoi\_liqvol\)
\(henrycef=1.3e-3_r8*exp(-1500._r8*(1._r8/temp-1._r8/298.15_r8))\)
\(\text{bunsencef_o2}=henrycef*temp/12.2_r8\)
\(o2\_w2b=air\_vol/bunsencef\_o2+h2osoi\_liqvol\)
\(o2\_g2b=air\_vol+h2osoi\_liqvol*bunsencef\_o2\)
\(\text{henrycef}=2.5e-2_r8*exp(-2600._r8*(1._r8/temp-1._r8/298.15_r8))\)
\(bunsencef\_n2o= henrycef*temp/12.2_r8\)
\(\text{n2o\_g2b}=air\_vol+h2osoi\_liqvol*bunsencef\_n2o\)
\(\text{henrycef}=6.1e-4_r8*exp(-1300._r8*(1._r8/temp-1._r8/298.15_r8))\)
\(bunsencef\_n2= henrycef*temp/12.2_r8\)
\(\text{n2\_g2b}=air\_vol+h2osoi\_liqvol*bunsencef\_n2\)
\(Dg=1.93e-5_r8*(temp/273.0_r8)**1.82_r8 * taugas\)
\(Dw=2.57e-9_r8*(temp/273.0_r8) * tauaqu\)
\(\text{aren\_cond\_n2}=1._r8/(ra+dzsoi*0.5_r8/(Dg*air_vol+(Dw+Diff_Darcy)*h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_n2))\)
\(\text{aren\_cond\_o2}=1._r8/(ra+dzsoi*0.5_r8/(Dg*air_vol+(Dw+Diff_Darcy)*h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_o2))\)
\(\text{aren\_cond\_n2o}=1._r8/(ra+dzsoi*0.5_r8/(Dg*air_vol+(Dw+Diff_Darcy)*h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_n2o))\)
patm_pascal (pa)

aren_cond_n2o (1/s)
Dg (m²/s)
Dw (m²/s)
catomw (kg/mol)

### Equations:
henrycef = 1.3e-3_r8*exp(-1500._r8*(1._r8/temp-1._r8/298.15_r8))
bunsencef_o2 = henrycef*temp/12.2_r8
o2_w2b = air_vol/bunsencef_o2+h2osoi_liqvol
o2_g2b = air_vol+h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_o2
bunsencef_n2o = 2.5e-2_r8*exp(-2600._r8*(1._r8/temp-1._r8/298.15_r8))
n2o_g2b = air_vol+h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_n2o
bunsencef_n2 = 6.1e-4_r8*exp(-1300._r8*(1._r8/temp-1._r8/298.15_r8))
n2_g2b = air_vol+h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_n2
aren_cond_n2 = 1._r8/(ra+dzsoi*0.5_r8/(Dg*air_vol+(Dw+Diff_Darcy)*h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_n2))
aren_cond_o2 = 1._r8/(ra+dzsoi*0.5_r8/(Dg*air_vol+(Dw+Diff_Darcy)*h2osoi_liqvol*bunsencef_o2))
aren_cond_o2 = aren_cond_o2/dzsoi
Dg = 1.93e-5_r8*(temp/273.0_r8)**1.82_r8 * taugas
Dw=2.57e-9_r8*(temp/273.0_r8) * tauaqu
aren_cond_n2 =aren_cond_n2/dzsoi
Dg = 1.8e-5_r8*(temp/273.0_r8)**1.82_r8 * taugas
Dw=2.4e-9_r8*temp/298.0_r8 * tauaqu
aren_cond_o2 =aren_cond_o2/dzsoi
Dg = 0.159e-4_r8*(temp/293.15)**1.5_r8 * taugas
Dw=2.6e-9_r8*temp/298.15_r8 * tauaqu

air_vol (V_a)

The cloud fraction `frac_out`, optical depth `dtau`, and emissivity `dem` are related to each other through the cloud properties:

### Equations:
p = p0 exp(-z/H)
s_p = (-exp((p-p0)/(bs*ptop)) + exp((ptop-p)/(bs*ptop)))/(bs*ptop)
lonp = lon - 2.d0*pi*time/tau
ud = (omega0*a) * cos(lonp) * (cos(lat)**2.0) * cos(pi*time/tau) * s_p
u = k0*sin(lonp)*sin(lonp)*sin(2.d0*lat)*cos(pi*time/tau) + u0*cos(lat) + ud
v = k0*sin(2.d0*lonp)*cos(lat)*cos(pi*time/tau)
w = -((Rd*T0)/(g*p))*omega0*sin(lonp)*cos(lat)*cos(pi*time/tau)*s
rho = p/(Rd*T)
q1 = 0.3d0*(1.1 + sin(0.25d0*pi*x)*sin(0.3d0*pi*y)*sin(0.25d0*pi*zeta)*sin(pi*(p-ptop)/(p0-ptop)))
q2 = 0.9d0 - 0.8d0*q1**2
r  = ACOS (sin_tmp + cos_tmp*cos(lon-lambda0))
r2 = ACOS (sin_tmp2 + cos_tmp2*cos(lon-lambda1))
d1 = min( 1.d0, (r/RR)**2 + ((height-z0)/ZZ)**2 )
d2 = min( 1.d0, (r2/RR)**2 + ((height-z0)/ZZ)**2 )
q3 = 1.d0
q3 = 1.d0
q3 = 0.1d0
q3 = 0.1d0
q4 = 1.d0 - 0.3d0*(q1+q2+q3)

### Variables:

### Equations:
Tv = T_i*(1 + (R_w/R_g - 1)*r_i)/(1 + r_i) [T_* = T_i(1 + (R_w/R_g - 1)r_i)/(1 + r_i)]
Cp_star = C_p*(1 + (c_pw/C_p - 1)*r)/(1 + r) [Cp_* = C_p(1 + (c_pw/C_p - 1)r/(1 + r))]
estar = exp(53.67957 - 6743.769/T - 4.8451*log(T)) [e* = e^{53.67957 - 6743.769/T - 4.8451\log{T}}]
q = r/(r + 1) [q = r/(r + 1)]
qstar = (R_d/R_v)*estar/(p - estar*(1 - R_d/R_v)) [q* = (R_d/R_v)e*/(p - e*(1 - R_d/R_v))]
h = e/estar [h = e/e*]
e_out = |r*p|/Rd_on_Rv [e_ = |r_p|R_d/R_v]
r = (R_d/R_v)*|e_in/p| [r = (R_d/R_v)|e_/p|]

===== File: eos.F90 =====

### Variables:
p (Pressure)
vtheta_dp (Virtual potential temperature)
dp (Pressure layer thickness)
dphi (Geopotential height difference)
pi (Exner pressure)
kappa (Ratio of gas constant to specific heat capacity at constant pressure)
Rgas (Gas constant)
g (Acceleration due to gravity)
p0 (Reference atmospheric pressure)
phi_i (Geopotential on interfaces)
exner (Exner pressure)
dpnh_dp_i (Derivative of non-hydrostatic pressure with respect to potential temperature)
pnh (Non-hydrostatic pressure)

### Equations:
P = p0 \* (p_over_exner / p0)**(1/(1-kappa)) (Non-hydrostatic EOS)
P_i = hvcoord%hyai \* hvcoord%ps0 + dp3d (Pressure on interfaces, hydrostatic case)
phi_i(:,:,k) = phi_i(:,:,k+1) + (Rgas * vtheta_dp(:,:,k) * (p(:,:,k)/p0)**(kappa-1))/p0 (Geopotential, hydrostatic case)
Exner = P / p_over_exner (Exner pressure, non-hydrostatic case)
dpnh/dpi = 1 (Derivative of non-hydrostatic pressure with respect to potential temperature, hydrostatic case)
phi_i(:,:,k) = phi_i(:,:,k+1)+ (Rgas*vtheta_dp(:,:,k)*bfb_pow(p(:,:,k)/p0,(kappa-1)))/p0 (Geopotential, wet case)
pnh = pi (Non-hydrostatic pressure, hydrostatic case)

### Equations:
$ pref = \frac{zgt - za1 (1 - e^{-ze2})}{1 + zgt} $
$ ptra = 1 - pref $
$ prefd = \frac{zgt}{1 + zgt} $
$ ptrad = 1 - prefd $
$ ze2 = \min\left(\frac{\tau}{\mu}, 500\right) $
$ pref = zw \left(r_1 e^{e_1} - r_2 e^{-e_1} - r_3 e^{-e_2}\right)/denr $
$ ptra = \frac{zem_2 - zem_2 zw \left(t_1 e^{e_1} - t_2 e^{-e_1} - t_3 e^{e_2}\right)}{dent} $
$ zemm = e^{-e_1}e^{-e_1} $
$ zdend = \frac{1}{(1 - beta e^{-e_1} e^{-e_1}) rk} $
$ prefd = gamma_2 (1 - e^{-e_1}e^{-e_1}) zdend $
$ ptrad = rk^2 e^{-e_1}zdend $
$ zdenr \geq eps$ then $ pref = eps $ and $ ptra = zem_2 $
$ ze_1 = \min(rk tau, 500) $
$ pref = zw (r_1 e^{e_1} - r_2 e^{-e_1} - r_3 e^{-e_2})/denr $
$ ptra = zem_2 - zem_2 zw (t_1 e^{e_1} - t_2 e^{-e_1} - t_3 e^{e_2})/dent $
$ pref(jk) = (zgt - za1 * (1._r8 - ze2)) / (1._r8 + zgt) $
$ ptra(jk) = 1._r8 - pref(jk) $
$ prefd(jk) = zgt / (1._r8 + zgt) $
$ ptrad(jk) = 1._r8 - prefd(jk)$

===== File: tracers.F90 =====

### Variables:
`m` (M)
`mm` (MM)
`minc` (MINC)
`ixtrct` (IXTRCT)
`name` (NAME)
`n` (N)
`trac_ncnst` (TRAC_NCNST)
`gcid` (GCID)
`q` (Q)
`pver` (PVER)
`mwdry` (MWDRY)
`cpair` (CPAIR)
`cflx` (CFLX)
`landfrac` (LANDFRAC)
`deltat` (DELTA)
`state` (STATE)
`ptend` (PTEND)
`pcnst` (PCNST)

### Equations:
minc = 0
minc = -1.e36_r8
trac_ncnst = cnst_num_avail()
do m = 1,trac_ncnst
name = get_tracer_name(m)
call cnst_add(name, mwdry, cpair, minc, mm, &
if ( m .eq. 1 ) ixtrct = mm
tracers_implements_cnst = .false.
if ( tracers_flag )
do m = 1,trac_ncnst
if (name == get_tracer_name(m))
tracers_implements_cnst = .true.
return
call init_cnst_tr(m,q, gcid)
call addfld (cnst_name(mm), (/ 'lev' /), 'A', 'kg/kg', cnst_longname(mm))
call addfld (sflxnam(mm),    horiz_only, 'A',   'kg/m2/s', trim(cnst_name(mm))//' surface flux')
call add_default (cnst_name(mm), 1, ' ')
call add_default (sflxnam(mm),   1, ' ')
call init_tr
if (.not. tracers_flag)
lq(:)      = .FALSE.
lq(ixtrct:ixtrct+trac_ncnst-1) = .TRUE.
call physics_ptend_init(ptend,state%psetcols,'tracer_ts')
do  m = 1,trac_ncnst
if (debug) write(iulog,*)'tracers.F90 calling for tracer ',m
call flux_tr(m,state%ncol,state%lchnk, landfrac, cflx(:,ixtrct+m-1))
call tend_tr(m,state%ncol, state%q(:,:,ixtrct+m-1), deltat, ptend%q(:,:,ixtrct+m-1))
if ( cnst_cam_outfld(ixtrct+m-1) )
call outfld (sflxnam(ixtrct+m-1),cflx(:,ixtrct+m-1),pcols,state%lchnk)
if ( debug )
write(iulog,*)'tracers_timestep_tend ixtrct,m,ixtrct+m-1',ixtrct,m,ixtrct+m-1
write(iulog,*)'tracers_timestep_tend min max flux',minval(cflx(:,ixtrct+m-1)),maxval(cflx(:,ixtrct+m-1))
write(iulog,*)'tracers_timestep_tend min max tend',minval(ptend%q(:,:,ixtrct+m-1)),maxval(ptend%q(:,:,ixtrct+m-1))
write(iulog,*)'tracers_timestep_tend end'
endif
else
call physics_ptend_init(ptend,state%psetcols,'tracer_ts',lq=.true.)
endif

### Variables:
`r8` (double precision)
`betr_maxpatch_pft` (maximum number of patches per PFT)
`betr_max_soilorder` (not defined in the given code snippet, but it is a variable used in other modules)
`km_decomp_nh4` (decomposer n competition rate coefficient)
`km_decomp_no3` (decomposer o competition rate coefficient)
`km_decomp_p` (decomposer p competition rate coefficient)
`km_nit` (nitrification competition rate coefficient)
`km_den` (denitrification competition rate coefficient)
`smin_nh4` (minimum NH4 concentration)
`smin_no3` (minimum NO3 concentration)
`plant_ntypes` (number of plant types)
`msurf_nh4` (NH4 concentration on mineral surfaces)
`ECA_factor_nit` (N competition factor for nitrite)
`ECA_factor_den` (N competition factor for denitrification)
`ECA_factor_nh4_mic` (NH4 competition factor for microbes)
`ECA_factor_no3_mic` (NO3 competition factor for microbes)
`ECA_flx_nh4_plants` (flux of NH4 from plants)
`ECA_flx_no3_plants` (flux of NO3 from plants)
`ECA_factor_msurf_nh4` (competition factor for NH4 on mineral surfaces)
`sminp_soluble` (minimum soluble P concentration)
`nop_lim` (logical indicator of P limitation)
`msurf_minp` (P concentration on mineral surfaces)
`ECA_factor_phosphorus_mic` (P competition factor for microbes)
`ECA_flx_phosphorus_plants` (flux of P from plants)
`ECA_factor_minp_msurf` (competition factor for P on mineral surfaces)

### Equations:
$\frac{dS_{NH4}}{dt} = -k_{m_decomp_NH4}\cdot S_{NH4}$ (not directly extracted, but implied in the competition calculation)
$K = \begin{bmatrix} k_{m_decomp_NH4} & 0 & k_{m_decomp_NH4_mic} & k_{m_decomp_NH4_msurf} & K_{mumax_NH4_plant}(1:n) \\ 0 & k_{m_denit} & k_{m_denit_mic} & 0 & K_{mumax_NO3_plant}(1:n) \end{bmatrix}$ (affinity matrix)
$S = \begin{bmatrix} S_{NH4} \\ S_{NO3} \end{bmatrix}$ (substrate vector)
$E = \begin{bmatrix} b_{nitrite} & b_{denit} & b_{mic} & S_{NH4,mic} & E_{plant}(1:n) \end{bmatrix}^T$ (competitor vector)
$\mathbf{\sigma} = \text{ecacomplex\_cell\_norm}(K, S, E)$ (ECA calculation result)
$ECA\_factor\_nit = \sigma(1,1)$
$ECA\_factor\_den = \sigma(2,2)$
$ECA\_factor\_NH4\_mic = \sigma(1,3)$
$ECA\_factor\_NO3\_mic = \sigma(2,3)$
$ECA\_flx\_NH4\_plants(i) = K_{mumax_NH4_plant}(i)\cdot E_{plant}(i)\cdot\sigma(1,i+3)$
$ECA\_factor\_minp\_msurf = \sigma(1,2)$
$ECA\_factor\_phosphorus\_mic = \sigma(1,1)$
$ECA\_flx\_phosphorus\_plants(i) = K_{mumax_minp_plant}(i)\cdot E_{plant}(i)\cdot\sigma(1,i+2)$
